subject: The Corporation for Public Broadcasting is shutting down!!

body:
Once public media is gone, there’s no easy way to bring it back

| **The Corporation for Public Broadcasting is shutting down after relentless attacks from Trump and MAGA extremists who know that a free, independent press is a threat to their agenda.**

PBS and NPR have educated generations of Americans, delivered trusted local news, and ensured rural and underserved communities aren’t left in the dark. Once they’re gone, there’s no easy way to bring them back.

**That’s why public figures like Stephen Colbert are speaking out. But public pressure only works if people continue to show up _every day_.**

**[It's why we’re asking, please, take 10 seconds to stand up to defend public broadcasting: Add your name to defend public broadcasting now! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124943077/600220932/-318400792?refcode=NDCAF_20260207_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjU4ZjI4OS04OTA0LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tvF6ZpG3cD2HaygAw9Z1Q-cbh6sZZvl4WJcIeoZ_Drk=&emci=8ab88e76-6f03-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=af58f289-8904-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=48524772)** | [DEFEND PUBLIC BROADCASTING: ADD YOUR NAME NOW! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124943078/600220933/-318400792?refcode=NDCAF_20260207_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjU4ZjI4OS04OTA0LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tvF6ZpG3cD2HaygAw9Z1Q-cbh6sZZvl4WJcIeoZ_Drk=&emci=8ab88e76-6f03-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=af58f289-8904-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=48524772)

The Corporation for Public Broadcasting — which helped fund NPR, PBS and many local radio and TV stations – voted to dissolve the private, nonprofit corporation after 58 years of service.

For more than half a century, it ensured that all Americans — regardless of their zip code, income, or background — had access to trusted news, educational programming.

**It’s absolutely critical that Americans continue putting pressure on Congress until the midterms to ensure public media survives through the end of the year.**

We must not allow Trump’s attack on public broadcasting to come to fruition and completely deteriorate our democracy.

**[That’s why we’re gathering signatures on our “Defend Public Broadcasting” petition and we’re counting on you to add your name before midnight. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124943081/600220936/-2057108868?refcode=NDCAF_20260207_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjU4ZjI4OS04OTA0LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tvF6ZpG3cD2HaygAw9Z1Q-cbh6sZZvl4WJcIeoZ_Drk=&emci=8ab88e76-6f03-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=af58f289-8904-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=48524772)**

subject: “We should take over the voting.”

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email1022026 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email1022026]
Peter ,
Over the past few weeks, Donald Trump has openly talked about seizing ballots, canceling elections, and stripping states of control over voting. Not as a warning – as something he regrets not doing and wants to do next.
* He’s said he should have ordered the National Guard to seize voting machines.
* He’s floated canceling the 2026 midterms altogether.
* He’s called for the federal government to “take over the voting” in cities like Detroit, Philadelphia, and Atlanta.
When asked if he’d accept the results of the midterms if Republicans lose, Trump said he would, but only if he decides the elections are “honest.”
And his allies are already moving. Congressional Republicans are fast-tracking a sweeping voter suppression bill that would knock millions of eligible voters off the rolls,federal agents have seized ballots in Georgia, and Trump loyalists inside the government are reopening conspiracy-driven probes into the 2020 election. Steve Bannon is even saying they have a plan for law enforcement at polling places.
GOTV PAC is focused on the one thing that stops Donald Trump from trying to rig the next election – MASSIVE TURNOUT. If you can, help expand our turnout work ahead of the 2026 midterms. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email02072026]

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie wrote this for the soul
body:
It wasn’t about politics...| | | [](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=d155489b6f1e444e8345051f19e5e71c&_e=D9dpidgafo-NkcUY2518IAfRJgARCEaJxaIJRSJY-ICn1LmhUpBucGaSqcv1L08l5NPMIv_-Q6ptdAOdGAbU4WvsqaKZQ8ysW97SdGaRJH4KYtR8jcGY89NRAI9KD-XEEF2NM70r-jTbUNG4zX6qnjE2MT93BotJPJ-BKx4jp1aYEqkBhetPe8hKDmi2NmkZGW3hCBBXcnLsqhdpOYsIuzMU1UU3qee79lur4WUqcSkAIJkYAVdiykNf69wQGLhKXMSkF2ZwOmXdf0cyxxuUqWi5w-MTwTxuK2U8xIiLKIOCPxJXPwmNZXGrlf08zaYnYB9FJJyFymnaPLyakHNvmAycEB_izE2Xszmbpclkot6xrRFS_9tH8Fi5Sp3z848WaICsi16oOUEcOQAMSxyzv8Z1V4-Ri4SHCEn_rR5khhZDmi2gJ2Y4ET1WwsEfQ4xZpOxGpXIbJzhhlxS1SjUruC3Epg6Re-EtYQ3vcrdQEvwth8nHjVL6SVi6XViuh7XNWX6dBvT4FsZbOP6e2Gmf1Qup9-HNzVj3Qq4YpCdgVL99LCFq8DP5lnE4vG1290KVaUe6dHqsMMq0xC4e5NWXQ441lNGBNhD1mhh-Owjqd1YAAu-Li79WBJjADqdO_hrKyqJ4xm5dYgv4u16HQUck1OmU0vLmuC8W7T3cw50TsKxNNarrbf-AQGmncMmwc4ie)
---
| | Peter,
---
| | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...
---

clean_body: It wasn’t about politics...| | | | | Peter, | | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud. He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus. He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness. And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible. I saw it up close -- Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything. He started observing the Sabbath. Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance. But as an act of obedience. As a way of saying, " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped. He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield. No email. No media. No work. He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children. It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much. But over time, it changed him. And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned... This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust. A book not about politics... but about peace. It 's called: Stop, in the Name of God. Peter, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book. It's not a culture war manifesto. It's a call to stop. To rest. To breathe. To return to God. Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away. Trust that God is in control. Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship. In Stop, in the Name of God, you'll discover: 🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout 🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again. That's the heartbeat of his final message. Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth. He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth... For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal. Peter, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage. These are the very things Charlie gave his life for. May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God... A stronger love for your family... And a renewed peace in your own soul. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S.Stop, in the Name of God is Charlie Kirk's final message -- written in obedience, shaped by Scripture, and grounded in trust in the Lord. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Here's what's happening: in nearly every competitive Senate race in the country, Democrats outraised Republicans.

And right here in South Carolina, **my far-Left Democrat opponent outraised me by nearly $400,000.**

This should concern every conservative who cares about this country.

I said from the beginning that this was going to be a tough fight. I wasn't kidding. And we cannot afford to fall behind this early.

clean_body: I am sick to my stomach. This wasn’t the news I wanted to share. | I wish I could tell you this headline wasn't real - but it is. Here's what's happening: in nearly every competitive Senate race in the country, Democrats outraised Republicans. And right here in South Carolina, my far-Left Democrat opponent outraised me by nearly $400,000. This should concern every conservative who cares about this country. I said from the beginning that this was going to be a tough fight. I wasn't kidding. And we cannot afford to fall behind this early. The Left despises President Trump - and they despise me - because they know we won't cave, we won't bend, and we don't back down. That's why they are pouring obscene amounts of money into this race. If we don't regain our momentum now, here's what the millions they are raising can buy them: Wall-to-wall attack ads against President Trump and me Negative mail in every mailbox across South Carolina A real chance to change the outcome of this race I refuse to let this happen. I've always been a number one target from the Left because they know I will always stand up and won't back down. But I cannot do this alone. ** Thanks for being on our team. Lindsey Graham | In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. I am absolutely shaken. Leadership shared something with me – something devastating – and I can’t talk about it openly.

name: Steve Scalise
subject: I'm genuinely sorry >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I am genuinely sorry, Peter.
Really, I am.
I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate.
I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you.
I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating.
It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages. I'll get bombarded with texts and emails asking me for money but it's hard to tell who sends them all.
And if I do pitch in a few bucks, I'd probably get pestered even more - without any acknowledgement of my contribution.
It's wrong, and I'm doing things differently.
This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. clean_body: I am genuinely sorry, Peter. Really, I am. I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate. I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you. I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating. It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages. I'll get bombarded with texts and emails asking me for money but it's hard to tell who sends them all. And if I do pitch in a few bucks, I'd probably get pestered even more - without any acknowledgement of my contribution. It's wrong, and I'm doing things differently. This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. name: INGOP
subject: Statement from Chairwoman Keesling Announcing the Election of Nick McKinley to Indiana Senate District 17
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
Dear Hoosier Republicans, No images? [Click here](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-e-ajitkut-hhlljjcji-h/) **For Immediate Release:** February 7, 2026**Contact:** Gage Hoekstra, Press Secretary, **_[ghoekstra@indiana.gop](mailto:ghoekstra@indiana.gop)_****Statement from Chairwoman Keesling Announcing the Election of Nick McKinley to Indiana Senate District 17****La Fontaine, Ind. (February 7, 2026)** - A caucus of Precinct Committeemen in Senate District 17 was called by State Chairwoman Lana Keesling to fill a vacancy for State Senate created by the resignation of Andy Zay, who Governor Mike Braun has appointed to Chair the Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission. Senator-elect Nick McKinley of Grant County won the caucus on the first round of voting. McKinley will fulfill the remainder of the Senate District 17 term, which is up for reelection later this year._**Statement from Indiana GOP Chairwoman Lana Keesling:**_ "It is my honor to congratulate Nick McKinley, a man who is eager to defend and advance the principles and priorities our party and his district hold so dear, on his victory in the caucus to serve the Hoosiers of Senate District 17.Following a senator who served his constituents with distinction for nearly a decade is no easy task, but I know that Nick has the courage and capacity needed to meet that challenge. I am deeply heartened by the enthusiasm of Senator-elect McKinley's neighbors to see him represent them in the State Senate, and I look forward to working side by side to advance the cause of freedom and prosperity in Indiana."### [](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajitkut-hhlljjcji-r/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajitkut-hhlljjcji-y/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajitkut-hhlljjcji-j/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajitkut-hhlljjcji-t/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajitkut-hhlljjcji-i/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajitkut-hhlljjcji-d/) ** PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. ****NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. ****WWW.INDIANA.GOP.** | Indiana Republican State Committee 101 W. For Immediate Release: February 7, 2026Contact: Gage Hoekstra, Press Secretary, mailto:ghoekstra@indiana.gopStatement from Chairwoman Keesling Announcing the Election of Nick McKinley to Indiana Senate District 17La Fontaine, Ind. (February 7, 2026) - A caucus of Precinct Committeemen in Senate District 17 was called by State Chairwoman Lana Keesling to fill a vacancy for State Senate created by the resignation of Andy Zay, who Governor Mike Braun has appointed to Chair the Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission. Senator-elect Nick McKinley of Grant County won the caucus on the first round of voting. McKinley will fulfill the remainder of the Senate District 17 term, which is up for reelection later this year.Statement from Indiana GOP Chairwoman Lana Keesling: "It is my honor to congratulate Nick McKinley, a man who is eager to defend and advance the principles and priorities our party and his district hold so dear, on his victory in the caucus to serve the Hoosiers of Senate District 17.Following a senator who served his constituents with distinction for nearly a decade is no easy task, but I know that Nick has the courage and capacity needed to meet that challenge. I am deeply heartened by the enthusiasm of Senator-elect McKinley's neighbors to see him represent them in the State Senate, and I look forward to working side by side to advance the cause of freedom and prosperity in Indiana."### PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

Inside Foxconn’s massive new facility in Houston, cameras captured NVIDIA’s CEO standing shoulder-to-shoulder with humanoid robots. Real machines — walking, turning, and working on the floor of what will become America’s first large-scale humanoid production line.

This isn’t decades away. Foxconn plans to begin production in 2026 — right here in the U.S. — rolling out two advanced models that could replace millions of workers.

Even President Trump, speaking at a recent rally, said: “We have to be very careful with where this is going.” But Washington is already betting big... and cutting contracts.

The real winners? Not the robot brands... but the 3 little-known companies supplying the hardware, chips, and systems for every AI humanoid built. These plays could move before the first Houston robots even ship.

If you wait for mainstream coverage, you’ll be too late.

clean_body: Washington didn’t expect this footage to go public.Inside Foxconn’s massive new facility in Houston, cameras captured NVIDIA’s CEO standing shoulder-to-shoulder with humanoid robots. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Washington didn’t expect this footage to go public. | Inside Foxconn’s massive new facility in Houston, cameras captured NVIDIA’s CEO standing shoulder-to-shoulder with humanoid robots. Real machines — walking, turning, and working on the floor of what will become America’s first large-scale humanoid production line. This isn’t decades away. Foxconn plans to begin production in 2026 — right here in the U.S. — rolling out two advanced models that could replace millions of workers. Even President Trump, speaking at a recent rally, said: “We have to be very careful with where this is going.” But Washington is already betting big... and cutting contracts. The real winners? Not the robot brands... but the 3 little-known companies supplying the hardware, chips, and systems for every AI humanoid built. These plays could move before the first Houston robots even ship. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Fight Back Against Hollywoodâ€™sAgenda with Iggy and Mr. Kirk
body:
Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love.

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrbi82pfr2dcsa0auptumpnfqv0p664vno37ihoo_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clgm1ob2c9h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcch0klt9sa95l10r1s2ftda0s9tnm2871jn4to0_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clgm1ob2c9h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0epjiopa5u0mqd86ui056t0ejjaa7dsdqdql60g_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clgm1ob2c9h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zipas9bja9qia3mqb7nap4brs9usn5c8hduj3dog_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clgm1ob2c9h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi4ohgskn65nufsjr88uj0tkmsjqtcvl7andtuq0_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clgm1ob2c9h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfs1b1k7ioial6i2illcfib3k57ua0c82voojqgo_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clgm1ob2c9h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo9hm272clfgjcdkmu0ugqnptagen84dqmnm2v7g_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clgm1ob2c9h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1le7kk499gg796tisa631nr371oabgbl3p4n3og_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clgm1ob2c9h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

---

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Contacting you as a man without options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust
body:
This is the situation I’m caught in:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | | [View in browser](https://click.parlermailer.com/? "View in Browser")
---
_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._
---
| Rudy Giuliani This is the situation I’m caught in: | | Patriot,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are now cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A vengeful Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
---
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
---
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
---
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)
__
---
But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Patriot, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN this trial is patriots like _YOU_.
---
**That’s why I’ve officially filed a NEW _Defense_ _Trust_ in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me _more power_ to fight the Democrats' vindictive attempt to imprison me for LIFE.**
---
_And now, I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my new Defense Trust._
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Defense Trust to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Defense Trust
---

---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Fight Back Against Hollywoodâ€™sAgenda with Iggy and Mr. Kirk
body:
Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love.

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlu3l97agul987cc3tumabiplgt6dvb9l8rj88ig_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim4p74cth2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqdd2sheadjd7jv23s6893hg4qvdgtvcnvap13uo_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim4p74cth2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqqeb7hmt69omqohlnq86s4l3dkn4t3buin6ecfo_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim4p74cth2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6p2a4de5ke0o4u0j3dk5nhifi7cnnrrbbl49jf8_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim4p74cth2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2rk049rro5vgvdtqg8kv61l77v8egntugkomjo8_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim4p74cth2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zho3ok328c7bdfpqst49p4k21peh8jgp2c3uka0o_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim4p74cth2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsvstt947sph2u0r42ar4b6grmepif4enuvot1g8_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim4p74cth2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z43seo8nuslq6j3a0g8p4ce5rsocf7vv1i8i0aso_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim4p74cth2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue’s Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you’ve seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television. > Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of Iggy and Mr. Kirk! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special “Thank You” for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Help Us Go Back and Expose the Truth
body:
I'm writing to you from a secure location because a violent mob just attacked me and my team in Minneapolis. I need your help tonight. Here's what

| | [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlkbbsvfmvniichoa1ksgn73ohnmn0nlmi64f0h0_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim6pb6c1h2bs)
[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6f7k534q0onqqqbvgfsmnbu8m45k5unu56ras9o_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim6pb6c1h2bs) Dear Friend,

I'm writing to you from a secure location because a violent mob just attacked me and my team in Minneapolis.

**[**I need your help tonight.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0al4ghcqre0ecceoms5ou30bvarvqm54of80qp8_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim6pb6c1h2bs)**

Here's what happened:

My OMG team and I were on the ground covering a massive story – a shooting involving ICE agents that the mainstream media is desperate to bury. We had undercover reporters embedded deep inside the chaos.

Then hundreds of people surrounded our vehicle.

They hurled frozen ice bottles at our truck. The impacts cracked against the windows. Some hit us hard – even through the glass.

**They ripped at my bulletproof vest trying to drag me out.**

We fought our way through the crowd. We barely escaped.

But they weren't done.

**They followed us all the way back to our hotel.**

And then this text message came through to one of my team members:

_"We know you're in Minneapolis with O'Keefe and his crew of Nazis. White Ford, license plate from Florida. You have one hour to leave or you're dead."_

Friend, I need to go back to Minneapolis with a full security team. [**Will you help make that possible with an emergency gift right now?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq9g9qjarvq4hdmi5l7eb8juciojqpvurv3p30o0_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim6pb6c1h2bs)

**[**> >> DONATE NOW TO FUND THE MINNEAPOLIS INVESTIGATION <<<**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmbhlit5b200fmjj80hvdghl2dku4hqd746kv230_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim6pb6c1h2bs)**
My head of security is a former Marine. He's been to war zones. He's faced down cartels at the southern border.

**He told me Minneapolis was worse than anything he's ever seen.**

Let that sink in.

An American city. Worse than a war zone. Worse than the cartels.

This is what's happening in our country right now. And the media won't show you any of it.

But 7.4 million people have already seen my video on X. They know the truth. And they're hungry for more.

7.4 million Americans are counting on us to finish this investigation. [**Can I count on you to help fund it?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za34ii13r9ohni4vhjfui7f4il6cv69gm9opgsl8_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim6pb6c1h2bs)

**[**> >> YES, I'LL HELP FUND THE INVESTIGATION <<<**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztkhls7ksah7fn4k17901tqptgqh87tolfdm34fg_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim6pb6c1h2bs)**
Here's the problem:

**We still have undercover journalists in the field in Minneapolis right now.** Please pray for their safety.

And I need to go back out there.

Not alone this time. I need a **full professional security detail** to protect my team while we get the complete story.

This isn't cheap, friend. I'm going to be straight with you:

* $150** helps cover one day of fieldwork for an undercover journalist
* $500** helps fund critical security equipment and protective gear
* $1,000** pays for one security professional for a day
* $2,500** covers transportation and secure lodging for the team
* $5,000** funds a full day of protected investigation operations

Every single dollar you give tonight goes directly to getting my team back on the ground safely – so we can expose what's really happening in Minneapolis.

**[**> >> RUSH MY EMERGENCY DONATION NOW <<<**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmu12apk3gh6fu3p1m4gndjgbot0ks7nb18q6va8_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim6pb6c1h2bs)**
The mainstream media has abandoned the truth. They've chosen sides. They won't tell this story.

**Only OMG will.**

But I can't do it without you.

The video drops later this week. What you'll see will shock you. But it's only the beginning.

**[**> >> DONATE NOW TO FUND THE MINNEAPOLIS INVESTIGATION <<<**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi75na0lotp45qlcq2r2ddjvjopvo4ft7sc7n46o_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim6pb6c1h2bs)**
Will you stand with me right now?

Will you help us go back into that war zone – protected this time – and bring the FULL truth to the American people?

**[**Please give your most generous gift right now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhtn83v4f02sp0dfc1gh638m2qh865gtn5otkt7o_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim6pb6c1h2bs)** – $150, $500, $1,000, or whatever you can – to fund this critical investigation.

This story is too important to abandon. The threats are too serious to ignore. And the truth is too explosive to stay buried.

Help me finish what we started.

**[**> >> YES – I'LL HELP JAMES GO BACK TO MINNEAPOLIS <<<**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcaa5p2885fhsjhukfv2a4vhpto7doa6u71li6a0_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim6pb6c1h2bs)**
In Truth,
James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

**P.S.** – They gave us one hour to leave Minneapolis or die. We left. But we're going back – with security, with cameras, and with the truth. **[**Your donation tonight makes that possible**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs9bupsdknmpj22ef33mglekhi5ls4aofrh7v8h8_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim6pb6c1h2bs).** Please give now before it's too late.

**[**> >> RUSH MY EMERGENCY DONATION NOW <<<**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq9j9u31o5ur2tltqkhkmv6lsg6v7sv2tsleh21o_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim6pb6c1h2bs)**

---
[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zih61dmjeputdv3285midel19gk12a5dras3615o_rp22sh2s8i6epr0clim6pb6c1h2bs)

I never thought I'd have to defend our democracy from a violent mob inside the Capitol building.
I joined the Capitol Police 16 years ago because I wanted to serve and protect the place where our democracy happens. I swore an oath to protect the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic.
I could have never expected that oath would lead me to fight Donald Trump's insurrectionists on January 6th, 2021.
For hours, I was immersed in a profane mix of sweat, screams, shrieks, anger, death, fear, blood, broken limbs, spit, hatred, horror, racism, and bigotry as Trump's violent mob attacked my fellow officers and tried to overturn a free and fair election.
Donald Trump did NOTHING to stop them. For three hours, he watched on TV while we were beaten bloody.
But I had confidence that I could stand strong. I knew that this is America, and here, we stand for what's right.
[If you're ready to be on the right side of history, join me and Colorado Draws the Line in our fight against Trump today. Chip in anything you can. Every dollar will help take down his House Majority, and together, we can defend our democracy:](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FszSNdg0o4uwnPnTDhL3jgNVq3tl8p6NgSrUgn5r-EsG_x_2GvoxJhvlx9iLy5L8gottMIR0jAWJY-UzDfM9is8xVw2LNjKbGGb6uLl-GFexGG1_vS9kI9d_Q9Svh3rN0i9VDrVtmFvXNIn7JkxL0RxVHFdmNB9jHoiGPNhZ4d7ca6zwMP3vTsJdw0D7dPnS7XXY_dbTIW4vKDDZ79Op1AWg9hk7KRrF&c=uARfq06jvSIg0CZhjqzcCmAHAIIY8sDonUinhNglfdEMwzFBKrwaRw==&ch=Z17ETsNjEquPgZ7zcVqU6yJG-1AjYjpnqHXqiGRTozOEJ5WtT0apgg==)

| A lot has happened since that day in 2021.
I testified before Congress about what really happened. I spoke truth to power while some of the same people I protected tried to rewrite history and pretend it was just a "normal tourist visit."
I've endured relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA supporters. They've called me every name in the book. They've threatened my family. They've threatened me.
But I still believe that we must stand up for what's right.
Now, Donald Trump is back in the White House with unchecked power.
His ICE agents are terrorizing communities with masks and military weapons -- just like his insurrectionists did on January 6th. The only difference is that now they're being paid with your tax dollars.
His MAGA enablers in Congress are letting him treat the Constitution like it's optional. They're ignoring subpoenas. They're refusing oversight. They're acting like Trump is a king instead of a president.
And I'm not going to sit back and let it happen.
That's why I'm running for Congress, Peter.
Because my oath to protect and defend the Constitution didn't end on January 6th. It will never end.
Our country has lived through challenging periods before. We've overcome, persevered, and moved toward a more perfect union. We're in the middle of another fight for our country right now.
I still have faith that good can prevail over evil and that we can overcome these hard times. What is right still matters here... but only if we make it matter.
I'm ready to continue this fight in Congress. I know Trump and his MAGA machine inside and out. I've faced them before. I stood strong when it mattered most.
[But I need you to stand with me now. If you're fired up to take down Trump's House Majority and hold him accountable, it would be an honor to have your support as a Founding Donor. I’ve never backed down from a fight in my life, and I’m not starting now.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmbW9uZXlfcGxlZGdlPXRydWUmbW9uZXlwbGVkZ2U9dHJ1ZSZhbW91bnQ9NDUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjYwMjA4X0EzLVFELjExMDExN190MTgxNDM4MC0yODk5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI2MDIwOF9BMy1RRC4xMTAxMTdfdDE4MTQzODAtMjg5OSJ9/2PWmRpA7YctwAziapg0_8A)I’m going to be blunt because I don't have time to play politics, Peter.
When I was flying rescue missions in the Air Force, I learned that you don't wait for permission to do what's right. You execute the mission.
Right now, my mission is to protect the House Majority from the radical policies that are trying to dismantle the American Dream. I’m fighting every day to keep our border secure, energy costs low, and combat Leftist extremism on every front.

name: Doug Lloyd for MI Attorney General
subject: ICYMI: Stop Politicizing Law Enforcement
body:
Michigan Needs a Prosecutor, Not an Activist
| | |
---
| | [](https://jrhsf9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UBjz2HNy2GZuuYWSl0iy59bEWw49-_aHkbYj7jVCcfh59wJZClxoTooABa0yl8Fv8aGs1OYmyyGaHFVi2ORVG-KKSuHS4-7mfbfnXfc-Z0MCWNEDqtQK06641RQGTfsNaXefizAU3tqx7slmmZTJd07AZ4-X9dHTYJ0T9S7SCPo=&c=ro4Y7V1wv0YMbD-QBXswaRfqUzl6M0RQZ-pElNMSUTvfJF_am2SVQg==&ch=4URQj7SpTJVaPHivXUXf5riN_cdpxniO-22SMbIJ7FwpnUS3dH_4CA==)

| | | [](https://jrhsf9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UBjz2HNy2GZuuYWSl0iy59bEWw49-_aHkbYj7jVCcfh59wJZClxoTooABa0yl8Fv8aGs1OYmyyGaHFVi2ORVG-KKSuHS4-7mfbfnXfc-Z0MCWNEDqtQK06641RQGTfsNaXefizAU3tqx7slmmZTJd1uuoUtmq-Z5Ie1od0MdIOk=&c=ro4Y7V1wv0YMbD-QBXswaRfqUzl6M0RQZ-pElNMSUTvfJF_am2SVQg==&ch=4URQj7SpTJVaPHivXUXf5riN_cdpxniO-22SMbIJ7FwpnUS3dH_4CA==)
---
| | Friends,
As Michigan Republicans prepare to select our nominee for Attorney General, it is critical that we look closely at how the current Attorney General is using the power and resources of that office.
[Attorney General Dana Nessel has announced the launch of a so called "Federal Action Tracker,"](https://jrhsf9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UBjz2HNy2GZuuYWSl0iy59bEWw49-_aHkbYj7jVCcfh59wJZClxoTtkPNxc0BwIbt9zQjpAUDe6e0vfGCFWTlJkgLZrvemMKUzlZ11Muh4ut7nETWDpyydg1yap5unbfJYajdxBRptAHcPGX9mPijf3NB6Xt1YmocZHHiXcf3bxDVsWHzgTU3evESn6kg7Tcak2eIoWf1w8eT4SY0HzZB-qMvCZQPN0tcG3wvV9iINkv_A9wS3gPmceI7wYTvl7gJC0pFdX-DlGqu0-KiPOAtYAEHe0W8-n82WF5-USQTYJtt1m4oula3g==&c=ro4Y7V1wv0YMbD-QBXswaRfqUzl6M0RQZ-pElNMSUTvfJF_am2SVQg==&ch=4URQj7SpTJVaPHivXUXf5riN_cdpxniO-22SMbIJ7FwpnUS3dH_4CA==) publicly branded as the "Nessel ICE Tracker." This initiative encourages the public to report lawful federal immigration enforcement activity to the Attorney General's office and frames federal law enforcement as a threat to Michigan residents.
As Eaton County Prosecutor and a career prosecutor with decades of experience working alongside local, state, and federal law enforcement, I find this deeply troubling.
Michigan's Attorney General should be defending the rule of law, not politicizing it. The use of state resources to monitor lawful federal enforcement, collect unverified and anonymous submissions, and publicly single out ICE sends a dangerous message. It undermines cooperation between law enforcement agencies and invites interference with officers who are doing their jobs under federal law.
Even more concerning is what this initiative ignores. There is no mechanism to report or deter organized efforts to obstruct federal law enforcement. There is no acknowledgement that today's enforcement actions are the result of failed Biden Harris border policies that left federal agents to clean up the consequences.
Republicans believe in law and order. We believe in accountability. We believe that public safety comes before political theater.
Branding this program as an "ICE Tracker" is not about oversight. It is about activism. Encouraging citizens to monitor and judge federal operations increases the risk of confrontation, endangers officers and the public, and erodes trust between agencies that must work together to keep our communities safe.
Michigan deserves an Attorney General who will restore professionalism, judgment, and respect for the rule of law to the office.
As Republicans, and as delegates entrusted with choosing our nominee, we face a clear choice. We can continue down a path of political stunts and ideological activism, or we can nominate a proven prosecutor who will defend the law without fear or favor.
I am asking for your support as we bring responsible leadership back to the Attorney General's office.
Sincerely,
Doug Lloyd Eaton County Prosecuting Attorney Candidate for Michigan Attorney General

clean_body: Michigan Needs a Prosecutor, Not an Activist | | | | | == | | | == | | Friends, As Michigan Republicans prepare to select our nominee for Attorney General, it is critical that we look closely at how the current Attorney General is using the power and resources of that office. == publicly branded as the "Nessel ICE Tracker." This initiative encourages the public to report lawful federal immigration enforcement activity to the Attorney General's office and frames federal law enforcement as a threat to Michigan residents. As Eaton County Prosecutor and a career prosecutor with decades of experience working alongside local, state, and federal law enforcement, I find this deeply troubling. Michigan's Attorney General should be defending the rule of law, not politicizing it. The use of state resources to monitor lawful federal enforcement, collect unverified and anonymous submissions, and publicly single out ICE sends a dangerous message. It undermines cooperation between law enforcement agencies and invites interference with officers who are doing their jobs under federal law. Even more concerning is what this initiative ignores. There is no mechanism to report or deter organized efforts to obstruct federal law enforcement. There is no acknowledgement that today's enforcement actions are the result of failed Biden Harris border policies that left federal agents to clean up the consequences. Republicans believe in law and order. We believe in accountability. We believe that public safety comes before political theater. Branding this program as an "ICE Tracker" is not about oversight. It is about activism. Encouraging citizens to monitor and judge federal operations increases the risk of confrontation, endangers officers and the public, and erodes trust between agencies that must work together to keep our communities safe. Michigan deserves an Attorney General who will restore professionalism, judgment, and respect for the rule of law to the office. As Republicans, and as delegates entrusted with choosing our nominee, we face a clear choice. We can continue down a path of political stunts and ideological activism, or we can nominate a proven prosecutor who will defend the law without fear or favor. I am asking for your support as we bring responsible leadership back to the Attorney General's office. Sincerely, Doug Lloyd Eaton County Prosecuting Attorney Candidate for Michigan Attorney General 👉 == | | | | | == == == == == == == == == == == == == * | | | | == == == == | | | | | == | | | | Doug Lloyd for MI Attorney General | PO Box, 80536 | Lansing, MI 48906 US | | | | | | | |

If she doesn’t care when powerful people abuse children, what does she actually care about?
| | | | Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat taking on Lauren Boebert in Colorado's 4th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Trisha. | Peter,
Last week, I called into a conservative morning talk radio show where Lauren Boebert was on air bragging about her "honesty" and claiming she doesn't pretend to vote one way and do another.
So I confronted her. Live.
I pointed out that she refuses to show up in our district for a real, face-to-face town hall and that she said she "doesn't give a rip about Epstein." So I asked the simplest question of all: if she doesn't care when powerful people abuse children, what does she actually care about?
She dodged. And she exposed who she really is. Because Boebert's record doesn't match her rhetoric. Not even close:

* She claims her tele-town halls are transparent, yet her most recent Oct. 15 event was never released to the public.

* She takes credit for infrastructure projects after voting against their funding.

* She couldn't get enough support from her own R colleagues to override her favorite president's veto of the critical Arkansas Valley Conduit for clean drinking water.

* She goes on the radio claiming she supports rural hospitals--after voting to put their funding at risk.

Lauren Boebert thinks us voters are stupid. She repeatedly adds earmarks to funding bills that she herself votes against. Then she turns around and campaigns like she delivered results after she voted to kill them. Over and over again.
On air, she accused others of pretending. She's telling on herself. She is the one pretending to be good at her job. And she's hoping no one will notice.
The worst part about her response was what she failed to say. When I asked what she actually cares about, Lauren Boebert didn't even mention the hardworking people of CO-4. Not the families in Douglas. Not the farmers in Morgan or Weld Counties. Not the patients in the rural hospitals in Cheyenne Wells, Lamar, or Hugo. Maybe if she were not a carpetbagger and actually from here, she would care about our communities.
That's why I'm running--and why I need your help. Taking on a serial liar like Lauren Boebert who is backed by MAGA billionaire cash isn't easy. But I am a hometown fighter with a backbone and moments like yesterday prove that when we confront her with facts, she crumbles.
[If you're ready to end Boebert's extremist politics and blatant lying once and for all, I'm asking you to chip in right now. Please ](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SfdZ4w1KmqA0w5DFyIewMZfVAIRPfethH0RIW3L8dWXsNwPMJTtsFzftH1RgUiBZNQBhIifMscLr_s33AXadPgyOZUlcWoI798oMZ67yJ9HJPFIwKBHe3_-7B1eCnxWpJlu00FwQc5lyb5XaEXIw64sKxnL2JwbtDVBSM5l36CI2rpOLib_11weaX1jpUpNYQdEOdrjzV6OQVnkU_Sw-X0EN_frTdrr6Vt-hDncA0ZKRaV1BZ7TR3w==&c=WSr0pKxtLTNvNK7R9WXHn4qd2TtaFOv4s5TknMdyOOb1qUr_IUNJWA==&ch=9w85ZsUwOFR3p6zNNhwyVeQZeS6uO3-CDGQos-zeq777puI9yCRsFA==)Peter,[ can I count on you to chip in $25, $10, or whatever you can give right now to help me defeat Boebert?](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SfdZ4w1KmqA0w5DFyIewMZfVAIRPfethH0RIW3L8dWXsNwPMJTtsFzftH1RgUiBZNQBhIifMscLr_s33AXadPgyOZUlcWoI798oMZ67yJ9HJPFIwKBHe3_-7B1eCnxWpJlu00FwQc5lyb5XaEXIw64sKxnL2JwbtDVBSM5l36CI2rpOLib_11weaX1jpUpNYQdEOdrjzV6OQVnkU_Sw-X0EN_frTdrr6VuHiJbFOp6SM1PdCuCQIHw==&c=WSr0pKxtLTNvNK7R9WXHn4qd2TtaFOv4s5TknMdyOOb1qUr_IUNJWA==&ch=9w85ZsUwOFR3p6zNNhwyVeQZeS6uO3-CDGQos-zeq777puI9yCRsFA==)

# Sunday, February 8, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1971, the Nasdaq market began operation as the first automated securities exchange in the world. "Automated" in that era meant updating stock quotes on early computer terminals instead of ticker tape. ([See Photos](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFy6yAURL8GdWguV0iggsKNOr_2lRokriwSBA4Qa5yvzzj5hLS7M7tzzv_rfLU--Hj7Zw8ydUtzpLMEqpXyvFC87fbLl89yp7XanKlUcplmBBw4IAc9O-vDc5aNMxsRUteQEUpBL7XGsdmNXRZQvbKdk3pZ1dLLAUCM_QrjSGKQjTevNUDQQoAC1UrXaadx7GXnBBIxCeR8Tbl9Sz7WnbbwTA_K7ZqOJpi91nth3YXhxHA6z7ONtjj78aoZTjZXvwYqDKffnGHfXXgP_Ek2F542ftj8TpX7GNPDVp8iR0Dx4hOiycbdTx-CL4NiEm6H9eHnuf5J18PgdwAAAP__dyR9JQ)) Over the weekend, we gathered our team to connect, celebrate, and reflect on how we can improve in 2026. On behalf of our entire staff, thank you for reading our email editions, watching our podcast episodes, and sharing us with your friends and family. I'm thankful for you, and I've never been more excited about _The Flyover_! - Cole, CEO You've probably heard of [_The Pour Over_](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO8yAUhE-Du1j4gTEpKH4pSpe_3RIR82wTYbDgOVH29KtEkfYA286MPs3M18VeXIghzf_dioambBM-akQiLPaKaV7cd6h73XAkVwpWQl_QAgd14HDg2noX4tPKxpsJEVA0aLph4L3UGo7NYtwwqFFor5TqRX-F8dpr6SYFo-w71XVNMC8aB667jg98aKUX2ms49lL4DhCZ5OgD5dLecki04BSf-Y6lHfPaRLMQbZWJfwzODM41zGnfFizY0oJb3ss7msvMxHmn1da8lxGZOH0oDNRLXtGHfWXi9Lv_44xu3VyYExOnSo7Q3lwSvCnGb48QY6hqYJLPqwvx3Yj-dOPdwE8AAAD__6M4iXE), and for good reason. Over 1.5 million Christians trust it for news without the partisan noise. We read it too, and it's one of the best sources for believers who want news without the spin.

## Benghazi Terror Suspect Arrested, Brought to U.S.
A suspect in the 2012 terrorist [attack on the U.S. Embassy](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0M1u6yAQBeCnwTssGPwDCxZXurJ0F7nbLi0ME5uUQISnidKnr1w1T9D1jI7Od95O88nFFPP6313R0rnMGR97QiKs84J53dxn3D_2G3pyteJOGCrOIGDgArjQc3AxPeeuCfaMCKgatHIcRd9pDabZ7LCYHn3vMRg3CAPLCAYBBq0VyOB9E-2RJkBoKcUoxrYLSgcNpu9UkIDIOoEhUqntpcRMG57Ts9yxtr5cm2Q3otvO1B8GE4PJLf4QtGs5zgymf5mwZkexZJcYTD8YDkICfwm5I3L-nb-IPJTL8UulPpmaYmDqrwRjpDbGNNWG2yOmFPdhZJ1Yry6m7zL0qwXvFr4CAAD__9yDhLQ) in Benghazi has been arrested and returned to the United States, Attorney General Pam Bondi announced on Friday. Zubayar Al-Bakoush faces an eight-count indictment that includes charges for the killings of Ambassador Chris Stevens and three other Americans. He is accused of joining a mob that crashed the front gates of the diplomatic mission with rifles and explosives, [setting off hours of violence](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL9uwyAYxJ_G3hx9_kwMHhi6ZEvXjhaGIybCfwQkUfr0lSv1CTqeTjrd7_d1Ha8mxLDePs0CXfw2rnjliFKQxgnrbTbfIT_yDltMSsgFLmFk4r4hbkiNzoT4HkXttAcYXQ3dSklnoRQP9az94FsFtD07z0KwZ2m7aWDlLGQ_dXXQxxoxqbYlSfIkXKec4uEsOtcyUAmCC2VLp_sW1jLDx_f2RDrZbamjnkvZc9V9VHyp-GL2A-CojpBKsBEVX_wUmj-c5v7IJVg0DrtJZcFaGkMwzhKBWqiB0bvJKJbWeuMmA6qTdvsrxBhyLytBt8WE-Hug_MvaU_NPAAAA__89S4GX) that also included deadly fires. The attack [became a political flashpoint](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL8GMiO7YcAEDi4hm0svRD66DT0yNrI9w819_Ypd7RdsXKWnevXnPt8tew7rb7uTKS7Ogc7sqRRK818K62b_c37mg5ZiU6JcCBPNIKEXEoTUM1r277mr0TgioLYmo4ZB3jqtYaw3o1Tbjb1EHHuNWlk3di2qFlAi9nRTNZuLJkFqpeQgh6bDVqOG8XYVgajqJCGXmJpH5FA2cv4dX5SaJe61N1spR67aXxVMFUzneTYu_rssrryCKR4cOIYKpm8f8WUikDy_KGXhY1jFhcQnicczF15IJNo5YBZ2p8SLFc6yJxTOek-hTgaPk73n3A9VJ9fdsv8cVH704svARwAAAP__Z4OJ2Q), for Republicans. They challenged then-President Barack Obama and Secretary of State Hillary Clinton over facility security, the military response to the violence, and the Democrat administration's evolving account of the attack.
## SBA Suspends 111,000 California Borrowers
The federal Small Business Administration [suspended more than 111,000 California borrowers](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyhSAURL9GOxy8ImpBkcbupU3poFz0ZhAcwGdevj5jJn-QemfP7NmPx_TQ5Miv73pHlW2YPF7JYc4Ypxn9uulvSmc6cMk6RkwZTcQJOEjGgfF-MprcaxKlURYRsClR1V3HW9H3MJSbasUCthYSlwFADtJyYY3hFrQ0c4uyJHXTOPC-rnnHu0qYpjc9DK1oTA2IheBoKIdYfQbyeUPrXuGJsVrCXjq15XykonkrYCxgvK6rsuHrtrjzAsYjOMq0pALGHM_9YNrs5NnplxuSWMp6XTGSX1nPJJvJOQqe_UmjYYt2ZEP0pFnatXNsPhN5TInZqE9TRmWO624l2RWCr7sm97st_-vQp4KfAAAA__8Py452) after uncovering $8.6 billion in suspected fraudulent activity linked to the COVID pandemic, according to SBA Administrator Kelly Loeffler. They are [accused of collecting money](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykUTuO3DoQPA2VccBpSqIUKFhgnrJ9qUOhRbZGNPgR-Nnx-PQGjb2BE6JQbFRXVf_43D7ROhue_6OnpRxxC_TKjkqhtO0Unif-trnmi3TBlCgXMok2EDByAVxMm0Hr3lvfmeUgApIdLXelxNBPE8zduShSBw4zoFQDDAj9MB5mxB32WYCcsbNLUxMgpvtdKKFuvZGTmWAeemnuQMR6QcaWmG4_ow3lpMO94xelm46-c8tZypWZ_GCwMljD-4q5tC8GaxNmsApoT0M185aPwZo9Osf3mm2gnDkabwOvQTfhzCc-8t06Z2PgNvAjYTUNaGxb5FqL3wolz-Tjo5Z4EBkGY2M1-gvtMzD50NisfPOejK1tPkdt0X2zOdakiclHedlWOQP5nz7jHn8x-Wg1ymkclOrSYq5X85NHxXrx9Gjd3_jln272tcCfAAAA__94A6pm) under the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) and the Economic Injury Disaster Loan (EIDL) program from the federal government that were supposed to ease the economic burden from COVID. Loeffler said, _" Once again, the Trump SBA is taking decisive action to deliver accountability in a state whose unaccountable welfare policies have created a culture of fraud and abuse at the expense of law-abiding taxpayers and small business owners."_ The SBA moves follow [recent action in Minnesota](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOnjAQhJ_GdEb2YsB_4SIN3aVNiRa8wEbGRrbvR5enjzjlDdKsVhppZr759TF_IAeO-088ydUtzZHuEqhWyvNCcT_wD5fPctFaMWcqlXymGRQMUoFUdvbI4Ws2jXcbEVDXkNPjqHpjLbyaw3V2QKNGi4Pt_Itw6w2ZXr-0WXsDdmnYPW4KlNVajWpsje-st_DqTec1EAmjyHNNuf2dONaDtvCV3pTbNZ1NcEetVxHdDwGTgOm-77Ys2O7pLWDCXHkNJGB6MgRMCp7zfGVB-Q0WfZFa6wGUXDHwlnJklEvKOd2Ui_xHT16u6Ty5Vo67tINcOAROUV4YPZ28Ssoot4yfvsnOX_cjl2EURu0ncvhuW_9r4reDvwEAAP__OUSP5g), where the agency suspended 6,900 borrowers with potentially fraudulent PPP and EIDL loans worth approximately $400 million.
## Super Bowl Sunday Has Arrived
