**Whatever happened to hitchhiking?** Hitchhiking in old photos carries an unmistakable sense of nostalgia: a kid on the shoulder of a highway, thumb out, a cardboard sign reading _West_ , a throwback to a simpler, more innocent time. For much of the 20th century, that little gesture served as a kind of informal transportation system--part necessity, part romance, part social contract. That era is long gone now, having reached its peak during the 1960s and 70s. But it actually began as soon as cars were common enough that spare seats existed. The word "hitchhike" began circulating in the 1920s, and by the 1930s--thanks to the Great Depression--the practice had gone mainstream. Money was tight, people were on the move looking for work, and a ride offered to a stranger could feel less like risk and more like mutual aid. During World War II, it even gained a patriotic sheen: soldiers traveled, fuel was rationed, and sharing the road looked like doing your part. Then the meaning changed. In the 1960s and early 1970s, hitchhiking became less about hardship and more about freedom--"thumb tripping" as a countercultural rite, a cheap ticket to protests, communes, concerts, and the general promise that America was one long open road. It's hard to imagine now, but for a while, the roadside stranger could plausibly register as a friend you just hadn't met yet. And then the end came. More people owned cars, highways got faster and more controlled-access, and standing on a shoulder became both harder and, in many places, illegal. Meanwhile, the culture flipped from "we're in this together" to "don't talk to strangers." Law enforcement campaigns and sensational stories about violent outliers turned the hitchhiker into a potential outlaw from a cautionary poster. Today, the need is smaller, the infrastructure is hostile, and trust has been replaced by apps. Today, if you're going to ride with a stranger, you want a profile photo, a license plate, and a payment receipt. _Did you ever hitchhike or pick up hitchhikers? Let us know your thoughts by replying to this email._

They are under the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) and the Economic Injury Disaster Loan (EIDL) program from the federal government that were supposed to ease the economic burden from COVID. Loeffler said, " Once again, the Trump SBA is taking decisive action to deliver accountability in a state whose unaccountable welfare policies have created a culture of fraud and abuse at the expense of law-abiding taxpayers and small business owners." The SBA moves follow , where the agency suspended 6,900 borrowers with potentially fraudulent PPP and EIDL loans worth approximately $400 million. Super Bowl Sunday Has Arrived The Seattle Seahawks meet the New England Patriots TV's biggest viewing day of the year, and a national bonanza for companies that make pizza, wings, and TV commercials. Today's big game is a rematch of Super Bowl XLIX, which ended with New England famously to seal the game 11 years ago. This year, the Seahawks are favored by 4.5 points, with a record $1.75 billion expected to be wagered on the game. The Patriots' potent offense is led by 23-year-old quarterback Drake Maye, to a young Tom Brady, who was 24 when he started his first Super Bowl in 2002. Meanwhile, Seattle arrives with the league's stingiest defense: they've allowed the fewest points in the league (17.2 per game). Another difference between 2015 and 2026 will be the halftime show, which will be headlined by Latin music icon Bad Bunny instead of Katy Perry. A 2023 study shows reverses aging in 4 weeks--but 64% of products contain arsenic, 37% have lead. Popular brands face contamination recalls. Top doctor reveals 5 essential warnings to find pure, effective collagen that delivers results. () | Whatever happened to hitchhiking? Hitchhiking in old photos carries an unmistakable sense of nostalgia: a kid on the shoulder of a highway, thumb out, a cardboard sign reading West , a throwback to a simpler, more innocent time. For much of the 20th century, that little gesture served as a kind of informal transportation system--part necessity, part romance, part social contract. That era is long gone now, having reached its peak during the 1960s and 70s. But it actually began as soon as cars were common enough that spare seats existed. The word "hitchhike" began circulating in the 1920s, and by the 1930s--thanks to the Great Depression--the practice had gone mainstream. Money was tight, people were on the move looking for work, and a ride offered to a stranger could feel less like risk and more like mutual aid. During World War II, it even gained a patriotic sheen: soldiers traveled, fuel was rationed, and sharing the road looked like doing your part. Then the meaning changed. In the 1960s and early 1970s, hitchhiking became less about hardship and more about freedom--"thumb tripping" as a countercultural rite, a cheap ticket to protests, communes, concerts, and the general promise that America was one long open road. It's hard to imagine now, but for a while, the roadside stranger could plausibly register as a friend you just hadn't met yet. And then the end came. More people owned cars, highways got faster and more controlled-access, and standing on a shoulder became both harder and, in many places, illegal. Meanwhile, the culture flipped from "we're in this together" to "don't talk to strangers." Law enforcement campaigns and sensational stories about violent outliers turned the hitchhiker into a potential outlaw from a cautionary poster. Today, the need is smaller, the infrastructure is hostile, and trust has been replaced by apps. Today, if you're going to ride with a stranger, you want a profile photo, a license plate, and a payment receipt. Did you ever hitchhike or pick up hitchhikers? | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | NASA deployed | Powered by AI chips from a company you’ve probably never heard of. **Good morning!** On this day in 1887, former town marshal [Timothy Isaiah "Longhair Jim" Courtright](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOqzAQAL_GdCDbEOwULl5Dl9deiRa84NUZO7I3Ifn7U-4Xrh_NSPN1m29AkdL-Hw50_NrynPCsEZmxzHd4cU71gRUS0wZ1pcp7yY9ZSz22UrfSzh4ovueh8W6R_qoadMoYebloaVUTnEYzXtCOo7d9byQs1qpF-Q1hNdKAash9ZPKDa6nUtVugv6LRfhxhVf1gxSDRE-fScUDGF9QtvvMTS7fmo4kuMN-r6P8JPQk9nefZcQ2QU6SEXS670FOA5Jecv4WeMHEhrEJPa34ULrQHbpmOzOHdUgWC0BTn7yfFSHU0YpD7ARR_Y_y3RU-nfwIAAP__UEF9rw) was killed in Fort Worth by his friend Luke Short in what became one of the most famous shootouts in the Wild West. The motive for the gunfight was never definitively determined, though Courtright and Short competed for control of gambling interests in the frontier town. Over the weekend, we gathered our team to connect, celebrate, and reflect on how we can improve in 2026. On behalf of our entire staff, thank you for reading our email editions, watching our podcast episodes, and sharing us with your friends and family. ## AG Paxton Probes Antifa-Linked Group
Attorney General Ken Paxton filed suit against the Houston-area Screwston Anti-Fascist Committee, alleging the nonprofit aided terrorist activity and**** engaged in doxing. The legal action came as a result of the [group posting personal information](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2upDAMRp8mdKDE4ScUKVZapbvbbokM8UC0gaAkDDNvv8rOvsFtLBef7ePz-2v6Qufdsf7CnXR-PcJ00J085UxxOvGVw5EuSnhk98C0uJTXGK4JOPQ1h5qryaLz76mtrJ65HUVFWgwD7zrgSlSbbm2_CGtHkIoIW9UrHGDmgyTBFXaycros4yUOXIixmVGONIDte1yEbBVrOVmXQ2zyRplemB7-HZ4UmyXslddbzmdi8gcDw8Dc991s4Uo5HOc1e7fsZB02Ia4MDMbsFk-JgSlvMjD_owxMoWBgOJRSuq4FxRUD84eO-qOiTkukuwzUHyPlpjS4n0z-FFXU9ryd9y71A2v5uqPz_yDz99Q-NfwNAAD__wqPjHY) of alleged neo-Nazis and members of other far-right organizations online. The investigation seeks to find Screwston's involvement in unlawful activity. [Alleged members](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO4yAQBuCnsTsswI6JC4pr3OXaK60JDBiFQASTOLmnXznZfYLtpvg0-v__32k5QYgh-b9wRU1Pl5eEW41IhGW5wZNyqneskCg4qCZU8iXfF8nlyLhk_LhYCPG1DK3VZ24n0aIWSvHDQfKjaFc9WoNqgt44awan-kkBGGEMOK4OToo26P0Z37nkQkzdGfoJlbTjCEb0w7EZONpAuXS0IuETqouv_MDSmXxto16JbrXp_zRybuS8bVv3RkCUS8KXx4QFYufzo5Hz3q6Rc8GIUHE_fxz7huyCiX2aM4ILVhbRQ2RgKOTEwENIldia73UnZ6ho2WcflouHFP7DW2Ly4NG2RdvbFmIMdVTNwP0VQnxHp98N_tDyKwAA__9B4py_) of Screwston were also involved in an armed assault on an ICE facility in Alvarado. The group also sells merchandise promoting violence against ICE agents. As part of the investigation, Paxton has issued request to examine the left-wing group, a legal demand that is used to explore the scope of legal violations.
## MLB Spring Training Begins This Week
The 2026 MLB season officially begins this week as pitchers and catchers report to camps, marking the start of preparations for Opening Day across the league. [Houston Astros](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUD3OozAQPY3pjOwBDBQutqHLtluiIR6ItcZG9iQkt1-RYi_wdTN6T-_vz22-oQ8-br9xJ8vvNc2RzhKImfJ84JtTLE8qGNmvWO6-8JbTcwYFRiqQapgd-vCZ28rZRblRV2R136uuAzXo6mEbGroe2sU5s3adht4tZFYYTUtoUGPl7SWmLjoorcd6wWakHpwxeNdNO4hWkfOccs0PYnpjWcMnvSjX97RXwT6YjyKaXwImAdN5nvUelgsTMGHhnIqA6Wr1_5ff-OXIPm6SM_p4HX_pIx0yFRlxpyJ9XFOVrTtOH4Ivphet2nb04evLP1vrZeFfAAAA__89hYB_) pitchers and catchers will begin workouts this Wednesday at their West Palm Beach training facility. The first full-team workout begins February 16. The workouts are free and open to fans. Fans can get their first glimpses of international signee Tatsuya Imai. Texas Rangers [pitchers and catchers](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ_GdEbGARwKF39Dl7-9Eq3xAisZG9mbkLz9idO9wdXzaTTzfT2mB1CguP6HHS2_lzRFPEtAZszTAW9OsTyxQGRaoMxUeM3pOWmle6m0VPfJA4XP1FbeOuWHpkLbGKO6Tqt7U23WGdMacB4H3_Su69Sg1Wxg6NxiepyhInuVqQvXqmmG2sFtQKN938Pc3Nq7aBV64pRr3pDxDWUJn_TCXM9pr4LdmI8ibv-EHoUez_OsC12R0OMenNBjhrhiLkKPKRYSerwuCj3ylhEl7UfKDJHlLyePVIgpRemAOWCRnOQJPG-yHJniKjkDRYprla0_TgqBSm9Eq9YdKPys4r-5fFn9HQAA__-0oYzJ) report next Tuesday at their facility in Surprise, Arizona. The team will look to find a full-time closer and to fill the fifth spot in its rotation, with initial competition coming between Jacob Latz and Kumar Rocker. Notably absent from Astros camp will be pitcher Framber Valdez, who recently signed with the Detroit Tigers.

On this day in 1887, former town marshal was killed in Fort Worth by his friend Luke Short in what became one of the most famous shootouts in the Wild West. The motive for the gunfight was never definitively determined, though Courtright and Short competed for control of gambling interests in the frontier town. Over the weekend, we gathered our team to connect, celebrate, and reflect on how we can improve in 2026. On behalf of our entire staff, thank you for reading our email editions, watching our podcast episodes, and sharing us with your friends and family. name: The PreBorn! Team
subject: Before fear makes the decision
body:
Right now, women facing unplanned pregnancies are being told to decide quickly.

| | | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJykkUuO2zAMhk9D7xLIlGJnFlpMa7gt0ClmNV0atEQ7Qq0HJMW9fuEiOcHsSP4_Pr5-v01v5DYX1l_kWZvdTblMMy8x88KUPf3hUm9s2bji4oQCu5PAk7gevhBT5jnmMGFjtbGdxIZ12_ficsFWdc1NU39trZz73rbSsqV2XpRUaBQaK5b2pXH6YAoU1xYFojqrZWGeeTb40l9sT6DEPVmqXM4mhsJ5p-p2diHEI4rhbKJvNn2rNRWQr4Aj4Li6nc-P6Q4D4PjIAEdKiWkrIMdiQA7fx58Csfv2_gWwI19BDngF7NYCcqAA2N2rn0q8Z8Mgh5RjSWyqC-tD8mzd3YMc2JPbHkVDPpFbA8jhxpRrUZtb-CnGUDkcnT7k9P56-vrx4_S8Q5O1TX_dtrnS9aDEekD_L1k_86Bd478AAAD__6dno7k)
---
Advocate for Life, This is not the moment to drift. This is the moment to act. Right now, women facing unplanned pregnancies are being told to decide quickly. They're being assured that abortion is the fastest way to make fear, pressure, and uncertainty go away. In too many cases, that decision is pushed through before a mother has had the chance to see her baby or hear the heartbeat--something abortion providers will never show her. Once that moment passes, it cannot be undone. That is why PreBorn! exists: to step into that narrow window of time with compassion, truth, and hope. When a mother comes to one of our PreBorn! Network Clinics, she is met with compassion instead of pressure. She is offered a free ultrasound and given the chance to see the life growing inside her and hear the heartbeat that changes everything. That moment interrupts the rush of panic and allows truth to break through fear. [**And more than 80% of the time, when a mother sees her baby and hears their heartbeat, she chooses life.**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJykkUuO2zAMhk9D7xLIlGJnFlpMa7gt0ClmNV0atEQ7Qq0HJMW9fuEiOcHsSP4_Pr5-v01v5DYX1l_kWZvdTblMMy8x88KUPf3hUm9s2bji4oQCu5PAk7gevhBT5jnmMGFjtbGdxIZ12_ficsFWdc1NU39trZz73rbSsqV2XpRUaBQaK5b2pXH6YAoU1xYFojqrZWGeeTb40l9sT6DEPVmqXM4mhsJ5p-p2diHEI4rhbKJvNn2rNRWQr4Aj4Li6nc-P6Q4D4PjIAEdKiWkrIMdiQA7fx58Csfv2_gWwI19BDngF7NYCcqAA2N2rn0q8Z8Mgh5RjSWyqC-tD8mzd3YMc2JPbHkVDPpFbA8jhxpRrUZtb-CnGUDkcnT7k9P56-vrx4_S8Q5O1TX_dtrnS9aDEekD_L1k_86Bd478AAAD__6dno7k) But what we offer is not only an ultrasound. We stay with her. We support her so she can confidently choose life for her baby. And we share the gospel of Jesus Christ because the deepest need in that room is not just clarity, but hope that lasts beyond the crisis--the kind of hope only Jesus can give. In a month when the world talks a lot about love, this is how we get to show it in a way that truly matters. Our goal is clear: fund 11,000 ultrasounds by February 28. Each ultrasound costs $28, and each one represents a mother receiving the truth in time--before an irreversible decision is made.
---
* $28 provides 1 ultrasound
* $56 provides 2 ultrasounds
* $140 provides 5 ultrasounds
* $280 provides 10 ultrasounds

---
Together, we are making sure truth shows up in time, compassion meets panic, and hope is offered where it's needed most.
---
[**Give One Ultrasound >>**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJykkUuO2zAMhk9D7xLIlGJnFlpMa7gt0ClmNV0atEQ7Qq0HJMW9fuEiOcHsSP4_Pr5-v01v5DYX1l_kWZvdTblMMy8x88KUPf3hUm9s2bji4oQCu5PAk7gevhBT5jnmMGFjtbGdxIZ12_ficsFWdc1NU39trZz73rbSsqV2XpRUaBQaK5b2pXH6YAoU1xYFojqrZWGeeTb40l9sT6DEPVmqXM4mhsJ5p-p2diHEI4rhbKJvNn2rNRWQr4Aj4Li6nc-P6Q4D4PjIAEdKiWkrIMdiQA7fx58Csfv2_gWwI19BDngF7NYCcqAA2N2rn0q8Z8Mgh5RjSWyqC-tD8mzd3YMc2JPbHkVDPpFbA8jhxpRrUZtb-CnGUDkcnT7k9P56-vrx4_S8Q5O1TX_dtrnS9aDEekD_L1k_86Bd478AAAD__6dno7k)
---
Thank you for standing with us in this work and for caring deeply about mothers, babies, and the eternal impact of the gospel. With confidence and gratitude, The PreBorn! Team
---

Pop Acta Media | Conservative Innovation
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Sue AnderBois via ActionNetwork.org
subject: Black History Month + Community Updates
body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMQRjame2DNSYCRFyBn4a_01pee00t_I5pRD-RHrm5MtCGxKMFnjxCXIzOGC0bhvXYK50SnOLnpfuuJn64PIFYI15CHdzwaTqvoNBJYSyKxPNwE4K8f3nvefYqMrUwCHb2Pfo-jC7UJsplTdi2sVRJtMZ7sLgtkfZoe3hUAzKUw6EwhgP1uERmP3BgAS70e0aEZCdLVRl2gq6BHEfAXPAZUjQydas3o8cM9C6dD14KGb01g3kIy5Ad9KVfmUJZ64_2w/4nz/z3Kh1UnPQqukmZ_Sn_rJvQ/h0/h001.j-KpsTfk_gvcyGzQ0zXAD0eCQeCGiGiVVw8fGFhL0Zc) Hello Friends & Neighbors, I hope that this note finds you well & dug out after yesterday's snow. February is Black History Month. We will be celebrating Black History Month at Providence City Hall on February 25th at 5:30pm -- but I encourage you to learn about the important Black History and history-in-the-making in all of our communities. Stages of Freedom hosts black history walking tours. Spend time learning about important Rhode Islanders including Billy Taylor, Danny Lopes, Edward Bannister, Christiana Bannister, Matilda Sissieretta Joyner Jones,**** and more -- and save the date for the opening of the Rhode Island African American Museum coming up on April 4th! As always, this newsletter is posted online at: https://www.sueanderbois.com/post/black-history-month-community-updates There's so much going on - so jumping right in! _**Upcoming Meetings & Events**:_ Keep up to date with what's going on in your government!

* _February 18th at 5:30pm: The HOPE Committee will hold a Public Hearing on Rent Stabilization_ in the Council Chambers. (I am on this committee). Come share your input! For folks who have never spoken at a public hearing before - it's a simple process! Plan to arrive a little early -- you sign in to testify (there are different lists for "support", "oppose" and "neutral") that are on a table just inside the short fence that separates Council desks from the rest of chambers. Each person will be called up by the Chairman, stand at the podium, and asked to share their name for the record. You will be given 2-3 minutes to speak. Please plan in advance what you might want to share so you don't get cut off before you finish. Everyone who signs in will be given a chance to speak on the record. If public speaking isn't your thing, you can also submit written comment to CityClerk@providenceri.gov.

* _Snow Response:_

I have heard from an overwhelming number of folks in the community who were negatively affected by the City's storm response. As a representative of the City - I apologize and want to commit us all to do better. The Council's Public Works Committee met this past Tuesday to ask questions of the Dept. of Public Works ([you can watch the recording here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVZiCw9e1CjoAxuXDVyOgvAfEaioctibHHJXBRJ7UpnpMx9MXpSdJpGNXV-YvYUn8XjE3qDzdzmnW_4pxfyQAl3yLNvH-uv5VDhlba3X6w-l4_ByN0HOAkzDC2KVgeT0xemxvsp3pLDONNSZ7o4OUwzezPaSJorp7WOFFgnis2OM5_YWJBIkJkI5UNmGfcRZDZN5lBgZWBhS8GKgLMZeciy55KBURJLAKp_rvtw9QV_LoBogiLnAW0lSfeb-N5IFvgPMLlVtwYFaOwO1kW_ItBsBNw2gIlkmc4MinRb15X_E/4nz/z3Kh1UnPQqukmZ_Sn_rJvQ/h8/h001.h_arwXGtTt_n2Tczmisidfjs4AcL2EE_5pVhPKup3nY) \- my questions are near the end), and I joined several of my colleagues in [sponsoring and passing a resolution](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.lmpSTrE-G07FKUPTdpC9IYucVZyv3P9zoeIJOjNiisnlidBD3Owmzws2LO8-4OI55KnKR1yMKod7eH55w8KnOXh1ciHiKZnwC3J7lce0TeUIoGRmAL4lGF-ddPvwG_2sk5122P9Sm6hV2MG2e6jGvQ1DIUDgIWHuha7HnkpcZHNmg9nazxinvc-Wmml51MGc1avx_h52vb6fyKB2TBBHaYUnwJC2tn_1TbYNUD9GJzZxtHrF--2sSkjDdSodxq_I5rXtrbHqgROl9rS6o2d_LMrv0YSOt4OXacZEtmbO1hejsjqTnK7H9Xj1WpUYeeEg3nvXXku3T5aJS3_l5p1300UyBYXkAirJEQiqAGtQnIM0l4LgIIded2Q5laGftSXZrlUX-OY9YkdNys3AfQgoZg/4nz/z3Kh1UnPQqukmZ_Sn_rJvQ/h9/h001.DXxyxEQnhmkpQv17GY6UTj5agnW1kmH9sB-1j1gumYM) asking for a formal report from the Administration on storm preparedness and response. * _New Trash Carts:_

You might remember that the City is replacing all of its existing trash carts. Your old trash and recycling carts will be picked up and replaced with the new carts when you put them out for trash pick up. The replacement will begin March 16th, and all carts will be replaced by the end of June 2026. * _Operation No One Dies_ : I want to highlight a new initiative that started this winter - Operation No One Dies. We are seeing a surge of neighbors experiencing homelessness in our community during a winter of dangerously low temperatures and dangerous conditions. The RI Council of Churches and Harrison Tuttle (and a team of volunteers) have created new warming shelters in existing church facilities and are working to ensure no one dies this winter. To learn more, listen to Harrison on [Bartholomewtown Podcast](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.lmpSTrE-G07FKUPTdpC9ISPOptpikxWmcZD-GYVcW0elFAKbjaVaQP4uGs2h1NBod0VIHLNRIOVxJjPuotiPPP0g41GKTR1x4GYp9dOEa0B7al7dfZ50Lk0T9x7kBKfaXVK9pT38tTgSzigZTtEoELX1dmmg0DBLGSfWITx1LB9BYtFT7WnRn8cb6O82HsRYvALluhLNL1QIsZ28ahN0wzSc527OsQt8kAWltVjW1QGMw2kPaobhMroZ0AqFlId3h90K_j-FWNsrDC1h5xZsEt2DGUrjKpj-0wJiKBOXC5bA9MtiSa_pc1puMHVJweQ-8-DTAv7gUBbee-GBxdZute8Q-X-D5JzwdGamCspnAvOBrMBHF_HxI8dh62wCq9-aW_9QZuv1ubtw71yec6RyQA/4nz/z3Kh1UnPQqukmZ_Sn_rJvQ/h13/h001.ahM6gykvGg5dJJ-0milZm3IvPVj4D95xZ__OK5tij7E). * _Congratulations Andrew Bramson_ : Ward 3 resident Andrew Bramson was just sworn in as our next Region 1 School Board Member! He joins Ward 3'er Corey Jones, who is our elected school board member! Thank you both for your service!

**Campaign news!** Our campaign for Lt. Governor is off and running! We are visiting and meeting voters in every corner of our state -- and folks are responding well to our message of a government that isn't afraid to stand up for what's right - and understands how to get things done and delivers actual results -- not finger pointing or excuses. Big gratitude to everyone hosting house parties during this chilly winter season (photo below from Meg & Bob's house in North Kingstown). clean_body: | | | Hello Friends & Neighbors, I hope that this note finds you well & dug out after yesterday's snow. February is Black History Month. We will be celebrating Black History Month at Providence City Hall on February 25th at 5:30pm -- but I encourage you to learn about the important Black History and history-in-the-making in all of our communities. Stages of Freedom hosts black history walking tours. Spend time learning about important Rhode Islanders including Billy Taylor, Danny Lopes, Edward Bannister, Christiana Bannister, Matilda Sissieretta Joyner Jones,** and more -- and save the date for the opening of the Rhode Island African American Museum coming up on April 4th! As always, this newsletter is posted online at: There's so much going on - so jumping right in! Upcoming Meetings & Events: Keep up to date with what's going on in your government! Monday, Feb 9 at 5:30pm, City Hall 3rd Floor \- Special Committee on the the Environment meets to review and vote on an amended ordinance to require more transparency from utility work under our streets and sidewalks. Tuesday, Feb 10th at 5:30, City Hall 3rd Floor -Finance Committee ( on open meetings portal) Wednesday, Feb 11th at 5:30pm, City Hall 3rd Floor \- The North Main Street Task Force will meet to discuss implementation progress & 2026 action plan! Wednesday, Feb 11, Zoning Board of Review, 444 Westminster St: The Agenda includes a review of an application for a special use permit at 1100 North Main St ("the old Benny's") to establish a cannibis retailer as part of the property. February 15th - late morning: Save the Date: East-Side Wide Rent Stabilization Listening Session hosted by Councilors AnderBois, Davidson & Goncalves. We know our constituents have input on the proposed rent stabilization ordinance that was introduced to Council earlier this year - and not everyone can get to City Hall for the official public hearing. (). This will be a listening session to hear from constituents -- like a public hearing but in the community. More info coming soon on location! You can also email me your thoughts anytime or have them submitted into the public record by emailing the Clerks at cityclerk@providenceri.gov. February 18th at 5:30pm: The HOPE Committee will hold a Public Hearing on Rent Stabilization in the Council Chambers. (I am on this committee). Come share your input! For folks who have never spoken at a public hearing before - it's a simple process! Plan to arrive a little early -- you sign in to testify (there are different lists for "support", "oppose" and "neutral") that are on a table just inside the short fence that separates Council desks from the rest of chambers. Each person will be called up by the Chairman, stand at the podium, and asked to share their name for the record. You will be given 2-3 minutes to speak. Please plan in advance what you might want to share so you don't get cut off before you finish. Everyone who signs in will be given a chance to speak on the record. If public speaking isn't your thing, you can also submit written comment to CityClerk@providenceri.gov. February 25th, 5:30 - Celebrate Black History Month at City Hall! More details coming soon! Multiple dates: North Burial Ground is once again hosting a year-long book club! Check out the upcoming books and dates and join our neighbors and friends in interesting reading throughout the year! Important Topics: Community Meeting Follow up! Thank you to John Marion at Common Cause for joining us at our community meeting to discuss open government and ways Providence and the State could increase transparency in government! We referenced a few resources in the conversation that I wanted to share! You can find Common Cause's Demystifying Democracy trainings . The Council's Policy staff Miguel Youngs did a great video on how an ordinance becomes a law . The City's open meetings portal is found . The City's lobbyists rules and registration forms can be found . I also heard a request that especially in inclement weather, we should offer meetings via zoom. I will host my next Ward meeting in March via zoom, and will aim to switch back and forth between Zoom & in person. Snow Response: I have heard from an overwhelming number of folks in the community who were negatively affected by the City's storm response. As a representative of the City - I apologize and want to commit us all to do better. The Council's Public Works Committee met this past Tuesday to ask questions of the Dept. of Public Works ( \- my questions are near the end), and I joined several of my colleagues in asking for a formal report from the Administration on storm preparedness and response. I am also looking into the ordinance that levies the fines/fees for noncompliance from businesses with clearing sidewalks, because while our independently-owned businesses on Hope Street were out there immediately making our sidewalks safe -- across the City, we saw many corporate landlords and tenants not making the sidewalks accessible and receiving no penalty. New Trash Carts: You might remember that the City is replacing all of its existing trash carts. Your old trash and recycling carts will be picked up and replaced with the new carts when you put them out for trash pick up. The replacement will begin March 16th, and all carts will be replaced by the end of June 2026. If you have questions, check out . We will also have representatives from the Administration at our next Ward meeting to answer any questions. Overall updates: Standing in Solidarity with Minneapolis: At our last Council meeting, I sponsored (and we unanimously passed) a resolution standing in solidarity with the people of Minneapolis and condemning the actions of ICE and federal agents who have murdered Americans and terrorized residents. You can read that . Miya Brophy-Baermann Memorial Square: I also sponsored and we unanimously to create the Miya Brophy-Baermann Memorial Square at North Main and Olney St. Miya was an extraordinary young woman who was taken from us too soon from gun violence on our streets. Operation No One Dies : I want to highlight a new initiative that started this winter - Operation No One Dies. We are seeing a surge of neighbors experiencing homelessness in our community during a winter of dangerously low temperatures and dangerous conditions. The RI Council of Churches and Harrison Tuttle (and a team of volunteers) have created new warming shelters in existing church facilities and are working to ensure no one dies this winter. To learn more, listen to Harrison on . You can also help them out by buying supplies on . (I just bought a cot at Harrison's request -- and there are plenty of things on the list at all price points). Congratulations Andrew Bramson : Ward 3 resident Andrew Bramson was just sworn in as our next Region 1 School Board Member! He joins Ward 3'er Corey Jones, who is our elected school board member! Thank you both for your service! Campaign news! Our campaign for Lt. Governor is off and running! We are visiting and meeting voters in every corner of our state -- and folks are responding well to our message of a government that isn't afraid to stand up for what's right - and understands how to get things done and delivers actual results -- not finger pointing or excuses. Big gratitude to everyone hosting house parties during this chilly winter season (photo below from Meg & Bob's house in North Kingstown). If you are interested in hosting a house party - I would love to meet your neighbors and friends! - just reply to this email and we'll get it scheduled! We are hustling every day to meet our fundraising goals to share our message across the state to win this election! Please consider a donation to help keep us going! Gratitude As always, I am so grateful for the opportunity to serve you -- especially during these turbulent times for our city, state, and nation. Please reach out any time - and also keep in touch between newsletters by following me on , , and . With Gratitude, Sue AnderBois | | | | Sent via Action Network, a free online toolset anyone can use to organize. and get started building an email list and creating online actions today. ---|--- Action Network is an open platform that empowers individuals and groups to organize for progressive causes. name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: The message Charlie carried into eternity
body:
[Unsubscribe](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh88qpcsbcn9rtkcqt3vnv0g24tyn2z3xuyozb5uw1uguejc3ayg1yt0a0aytj172reicwap8sup4q17ylzxxvwmxh6my5bbb4&__stmp=ta56c3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *

| | | [](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta56c3&__onlt=h)
---
| | Friend,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn’t a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal — the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God’s grace.**

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**“God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold.”**_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta56c3&__onlt=h)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie’s voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie’s hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta56c3&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta56c3&__onlt=h)
---
In the months since Charlie’s assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA’s message among young Americans...

...and it’s not just the conservative message as a whole — _**it’s the message of FAITH!**_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie’s call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it’s happening._

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we’re witnessing is not just growth —**it’s revival.**

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America’s faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up.**

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _“We’re not backing down.”_

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie’s most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie’s faith._**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

**[To claim your copy of Charlie’s final book, simply make a gift, in any amount, to support Turning Point USA today.](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta56c3&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta56c3&__onlt=h)
---
I’ll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible.

Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie’s mission and supporting his legacy.
---
**For Charlie,**

**Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta56c3&__onlt=h)
---
**[Support Turning Point USA](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta56c3&__onlt=h)**
---
**P.S.** When you read **_Stop, in the Name of God,_** you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead.

**[I hope you’ll claim your copy by making your most generous gift to Turning Point USA. Your support fuels our work to build the most faithful generation of Americans in history. Thank you, and God bless!](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta56c3&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta56c3&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: The message Charlie carried into eternity
body:
[unsubscribe](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?xul=1bu7fz54lr1j98ye80ci7qlvw50z0n1uvg1ramsfpjlflplp9utyvdvhzgp68qgu6f0kuob0wmepqg3vij0giff213o3u3sfemv593&__stmp=ta58vm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
| | | [](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta58vm&__onlt=h)
---
| | Friend,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn’t a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal — the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God’s grace.**

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**“God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold.”**_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta58vm&__onlt=h)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie’s voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie’s hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta58vm&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta58vm&__onlt=h)
---
In the months since Charlie’s assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA’s message among young Americans...

...and it’s not just the conservative message as a whole — _**it’s the message of FAITH!**_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie’s call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it’s happening._

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we’re witnessing is not just growth —**it’s revival.**

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America’s faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up.**

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _“We’re not backing down.”_

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie’s most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie’s faith._**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

**[To claim your copy of Charlie’s final book, simply make a gift, in any amount, to support Turning Point USA today.](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta58vm&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta58vm&__onlt=h)
---
I’ll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible.

Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie’s mission and supporting his legacy.
---
**For Charlie,**

**Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta58vm&__onlt=h)
---
**[Support Turning Point USA](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta58vm&__onlt=h)**
---
**P.S.** When you read **_Stop, in the Name of God,_** you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead.

**[I hope you’ll claim your copy by making your most generous gift to Turning Point USA. Your support fuels our work to build the most faithful generation of Americans in history. Thank you, and God bless!](https://trk.trumpshowdown.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta58vm&__onlt=h)**

clean_body: Please read the message below from our sponsor. | | | | | Friend, | | Charlie would have wanted you to have this. Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book. The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice. This isn’t a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans. Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal — the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God’s grace. Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children. By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: “God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold.” His book, Stop, in the Name of God is the fruit of that conviction. When you read it, you will hear Charlie’s voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family. Charlie’s hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive... A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us. I believe you will find this book inspiring. Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life. In the months since Charlie’s assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA’s message among young Americans... ...and it’s not just the conservative message as a whole — it’s the message of FAITH! In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie’s call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God. Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. And it’s happening. After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country. What we’re witnessing is not just growth —it’s revival. At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old. We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families. We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message. You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie. But America’s faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, “We’re not backing down.” This is what Charlie prayed for. I see this book as one of Charlie’s most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too. None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, so will the legacy of Charlie’s faith. Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God. I’ll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible. Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie’s mission and supporting his legacy. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. When you read Stop, in the Name of God, you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead. ** 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 / / BUSINESS CONNECTION DISCLOSURE: The sender of this email may have an affiliate or financial tie with the parties referenced and could earn commissions from purchases made on linked websites. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Contacting you as a man without options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust
body:
This is the situation I’m caught in:
This is the situation I’m caught in:
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1158263/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvRGZlbmRBYjdtWg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAyMDg/LbmNsM0VYSVFFNQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNhb0JTZ3Exc3ZSOTBscw/gaYicDA/s2pa96a811e)

| Patriot,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are now cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A vengeful Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
---
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
---
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
__
---
But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Patriot, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN this trial is patriots like _YOU_.
---
**That’s why I’ve officially filed a NEW _Defense_ _Trust_ in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me _more power_ to fight the Democrats' vindictive attempt to imprison me for LIFE.**
---
_And now, I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my new Defense Trust._
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Defense Trust to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Defense Trust
---

---
Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
What you’re seeing happen in Minnesota right now is a preview of what's to come if Democrats flip the Senate in November. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=41a4f56cb86942c2bdd9808c523977fb&_e=77UGatCS7qTA7J3s9qcllrGNZ4vmfD4e4SQ9zWZE5Yfejoihm3P0g3LlqOObZTT1N6EGFN84yK8na6TpALtr46hw9moYmpJTJJX1Ohzr0q8eBNaMBVtfKGh5VpGlEuoxlHxP1qw_hMhos728GdniG4qUcreuZfp_GAp8g4XqUhqhnvsc3D6Mafn8rdA5VxyYvKKwYvSHpq2dyHxABijhWYnsfnyte0RIQtyclqRosSh3An-gP03B9ezoUKeiK6oQQkusOJMNIM70-p0rlGdqsFN3XVIFS9cZGYVS7bPkHfJVUvfvcxHwi3Uil_nMTXYeAzMjheIMDcDAmYIaloZnjvEfXErsa5RHSxirx_dq9_cbKfx7879-v5J5zzWlNydy7fXyNiBsEgufbyUuiUsrti8NM2TONdSo4xWk2VgfT8sTG5xmmgK0Lyh5ty9xYpZmRcLkKDc2G4PuxPKOLyjPg28tbqTOXQKUpJ7RtBOXzic79f1eIpWC8yCs4srKVkvMda428VR7CEH0q_d3hRgPoaKMaqLtEVKkc_L9iDA5wuQmVLhifhfA-4qVi7ahLGhsAVlRGXgWmU9TNkV1Lh348C4HY9Ae3XOockWenvBIoVLv-22yZOAA80nINzbb7Ny4KJEkapC7ebKfEca4UVahBCv7Rqy22O2abM7T0YjfCKmyi_m9LD1jWSt03aXqgdTPiA1qZXgi9orazIYiZp4ofM8SNI7AjgrXhtyYah13-9Mf5MHhK7kUpSHYbwcUnJtGuAhB72vvXuQS65rpBjJ8sGagonRDVnKTaA1c8a945N1Snvq-n9RV_hrvav12ceLx)

---
Peter,

As a Republican political candidate running to represent Minnesota in the U.S. Senate, here is what I can tell you from being here during one of the most tumultuous times in recent memory.

1. Democrats believe that they have a reasonably straightforward path to any higher office that they want, simply because our state hasn’t voted for a Republican candidate on the presidential level since 1976

2. The mayor of Minneapolis and Governor Walz like to openly vilify Republicans, believing their supporters would never toss them to the curb simply because they are playing the role of attack dog. The mayor is probably even more of a left-wing ideologue than the governor.

3. They hate President Trump and everything he stands for - that’s why they are not cooperating with ICE in any way, shape, or form.

Now, the mayor, the governor, and my opponent in this Senate race, Lieutenant Governor Peggy Flanagan, are digging in even further, comparing FEDERAL ICE agents to neighbors flooding the city that don’t share the same values as the original inhabitants.

But what about the millions of illegal immigrants who flooded our country that don’t share ANY of our values?

**Democrats in Minnesota are showing the entire country what exactly will happen if they retake the Senate in November or the White House in 2028.

[**READ MYBIO
**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=41a4f56cb86942c2bdd9808c523977fb&_e=77UGatCS7qTA7J3s9qcllrGNZ4vmfD4e4SQ9zWZE5Yfejoihm3P0g3LlqOObZTT1N6EGFN84yK8na6TpALtr46hw9moYmpJTJJX1Ohzr0q8eBNaMBVtfKGh5VpGlEuoxlHxP1qw_hMhos728GdniG4qUcreuZfp_GAp8g4XqUhqhnvsc3D6Mafn8rdA5VxyYvKKwYvSHpq2dyHxABijhWYnsfnyte0RIQtyclqRosSh3An-gP03B9ezoUKeiK6oQQkusOJMNIM70-p0rlGdqsFN3XVIFS9cZGYVS7bPkHfJztaMBrrTf1K1eMJExJIJ6iTbzk8y-9OiPvCycYOCUFjnzgxEjjqzuQRnfGxzKF8HPXTsj6KWzDkEsnzaEumrIbzB8EpmtrOVvsnDxwtS1INvFFjWPX5QHz5m0OQ9rzp-1eOfTZUEYH1Hyu23oB8Rvxu6bqKZE-4NiwqDjjwSouJTvFAcV03WtgeV9glIgv7HJnuAxZX5EtpN_X7EsVXr10xE42SOMKeHKOy77S8vCOuq3w61F5uioA6OKliPDQ110ldSpukbeoapZ469Q8EH84WIp1gG2DIvy6lmBH0bOQ37BAN3eVS4v1iRSxMnGhMwugV_TU1flBVDsMLWc4a0yJc7Vc1Pjkle87--L3eULwARPb_7Sbyufl-8v5rZTp9aHprHnmpC-KAnn78VMlUf7OJhO5hTkUcnHGzaASnGyH_nxppuRHZVCNanOIrOc7Z_22CSfDsJE6Q7O6shYZI58t2ocCQBCaEee-l4QdRm5NYrjr6RvSb1Ow9zc1hAqd6S-tCoW7mqfGgY2j0GfQAQG)
They tolerate flash mobs, violent protests, and they don’t say anything when crazed lunatics storm places of worship, all to prove a point.

But what do you expect from a lieutenant governor who makes a mockery out of herself by cosplaying as a muslim? **

Rather than hand over convicted and suspected criminals to federal authorities, the mayor of Minneapolis and Governor Tim Walz released them into Minnesota communities.

**Somalian immigrants are storming the state capital building.**

_As a former Navy SEAL, I have been trained to rout out corruption, quell violent uprisings, and, most importantly, lead a team with honor._

**[I’m asking you to support my campaign for the United States Senate today because Minnesota needs direction, and Democrats aren't providing any.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=41a4f56cb86942c2bdd9808c523977fb&_e=77UGatCS7qTA7J3s9qcllrGNZ4vmfD4e4SQ9zWZE5Yfejoihm3P0g3LlqOObZTT1N6EGFN84yK8na6TpALtr46hw9moYmpJTJJX1Ohzr0q8eBNaMBVtfKGh5VpGlEuoxlHxP1qw_hMhos728GdniG4qUcreuZfp_GAp8g4XqUhqhnvsc3D6Mafn8rdA5VxyYvKKwYvSHpq2dyHxABijhWYnsfnyte0RIQtyclqRosSh3An-gP03B9ezoUKeiK6oQQkusOJMNIM70-p0rlGdqsFN3XVIFS9cZGYVS7bPkHfJCdRdoyO55XlCJpKyVw9--NFAsKgNviMKLjqSVmjrG_P0eq_U6ZoxSxaRRa8CRcD06HBXGsQJlIvYQuY_gCfZgrNd1pwDLHbUSxj7Lb11f-RDo_Utqg84s3bWwRFbwd62V1rpGCHOSI_dOh0fFihGE0ENMO1IcH6mcL8-7ww1NNcYi1smtjUfXlL3gC0YNbqZOOEY1yFPvDGo4fti8xia_jRd9r58xypol24FhhSNpKMsvGaxTAb214s-2S9MmkPCJK6JK2ky3I7vHP4j-6fFahoSivxzC-EbPlD6asXDHqyBKxiJF5Pvr4KOv1uxK-9N1H7Nx7CysZMTkeZQ-XuPfIeg576uSz9_4lNrHTNJwHy72g-fZMDjlppBQfPPJU3xNSgN2g_-yOrUm6dGBI98EZso1Kq-ysgcP5Ps7HwgtluNA2sb-3g-h-J2qpG_nmTfxUAACc2koeLgsvYk3X5n2SemoaclNzxP5oFnyakp-TAaD6ZuUUMsTu7JyjjdT1TEQAo_EE4o--OAqC0aKG_7O) **

**This is a no-fail mission, and Navy SEALS win races. It’s a proven fact. **

SEALS are entrusted with our nation’s most important, covert missions that have national security implications which impact every single American - and I can tell you that as a candidate for political office, I’m ready for this no-fail mission and my opponents are not.

[**CHIP IN $25
**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=41a4f56cb86942c2bdd9808c523977fb&_e=77UGatCS7qTA7J3s9qcllrGNZ4vmfD4e4SQ9zWZE5Yfejoihm3P0g3LlqOObZTT1N6EGFN84yK8na6TpALtr46hw9moYmpJTJJX1Ohzr0q8eBNaMBVtfKGh5VpGlEuoxlHxP1qw_hMhos728GdniG4qUcreuZfp_GAp8g4XqUhqhnvsc3D6Mafn8rdA5VxyYvKKwYvSHpq2dyHxABijhWYnsfnyte0RIQtyclqRosSh3An-gP03B9ezoUKeiK6oQQkusOJMNIM70-p0rlGdqsFN3XVIFS9cZGYVS7bPkHfIgDbjXKTEPBVkbnMNxmxirT7cEfxojoYK5QAZI8BDbkmioLry8JaTHa-7IeDRzl-N4XN8U7ERNsAgol0bjkMpWmeQbE0iY4ht6iiKQmPqGRKg94JGbKzCBpvgqioClQ8Rjkp5iJoJdUOB2gzItNNqpwhTz3KRWdzveZ9qsPm43vlkcoiyXQe35os0fFFnFJ0Nac4i4-XWOdwCKuXnc5Eq4LqNekEFmPRtpEr_FpTTzYDNgDOx92TUHX9s6UrGd4oZ7hLQXngcf8mm4iXtHVWH00b7Py7zNQcHjKsw4JvK-mPIYlSmBY-GCT1cDva4QF87Sm5k4AfwDSa5reyyufxlPhx2XOuqYSeNfcpXeUc2OzcHEEyNzEEiJRBzlyI4jJS9Fzihg7PqzjlPfNZ4kCLdmbN7tq5QO7RW9HIfBYFzt1hoa7tfVg4cJE6KqcDQGG0lmV5J1DEal4kgZxV02g1bXX4IqE6hOryjez5DUiNmLrIHz8ucc_j7q2o-68sYVmkykKVdonj00ALuk_fVX--S2)

Adam Schwarze

clean_body: What you’re seeing happen in Minnesota right now is a preview of what's to come if Democrats flip the Senate in November. | Peter, As a Republican political candidate running to represent Minnesota in the U.S. Senate, here is what I can tell you from being here during one of the most tumultuous times in recent memory. 1. Democrats believe that they have a reasonably straightforward path to any higher office that they want, simply because our state hasn’t voted for a Republican candidate on the presidential level since 1976 2. The mayor of Minneapolis and Governor Walz like to openly vilify Republicans, believing their supporters would never toss them to the curb simply because they are playing the role of attack dog. The mayor is probably even more of a left-wing ideologue than the governor. 3. They hate President Trump and everything he stands for - that’s why they are not cooperating with ICE in any way, shape, or form. Now, the mayor, the governor, and my opponent in this Senate race, Lieutenant Governor Peggy Flanagan, are digging in even further, comparing FEDERAL ICE agents to neighbors flooding the city that don’t share the same values as the original inhabitants. But what about the millions of illegal immigrants who flooded our country that don’t share ANY of our values? Democrats in Minnesota are showing the entire country what exactly will happen if they retake the Senate in November or the White House in 2028. They tolerate flash mobs, violent protests, and they don’t say anything when crazed lunatics storm places of worship, all to prove a point. But what do you expect from a lieutenant governor who makes a mockery out of herself by cosplaying as a muslim? Rather than hand over convicted and suspected criminals to federal authorities, the mayor of Minneapolis and Governor Tim Walz released them into Minnesota communities. Somalian immigrants are storming the state capital building. As a former Navy SEAL, I have been trained to rout out corruption, quell violent uprisings, and, most importantly, lead a team with honor. This is a no-fail mission, and Navy SEALS win races. It’s a proven fact. SEALS are entrusted with our nation’s most important, covert missions that have national security implications which impact every single American - and I can tell you that as a candidate for political office, I’m ready for this no-fail mission and my opponents are not. For love of country, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

| | | | Peter,
It’s not up for debate. You’ve always been a top ally of President Trump.
When they IMPEACHED him twice.
Took his MUGSHOT like a common criminal.
INDICTED him four times.
RAIDED his family home.
ARRESTED him.
Made him sit through BOGUS witch hunt trials.
And MORE!
You never gave up. You never abandoned the fight. Time and time again, you SHOWED UP to defend the President.
And we will NEVER forget your loyalty.
You play a key part in his victory! [So now, we’re reaching out directly to see if you’ll submit your endorsement of President Trump’s second term so far!](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._RGg_XA)

Team Marsha

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: This is what gave Charlie strength
body:
[unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewgcv70rn6oi9uaz550i1cdinkuxukdolq1c6zly9e6yhm4qe4ggt0y2tg5nqbyna32pxyb19ti1ysdjd&__stmp=ta5a2t&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
| | | [](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5a2t&__onlt=h)
---
| | Friend,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn’t a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal — the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God’s grace.**

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**“God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold.”**_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5a2t&__onlt=h)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie’s voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie’s hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5a2t&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5a2t&__onlt=h)
---
In the months since Charlie’s assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA’s message among young Americans...

...and it’s not just the conservative message as a whole — _**it’s the message of FAITH!**_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie’s call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it’s happening._

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we’re witnessing is not just growth —**it’s revival.**

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America’s faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up.**

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _“We’re not backing down.”_

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie’s most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie’s faith._**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

**[To claim your copy of Charlie’s final book, simply make a gift, in any amount, to support Turning Point USA today.](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5a2t&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5a2t&__onlt=h)
---
I’ll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible.

Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie’s mission and supporting his legacy.
---
**For Charlie,**

**Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5a2t&__onlt=h)
---
**[Support Turning Point USA](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5a2t&__onlt=h)**
---
**P.S.** When you read **_Stop, in the Name of God,_** you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead.

**[I hope you’ll claim your copy by making your most generous gift to Turning Point USA. Your support fuels our work to build the most faithful generation of Americans in history. Thank you, and God bless!](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5a2t&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5a2t&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
[Unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewgcv70rn6oi9uaz550i1cdinkuxukdolq1c6zly9e6yhm4qe4ggt0y2tg5nqbyna32pxyb19ti1ysdjd&__stmp=ta5a2t&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=qwikcdu20ae61kkb2fzst4vn6yvqwhfc152qzixpbvm0d7atkdd494swv6nkv6ldmg6q4y2rufxwqpgdedee94b013cvex86glu6p2mk78kd42w746n4ngltwkldb4ikzty&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5a2t&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=cyfvpmfkldeb36cpaqmj8iydl2aopw8mqvn88e8ckossncv8oscznxeu0vqvqp3cqc0r6sfz1234sydba81tn5191qzzkt4ez5n2pqcp6jym6r648bjnsj9y&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5a2t&__onlt=h)

name: DNC HQ
body:
We know it’s on your mind.
---
**2028.** We know it’s on your mind. It’s on ours too. We’ve been making news lately as our decision-making on the early states for the 2028 nominating contest ramps up. And the speculation about candidates is constant. But we know you expect more of us than to just pop up for the presidential races every four years. You also expect us to fight to win every midterm, every special election, every last seat that we can. You expect us to win back Congress this year. So that’s what we’re doing — **and we’re the only ones doing it.** The DNC is the _only_ organization working to elect Democrats across the ballot, nationwide, no matter the year. When you chip in to the DNC, you’re supporting thousands of candidates we work to elect. [**So, Derek, can we count on you to join your fellow supporters and make your first contribution of the year today to help elect Democrats in 2026, 2028, and beyond?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026?refcode=em_20260208_6025_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6025_22930333_AvDZ8W&akid=6025%2E22930333%2EAvDZ8W) If anyone thinks that we’re an organization that only comes alive every four years, they’ve got another thing coming. But doing this work day-in and day-out requires resources day-in and day-out. [**That’s why we hope that you’ll contribute today:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026?refcode=em_20260208_6025_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6025_22930333_AvDZ8W&akid=6025%2E22930333%2EAvDZ8W) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260208_6025_fr&refcode2=6025_22930333_AvDZ8W&akid=6025%2E22930333%2EAvDZ8W)**

---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026?refcode=em_20260208_6025_fr&refcode2=6025_22930333_AvDZ8W&akid=6025%2E22930333%2EAvDZ8W)**
---

A donation now will go further than one down the line will. A donation now will allow us to invest in the infrastructure on the ground we need to win. **So if you’ve been waiting for the right time to give, this is it.**
Thank you,
The Democrats
