name: Democratic Insider
subject: MEMO ENCLOSED: 2026 House Analysis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Colorado Draws the Line
body:
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PHqQ1sKEz4MMFdNPlHOu1S2GMf4yDASMRm7iiEZyXfzpdacOj9hVIjO3L-1fQTZsSveiqKICWPZx4u7_CArw2QII5LLtqvJzKkY4s3jtVUAJbOTN0JQ08emz4MDfUcbhR76gKscuESYuEgUm6g2WEPyPPSoaYrh_RtAfK8NXEMc3d5qYmmX_R2qRmFX2H-G-5aCrbSTxVIkvCnCoLpIj4g==&c=Mu_jjrlEnT521OUMrgacy6GzxZNJ6kgQwFZxVIJS2qFyMePRdTBECA==&ch=QGZWN18EemNIp2A22bpSC1DynKhxYjAqi9-lWcftS1sDkLZNa5u-HA==)
---
Peter,
What you're about to read is a CONFIDENTIAL memo for Democratic insiders across the country.
Over the past two weeks, our team has been in direct communication with top election analysts, strategists, and prognosticators from across the country in order to figure out EXACTLY where we stand.
The consensus is unanimous and frankly, terrifying:
House control in 2026 will come down to 2-8 seats. That's it.
Not 20 seats. Not 15. Two to eight seats will determine whether Democrats can stop Trump's authoritarian agenda or whether MAGA controls Congress for the next decade.
Here's what they're telling us behind closed doors:

* MAGA's gerrymandering in Texas, North Carolina, Missouri, Florida, and Indiana has already locked in 12-15 new GOP seats

* California's Prop 50 clawed back 5 seats, but if the Supreme Court strikes it down (decision expected any day), those gains evaporate

* Virginia, Maryland, and New York are in play, but face legal challenges that could drag into 2027

* Colorado is the X-factor

Let me repeat that: Colorado is the X-factor.
Our ballot initiative would flip 3-4 MAGA-held seats - including Lauren Boebert's - and potentially decide House control all by itself.
But here's the problem that's keeping Democratic strategists up at night:
Too many Democrats are ready to unilaterally surrender. They think fighting back against gerrymandering makes us "just as bad as Republicans." They want to take the high road while MAGA rigs the entire playing field.
We refuse to accept that.
Colorado Draws the Line exists because someone has to be willing to fight back when democracy is on the line. When the stakes are this high rolling over is not an option.
This is the intelligence we're sharing with you because you've proven you're serious about winning. But intelligence without action is worthless.

[ ]Headline: Trump's $10 billion lawsuit against the IRS raises conflict of interest concerns One thing is clear: Trump’s presidency is about hoarding wealth and power while dispensing cruelty on the rest of us. If we don’t shout this truth from the rooftops – right now – he’ll keep this grift going uncontested. Our video is already catching fire, but we need to reach people in red districts and battleground states who’ve only heard Trump’s spin. Together let’s break Trump’s wall of lies and hold him and his family accountable. [ ]Can you donate now to push our exposé into every corner of America? Even $10 can help ensure this video is seen by voters who need to know the real Trump. When we organize, we win. I'm ready to get to work with President Trump on the America-First agenda!

| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=4d7beec478ae4d3c9de68d19b010c660&_e=qm0tn9U9W6UMP0eWC7YdcuEJZntOQvLF3uuw-bC9FE9iJycpL_DCTUVR73Ph9MYLkHXBMggwdAbmv4Qp9TyArX3Z0e-auCNVwCST8b7ESJlrEF5OcI4AIWMxUbsYI940V3v7OfHtxtmJlXQXViGPbcyKyBRmSN_A6od-YUQvTDAYd728qIJ4WTdfED3FEO5UPVci8KHf1KfKYuFgyepgVL2bVldL0_LQqrkY5TAGU_u0i5NYbbOrUM-iJpS9pfOmyEKQJrb8rArjFBqAQcMdOH7A9bJG08xbFy2yM-QF2rGt_g22M2gWw1g__jXdgAweLniB3fmBq-KFm5brMU1c2rwcjSXGWryPLA7MHb9vIcEioj804A7yLwUO4_d-Ydqk4SM-9ZxO89IjddKjg0kt1ILOwvJy8V2ZNlLtByWPxAxqYmO4wmCc_CHhkAU1vRelWQ2tkBTVsVRIf-viWa6rRTb_MrcRCa2Gd9Pp_aBxY7YuViZVOz1WZfnFd2ngeqWE_OrznbBWWkBbMcX7QPLkaVpbCR-C6pF1UgadqVVKi-tBfyNCnqOLrWo8By465jCAmqkoi43dP-Cy8pvBJLjMLA%3D%3D)

Patriot,

I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything.**

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=4d7beec478ae4d3c9de68d19b010c660&_e=qm0tn9U9W6UMP0eWC7YdcuEJZntOQvLF3uuw-bC9FE9iJycpL_DCTUVR73Ph9MYLkHXBMggwdAbmv4Qp9TyArX3Z0e-auCNVwCST8b7ESJlrEF5OcI4AIWMxUbsYI940V3v7OfHtxtmJlXQXViGPbe3QfH1N1INLpFQKCKSxyN1Z1IwwLIwG_x6vHNrh5X5DfF4MAMMSeje4AoFgFVjyehrp2MDIVoC_ooeiVfnrKp6tIkO5KY6V5iDpFhWn9LOZzVr00gBZ1r4zQyUeAki53mJn-XUrQ77m_iJGmzIg8Gm9CouduKOULresI4XK9pxvJLrx8Kzb-nGQJ2k0jarYX4-kPHB0Pioe6cX5bbYAjLpNlCKWbT8gVANN_lQNfo-EtGh6CV8i--KLqTydVwOoHBdHc7KIF2d50Xh1CbnnfcE_C1slMtVFQkOUhXxmWg0pkTZePc2JakgTJoFVXZVRuvy9IHNjezx7xwXz1SUb4ULybaW8lPxnAaIAYQyLudDK_k4hVy45jYAgj5Ofc2f4SoTn-r0LNAEO1CqG3us4jf4%3D)
After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business.

**Here 's a picture of my wife and me at the new member orientation in Washington. **

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=4d7beec478ae4d3c9de68d19b010c660&_e=qm0tn9U9W6UMP0eWC7YdcuEJZntOQvLF3uuw-bC9FE9iJycpL_DCTUVR73Ph9MYLkHXBMggwdAbmv4Qp9TyArX3Z0e-auCNVwCST8b7ESJlrEF5OcI4AIWMxUbsYI940V3v7OfHtxtmJlXQXViGPbe3QfH1N1INLpFQKCKSxyN1Z1IwwLIwG_x6vHNrh5X5De9R0OvPdj3e9S4M05vdFd6BxexPASDR72alYLpk9Tltf4MO-gxzT9CVbORtPgVEMTPrez5FnhFyL4k6wgDi69jIuv7fOXhO0oyzAnfwUiNunarpXFjIJaCT-5oDK5kT2NIZdhOlCcUGZXNlpsRBzhkbQ8Yb9zl09LdpLIH8QDEUvh5JRSKK7HgAerp4R28Zf_YFV3JFyFebmSiLDoz_RPlBCqeGNY5n1H_b8SVB_uRT3V2tbaMuMQ9uHCJRmXEpGchOwOtYT43MfRkcLaJyiqcKKQnojecNKnxSuvkZ-NBMZfeuSo7A0unAjUF174_kBuYbryJSDn6Tm3-RpKKdKyTvdmYYVerD_mx4nxUSutlg%3D)
Most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls. I'm honored to have won my race for North Carolina's 10th Congressional District, and I'm ready to work alongside President Trump to make our nation great again. **
**
With President Trump in the Oval Office and House and Senate Majorities in Congress, we 're more equipped than ever to get our country back on track. The only thing we're missing is the resources to keep going.

**[That’s why I’m humbly asking if you’ll chip in just a few bucks today.](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=4d7beec478ae4d3c9de68d19b010c660&_e=qm0tn9U9W6UMP0eWC7YdcuEJZntOQvLF3uuw-bC9FE9iJycpL_DCTUVR73Ph9MYLkHXBMggwdAbmv4Qp9TyArX3Z0e-auCNVwCST8b7ESJlrEF5OcI4AIWMxUbsYI940V3v7OfHtxtmJlXQXViGPbcyKyBRmSN_A6od-YUQvTDAYd728qIJ4WTdfED3FEO5Uhxu_bRKwwtNSztLX_kfMVEIeKiGs3JljEz058njmyK5cifhmJVAXMeBk7EhqYp2daz3BI0aEfZHoXFMlL1cUdmbOrLvFMShkZWs1tloUJjLmLxPTV6CxaS0fg7lFq1tfQKaHJ40yQcXa_8KyljYTgVG6pXGUsigzd-XbKZV2vRjVWUklWS9wnFKIfMFMZQFGkOGI_v9gwQPn0aGCSmvMy29jnCKxWrZtbEJA8ozn0U9JUHMffmXl5wjZOHpIp5eoevCqk2LZWzQXLr6cXxv47N-8jtjkfYdvb8qQJNPr9a1xQBfzeCxR7rncPKndb9st4k0xXBRxH3VfXgPZf84XgDlhD0eh7QX5OvHHRdfdsWl6nIlzcKyll_VyMgtp4ShGexu7ZDvT92cN1x4XrqWv1g%3D%3D)**

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but making real changes to help hardworking Americans can be tough - **really, really tough.**

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to success we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

**_Please have my back on this one:_** **__** | [**GIVE $10 TO SUPPORT PAT HARRIGAN**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=4d7beec478ae4d3c9de68d19b010c660&_e=qm0tn9U9W6UMP0eWC7YdcuEJZntOQvLF3uuw-bC9FE9iJycpL_DCTUVR73Ph9MYLkHXBMggwdAbmv4Qp9TyArX3Z0e-auCNVwCST8b7ESJlrEF5OcI4AIWMxUbsYI940V3v7OfHtxtmJlXQXViGPbbM06HQd7x_7w4IurY47Lulkhj-rGtTa5rz0p9QMKfuURdKKgZ3vUGawOIGmVuVZlzd1Z3TaMExyYgS1NClnWCFKChvHZVqtvV1Xpdf0bRJbbg8TClqLrlHsweeZv76-Wz_33_SeR0PeAsIjzubddEC63WiUsfItGePbLY-X39DcNWmwC63RFhdz8JmebK_Rh1mFNvQHRfpM2MUctnZyeLuEjP0q6K6Fah9Js2yWAo-Pr2p7iRDO0xxDr91MJ1WuTEyFyK47Uu1GVEGCe9CvF2CLZjT-511IYiYw287gUCinMwia3mMf9NThIH45BjuR_u_JkPUk9nwIsZKX1n_N7iUNCvt5ol5BNVNnypblq_j5UaQe0tvenANvkorA6eV2LE4VGGPdFuKln8VcohjnIudULO0jVnNnnme9E7XsCgpZGE8SmpzE1WPDydszRwDHhg%3D%3D)

clean_body: But your response to this message will decide everything. I'm ready to get to work with President Trump on the America-First agenda! | Patriot, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way. But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat. After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. Here 's a picture of my wife and me at the new member orientation in Washington. Most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls. I'm honored to have won my race for North Carolina's 10th Congressional District, and I'm ready to work alongside President Trump to make our nation great again. With President Trump in the Oval Office and House and Senate Majorities in Congress, we 're more equipped than ever to get our country back on track. The only thing we're missing is the resources to keep going. I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but making real changes to help hardworking Americans can be tough - really, really tough. The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to success we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts. Please have my back on this one: | Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud. Thank you, and God Bless, Pat Harrigan Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Pat Harrigan is a former member of the U.S. Army. body:
We haven’t heard from you yet
| | **_No Kings organizers just SLAMMED Trump:
“America belongs to its people, NOT KINGS”_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-pledge/?refcode=VPP_20260208_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=6&akid=22882%2E878179%2EoOXCgK) | [YOUR ATTENDANCE UNCONFIRMED: SIGN NOW TO PLEDGE TO ATTEND YOUR NO KINGS PROTEST »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-pledge/?refcode=VPP_20260208_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=7&akid=22882%2E878179%2EoOXCgK)
---
IF every Democrat reading this shows up on March 28, we can STAND UP to Trump and show him that the American people DO NOT TOLERATE a dictator!

**BUT IF ATTENDANCE IS LOW, Trump and his minions will laugh in our faces...** and our grassroots momentum will plummet when we need it most.

[**We REFUSE to stand idly by while Donald Trump plots to turn the presidency into a monarchy. | [Peter, I want you to hear it from me first: I'm running for Congress to represent Maryland's 5th district. In a moment, I'm going to ask you to split a donation between me and Bushra Amiwala to be a Founding Donor to my campaign. Please give me a chance to explain why it's so important:](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OaVBZxS8qki6EJClap5Fgc3hhfoCgbDKy9N7m-G3Lr-bt-KTRUC0D03mrH-XgbTA79pD9hJ_2RDsfbOx5TRYH8bq7Twoswbsfo0lbzxT_PcLj_0E8V6Kg2uOBQ-vwSf3Nt3fUa5M4uK5duigzhtBnkIJwcskLOsyeiMebHT4ou2ktXnsWJFbLkf0QcmjOMZYPx0zIWLcCip0bTRSuzGmXMbY0jhPBuX1jH_bnLI32ss=&c=0_cLMBmHUFQnDEy57KgJAc0FZSdOWvPuKCkFOxSPXsSYlZnJ02bDpw==&ch=DwyAiSrMx1lImtFInNkc5YF0a5ODyCOZvuMP7GvA0qOeX9maHnUbdg==)
I never thought I'd have to defend our democracy from a violent mob inside the Capitol building.
I joined the Capitol Police 16 years ago because I wanted to serve and protect the place where our democracy happens. I swore an oath to protect the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic.
I could have never expected that oath would lead me to fight Donald Trump's insurrectionists on January 6th, 2021.
For hours, I was immersed in a profane mix of sweat, screams, shrieks, anger, death, fear, blood, broken limbs, spit, hatred, horror, racism, and bigotry as Trump's violent mob attacked my fellow officers and tried to overturn a free and fair election.
Donald Trump did NOTHING to stop them. For three hours, he watched on TV while we were beaten bloody.
But I had confidence that I could stand strong. I knew that this is America, and here, we stand for what's right.
[If you're ready to be on the right side of history, join me and Bushra Amiwala in our fight against Trump today. Chip in anything you can. Every dollar will help take down his House Majority, and together, we can defend our democracy:](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OaVBZxS8qki6EJClap5Fgc3hhfoCgbDKy9N7m-G3Lr-bt-KTRUC0D03mrH-XgbTA79pD9hJ_2RDsfbOx5TRYH8bq7Twoswbsfo0lbzxT_PcLj_0E8V6Kg2uOBQ-vwSf3Nt3fUa5M4uK5duigzhtBnkIJwcskLOsyeiMebHT4ou2ktXnsWJFbLkf0QcmjOMZYPx0zIWLcCip0bTRSuzGmXB7addQG_oxvz-E-y9izxBs=&c=0_cLMBmHUFQnDEy57KgJAc0FZSdOWvPuKCkFOxSPXsSYlZnJ02bDpw==&ch=DwyAiSrMx1lImtFInNkc5YF0a5ODyCOZvuMP7GvA0qOeX9maHnUbdg==)

| A lot has happened since that day in 2021.
I testified before Congress about what really happened. I spoke truth to power while some of the same people I protected tried to rewrite history and pretend it was just a "normal tourist visit."
I've endured relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA supporters. They've called me every name in the book. They've threatened my family. They've threatened me.
But I still believe that we must stand up for what's right.
Now, Donald Trump is back in the White House with unchecked power.
His ICE agents are terrorizing communities with masks and military weapons -- just like his insurrectionists did on January 6th. The only difference is that now they're being paid with your tax dollars.
His MAGA enablers in Congress are letting him treat the Constitution like it's optional. They're ignoring subpoenas. They're refusing oversight. They're acting like Trump is a king instead of a president.
And I'm not going to sit back and let it happen.
That's why I'm running for Congress, Peter.
Because my oath to protect and defend the Constitution didn't end on January 6th. It will never end.
Our country has lived through challenging periods before. We've overcome, persevered, and moved toward a more perfect union. We're in the middle of another fight for our country right now.
I still have faith that good can prevail over evil and that we can overcome these hard times. What is right still matters here... but only if we make it matter.
I'm ready to continue this fight in Congress. I know Trump and his MAGA machine inside and out. I've faced them before. I stood strong when it mattered most.
[But I need you to stand with me now. If you're fired up to take down Trump's House Majority and hold him accountable, it would be an honor to have your support as a Founding Donor. Will you split a $25 donation between my campaign and Bushra Amiwala today?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OaVBZxS8qki6EJClap5Fgc3hhfoCgbDKy9N7m-G3Lr-bt-KTRUC0D03mrH-XgbTASZIsgjTXswiTxdHKZWSyuiNcUVdu3HE4ooiT9Er47DvYYd7msJ47q_OmbTCa0ZmGQDlJpH2mmZMPsn9u0a7rD4a76NUMJMCVdgpxJ6eFFITAu2aM3es-WZUH4cKMI3ReON35Db--rImTAaaU2LRSw8pXlwgzDMptsD0_sOT1yIUPyOC1Z3wLBJMKstj9sP3W&c=0_cLMBmHUFQnDEy57KgJAc0FZSdOWvPuKCkFOxSPXsSYlZnJ02bDpw==&ch=DwyAiSrMx1lImtFInNkc5YF0a5ODyCOZvuMP7GvA0qOeX9maHnUbdg==)
---
| [BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR ->](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OaVBZxS8qki6EJClap5Fgc3hhfoCgbDKy9N7m-G3Lr-bt-KTRUC0D03mrH-XgbTASZIsgjTXswiTxdHKZWSyuiNcUVdu3HE4ooiT9Er47DvYYd7msJ47q_OmbTCa0ZmGQDlJpH2mmZMPsn9u0a7rD4a76NUMJMCVdgpxJ6eFFITAu2aM3es-WZUH4cKMI3ReON35Db--rImTAaaU2LRSw8pXlwgzDMptsD0_sOT1yIXHfoN6BVxW2ikO6N_anisG&c=0_cLMBmHUFQnDEy57KgJAc0FZSdOWvPuKCkFOxSPXsSYlZnJ02bDpw==&ch=DwyAiSrMx1lImtFInNkc5YF0a5ODyCOZvuMP7GvA0qOeX9maHnUbdg==)
---
I'm not a career politician. I'm not a millionaire. I'm a dad, a former Capitol Police officer, and an American who refuses to give up on our democracy.
This campaign will be powered by ordinary people doing extraordinary things: a construction worker in Waldorf giving $10. An aircraft mechanic in Lexington Park giving $20. A teacher in Clinton giving $50.
Together, we're going to prove that Americans will stand up for what's right.
Thank you for standing with me,
Harry Dunn Democrat for Congress in Maryland's 5th District
P.S. -- My team set an ambitious goal of 100,000 donors in our first week to prove we have what it takes to win this race. Every dollar you give helps us build the grassroots movement we need to defeat MAGA extremism and take back the House. [Will you split a $25 donation between my campaign and Bushra Amiwala before midnight? >>](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OaVBZxS8qki6EJClap5Fgc3hhfoCgbDKy9N7m-G3Lr-bt-KTRUC0D03mrH-XgbTASZIsgjTXswiTxdHKZWSyuiNcUVdu3HE4ooiT9Er47DvYYd7msJ47q_OmbTCa0ZmGQDlJpH2mmZMPsn9u0a7rD4a76NUMJMCVdgpxJ6eFFITAu2aM3es-WZUH4cKMI3ReON35Db--rImTAaaU2LRSw8pXlwgzDMptsD0_sOT1yIXlLEoiq3dlJuMQ-Wa6f7QV&c=0_cLMBmHUFQnDEy57KgJAc0FZSdOWvPuKCkFOxSPXsSYlZnJ02bDpw==&ch=DwyAiSrMx1lImtFInNkc5YF0a5ODyCOZvuMP7GvA0qOeX9maHnUbdg==)

name: Team Pappas
subject: Things are close in this competition
body:
[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1001&akid=4973%2E582294%2EVbM0ra ]Chris Pappas for Senate[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1002&akid=4973%2E582294%2EVbM0ra ]Chris Pappas for Senate

Good morning!

Tonight is game time for the Patriots and the Seahawks in the Super Bowl –
but we’re already going head-to-head with our opponent in our own battle
for New Hampshire’s Senate seat.

Like football, Senate campaigns are all about momentum.

We saw great polling numbers and a strong grassroots team with us in the
first half of this race...

... And Chris has a winning playbook for tough races like this one — he’s
won four times before.

But things are getting close. Recent polls show us tied
with John Sununu, and he just got a heavy-hitter added to his roster with
Donald Trump’s endorsement.

We can’t afford to go offside now — we have to rally around our home team
in the second half, get some points on the board, and win to keep New
Hampshire blue.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260208_1.ucpkBi&refcode=em20260208-1&t=1003&akid=4973%2E582294%2EVbM0ra ]So, we
hope that was enough football metaphors to convince you to push Team
Pappas into the end zone with a donation of any amount before the big game
tonight!

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260208_1.ucpkBi&amount=5&refcode=em20260208-1&t=1022&akid=4973%2E582294%2EVbM0ra ]Donate $5 »

# **Washington Post CEO Will Lewis steps down amid mass layoffs and turmoil**
Washington Post CEO Will Lewis **[resigned Saturday, effective immediately,](https://substack.com/redirect/8a0e1540-8f53-46f2-ab6f-908bf4ab6725?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** just days after the Jeff Bezos-owned newspaper laid off some 300 staffers--about 30% of its workforce. He was succeeded by Jeff D'Onofrio, the former Tumblr CEO who joined the Post in June as chief financial officer.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8a0e1540-8f53-46f2-ab6f-908bf4ab6725?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Why it matters:** Lewis' departure caps two years of intense upheaval at the prestigious newspaper, including the abrupt resignation of executive editor Sally Buzbee in June 2024 after clashes over newsroom restructuring. Lewis drew sharp criticism for being "effectively absent" during this week's layoffs, declining to address staff while photos circulated of him attending a Super Bowl event.
* **What 's next:** D'Onofrio, who will serve as acting publisher and CEO, signaled a sharper focus on business fundamentals, telling employees that "customer data will drive our decisions" as the paper seeks to prioritize what is "most valuable to our audiences." He pledged the newsroom's "uncompromising, fearless journalism" would remain the "north star" while building a more sustainable operation amid economic headwinds battering media organizations.
* **The backdrop:** Lewis defended the sweeping changes in a farewell note, saying "difficult decisions have been taken in order to ensure the sustainable future of The Post." Jeff Bezos praised D'Onofrio, saying "each and every day our readers give us a roadmap to success" and that the leadership team is "positioned to lead The Post into an exciting and thriving next chapter."

* * *
# **Team USA freestyle skiers slammed for criticizing ICE while wearing American flag**
Team USA freestyle skiers Hunter Hess and Chris Lillis faced backlash on social media **[after publicly criticizing the Trump administration and ICE operations at the Winter Olympics,](https://substack.com/redirect/f45aac83-8a0c-4cbf-bf16-77bcb0d6b0c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with Hess stating that "just because I'm wearing the flag, doesn't mean I represent everything that's going on in the U.S."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f45aac83-8a0c-4cbf-bf16-77bcb0d6b0c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **What they 're saying:** Hess told reporters "it brings up mixed emotions to represent the U.S. right now" and "there's obviously a lot going on that I'm not the biggest fan of," adding he only feels like he's representing things that align with his "moral values." Critics responded harshly, with one saying "if he doesn't like the flag and what it represents, he is welcome to find another country."
* **The reaction:** Presidential Envoy for Special Missions Richard Grenell called Hess a "privileged Gen Z from Oregon" who "hasn't traveled much," writing "he's representing the greatest country in the world...move to Canada if you aren't proud of wear USA." Multiple social media users said they wouldn't watch the Olympics because of the comments, with one predicting "the Olympics TV ratings aren't going to be phenomenal."

# **42 anti-ICE protesters arrested after memorial turns violent in Minneapolis**
At least 42 anti-ICE protesters **[were arrested Saturday after chaos erupted](https://substack.com/redirect/2334d966-2000-478e-a79c-e93f47d83950?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** outside the Bishop Henry Whipple Federal Building in Minneapolis following a memorial for Renee Good and Alex Pretti, who were fatally shot by federal agents last month. Footage showed agitators tearing down police tape, hurling lewd objects at law enforcement, and shouting insults at state patrol officers.
[| | | | | THE TRADESMAN 📈
---
@The_Tradesman1
Anti-Trump protests in Minneapolis are taking bizarre forms.
| 2:50 PM * Feb 8, 2026 * 9 Views
---](https://substack.com/redirect/41195885-66c8-401d-ab0c-a527608ef1a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Why it matters:** The violence followed a memorial at Powderhorn Park for Good and Pretti, exactly one month after Good's death. One protester screamed through a megaphone claiming the gathering was "peaceful" while the group chanted "No justice, no peace," and dozens of agitators were seen wearing gas masks.
* **What officials said:** Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey praised the memorial in a social media post, saying "thousands showed up to remember and honor Renee Good and Alex Pretti" and that "Minneapolis is with you--and we will keep spreading love," but did not address the later violence and arrests. The chaos comes as Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz and Frey continue to accuse the Trump administration of violating citizens' constitutional rights, leading White House border czar Tom Homan to withdraw 700 federal agents from Minneapolis on Wednesday.

Washington Post CEO Will Lewis steps down amid mass layoffs and turmoil Washington Post CEO Will Lewis just days after the Jeff Bezos-owned newspaper laid off some 300 staffers--about 30% of its workforce. He was succeeded by Jeff D'Onofrio, the former Tumblr CEO who joined the Post in June as chief financial officer. | | ---|---|--- Why it matters: Lewis' departure caps two years of intense upheaval at the prestigious newspaper, including the abrupt resignation of executive editor Sally Buzbee in June 2024 after clashes over newsroom restructuring. Lewis drew sharp criticism for being "effectively absent" during this week's layoffs, declining to address staff while photos circulated of him attending a Super Bowl event. What 's next: D'Onofrio, who will serve as acting publisher and CEO, signaled a sharper focus on business fundamentals, telling employees that "customer data will drive our decisions" as the paper seeks to prioritize what is "most valuable to our audiences." He pledged the newsroom's "uncompromising, fearless journalism" would remain the "north star" while building a more sustainable operation amid economic headwinds battering media organizations. The backdrop: Lewis defended the sweeping changes in a farewell note, saying "difficult decisions have been taken in order to ensure the sustainable future of The Post." Jeff Bezos praised D'Onofrio, saying "each and every day our readers give us a roadmap to success" and that the leadership team is "positioned to lead The Post into an exciting and thriving next chapter." Team USA freestyle skiers slammed for criticizing ICE while wearing American flag Team USA freestyle skiers Hunter Hess and Chris Lillis faced backlash on social media with Hess stating that "just because I'm wearing the flag, doesn't mean I represent everything that's going on in the U.S." | | ---|---|--- What they 're saying: Hess told reporters "it brings up mixed emotions to represent the U.S. right now" and "there's obviously a lot going on that I'm not the biggest fan of," adding he only feels like he's representing things that align with his "moral values." Critics responded harshly, with one saying "if he doesn't like the flag and what it represents, he is welcome to find another country." The reaction: Presidential Envoy for Special Missions Richard Grenell called Hess a "privileged Gen Z from Oregon" who "hasn't traveled much," writing "he's representing the greatest country in the world...move to Canada if you aren't proud of wear USA." Multiple social media users said they wouldn't watch the Olympics because of the comments, with one predicting "the Olympics TV ratings aren't going to be phenomenal." Don 't Miss It! Asking liberals "Do you want this deported illegal criminal to come back?" 42 anti-ICE protesters arrested after memorial turns violent in Minneapolis At least 42 anti-ICE protesters outside the Bishop Henry Whipple Federal Building in Minneapolis following a memorial for Renee Good and Alex Pretti, who were fatally shot by federal agents last month. Footage showed agitators tearing down police tape, hurling lewd objects at law enforcement, and shouting insults at state patrol officers. Why it matters: The violence followed a memorial at Powderhorn Park for Good and Pretti, exactly one month after Good's death. One protester screamed through a megaphone claiming the gathering was "peaceful" while the group chanted "No justice, no peace," and dozens of agitators were seen wearing gas masks. What officials said: Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey praised the memorial in a social media post, saying "thousands showed up to remember and honor Renee Good and Alex Pretti" and that "Minneapolis is with you--and we will keep spreading love," but did not address the later violence and arrests. The chaos comes as Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz and Frey continue to accuse the Trump administration of violating citizens' constitutional rights, leading White House border czar Tom Homan to withdraw 700 federal agents from Minneapolis on Wednesday. | | POLL Which will you be watching today? | ? ? name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie wrote this for the soul
body:
The quietest thing he ever did was the most powerful
Peter, Charlie’s final book is available with a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA.
| | | [ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=98aa7028c02c43cdae37d2db60ee6ab1&_e=j9k0bG5a_FwrlhLPOK-g9jST3R3s2L1RnJWGh4NK2SWmmJsf7FKwA_wJwnNVqyyxPK80D82ZvjG1trE3ZrfJj7nSZW8aaFk9e3zvLvm7QIBrYHvpJFaj7ADH51u24YmWgETZ-ToCCSaoC4jfdxJDFRKD815aMLj3xZe2zQ5PkvhfZhewIZP4eCEmNGoUTHUoWmYKXe9hc3eaEZT4X34nUGjvfZFeC1eOlFJ3_X6lmKCNrpAAFf6r_RedM1ufu1kvU7KZS1sgbHPzy7ovwHz8j6Eg8CRBRSHYpUmgjnbBwRfzJ2Xb2d-L3jm6eMdZg2ZLY8rHxXUOhAXdLWbYAGXEhbP7Q673ubM99gobexsOUx0y0Yk8LlUKfyNGA3pZ41rAWHgtPU01v2NdnZS03MVX2y_6VuTi2cOa4hbNVQHpHk8-rL_h4eq5pL6d6fVtZp2HtEQAw0KZKHzXAFwOE3KWSFwwL7dGCnH4G-Ij2zYO4bHWY3-DjgSAC45AR8CtZGAqLX9OfuP2YQNnF7B-UfLPwiw7dc6CWlzqyE8Nz-X0A9ZOSOKbGijCFQLf_02Agf4uJ7rDS7hc9C2c06BgskZaP06ewzNt-bRqiwsuXcSCGv8WzVIOQEuEMU7sfcO7IgpqAUrinqbSiMf7bA4qc90LSYOZLNj2-bgxMmd8fXhRXhhv1AfvHRXeeXxk0apaYKiN)
---
| | Peter,
---
| | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...

clean_body: If this seat flips, Republicans keep power. There is no alternate path to the majority without holding NY-04. | = | Peter, I know we have asked you to give already but we are asking again because this race is that close. We are asking you to give $10 to Laura’s campaign because protecting this seat is essential if Democrats are going to retake the House. $10 to defend a seat that was decided by just 2 points last time around. $10 to prepare for a rematch with Anthony D’Esposito after he was exposed for giving his mistress a taxpayer-funded no-show job and named one of the most corrupt members of Congress. $10 to block Republicans from taking back this seat and keeping control of the House. We know $10 does not sound like much. But in a race like this small contributions add up fast and they matter. If this seat flips, Republicans keep power. There is no alternate path to the majority without holding NY-04. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Gillen * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. Peter, as Vicente Gonzalez’s March 3rd primary approaches, I have an important update on his campaign.
_[Here's the good news:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124973198/600287474/-505866608?amount=15&refcode=20260208_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTk1NzQ0ZS1mZjA0LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fNt8yvc2BDgNVpoR7xV4lkSFIgYufRFhS_Sn6bn3CU=)_ Last year’s elections showed us that Americans have had enough. People across the country are tired of the GOP’s chaos, lies and attacks on our families, veterans and those just trying to get by.
_[The bad news:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124973205/600287480/-505866608?amount=15&refcode=20260208_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTk1NzQ0ZS1mZjA0LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fNt8yvc2BDgNVpoR7xV4lkSFIgYufRFhS_Sn6bn3CU=)_ Extreme Republicans are continuing to try to cheat their way back into power by rigging the midterm elections. They are pouring millions of dollars into states across the country to gerrymander congressional maps like in Texas and subvert the will of the voters.
[That's why we're asking for your help, Peter.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124973212/600287487/-505866608?amount=15&refcode=20260208_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTk1NzQ0ZS1mZjA0LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fNt8yvc2BDgNVpoR7xV4lkSFIgYufRFhS_Sn6bn3CU=)
This election will be neck-and-neck. The latest polls show Democrats in a statistical TIE in the race for control of Congress, and extreme MAGA Republicans have already raised [$2 BILLION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124973218/600287493/-505866608?amount=15&refcode=20260208_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTk1NzQ0ZS1mZjA0LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fNt8yvc2BDgNVpoR7xV4lkSFIgYufRFhS_Sn6bn3CU=) to defeat us. We can’t take on their billionaire donors alone.
[House Democrats are fighting for you, Peter. Fighting for affordability, lower healthcare costs and better jobs. Vicente Gonzalez is on the frontlines of this fight and needs support before his upcoming primary. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124973224/600287500/-505866608?amount=15&refcode=20260208_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTk1NzQ0ZS1mZjA0LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fNt8yvc2BDgNVpoR7xV4lkSFIgYufRFhS_Sn6bn3CU=)[_Will you split a donation between my campaign and Vicente Gonzalez’s to support our fight for a better future? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124973228/600287507/-505866608?amount=15&refcode=20260208_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTk1NzQ0ZS1mZjA0LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fNt8yvc2BDgNVpoR7xV4lkSFIgYufRFhS_Sn6bn3CU=)

Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family.

Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. | Hi Peter, I wanted to share a little bit about my journey and why I’m running for Congress.

Before I decided to run, I had the privilege of serving Pennsylvanians under Senator Casey and Governor Wolf. I’ll tell you more about that in just a moment, but if you’re ready to help me continue fighting for our communities in Washington, I hope you’ll [_**make a donation to my campaign today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124973878/600289709/1474349798?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2026-02-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDdiNmMxZmItMDAwNS1mMTExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6u-CNhs7g0NKJvDwuE8aMQqNHth4hi-09sGEnnp1HTE=)

In 2011, Senator Bob Casey asked me to be his Regional Manager in Lehigh, Northampton, Carbon, and Berks Counties, and I served as his Statewide Latino Affairs Advisor. I worked one-on-one with thousands of people in our community, connecting them to services that made a real difference in their lives. I went to bat for them, and I’m proud to have delivered results.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124973882/600289713/1474349798?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2026-02-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDdiNmMxZmItMDAwNS1mMTExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6u-CNhs7g0NKJvDwuE8aMQqNHth4hi-09sGEnnp1HTE=)
A few years later, I joined Governor Tom Wolf’s Advisory Commission on Latino Affairs, representing the Lehigh Valley. I pushed for policies that truly supported working families and advocated for our community’s needs at the highest level of state government.

I’ve seen firsthand how important it is to listen to people, understand their struggles, and take action to make life better for them. And now, I’m running for Congress because I believe PA-07 deserves someone who shows up, listens, and actually gets things done.

But here’s the thing: This race is going to take everything we’ve got. We need your support to stay competitive and keep pushing forward.

[_**Will you chip in today to help us continue this fight and make sure PA-07 gets the representation it deserves?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124973884/600289714/1474349798?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2026-02-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDdiNmMxZmItMDAwNS1mMTExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6u-CNhs7g0NKJvDwuE8aMQqNHth4hi-09sGEnnp1HTE=)

body:
My father and I couldn’t do this without patriots like you. Open this note of gratitude. |
Fellow American, it's Don Jr. I wanted to take a moment to **express my heartfelt gratitude** for **your unwavering support**. My father and I know that this fight **isn't possible without patriots like you** who are willing to stand up for what's right.

We're honored to have you on our team, **Fellow American.**

**[As a small token of our appreciation, I'd like to share a special message with you. name: Joe Jaworski
subject: This campaign is in the 4th Quarter
disclaimer_text: paid for by Joe Jaworski Campaign
body:
In politics, like in sports, championships aren’t won on hype alone. They’re won because someone showed up and did the work. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas.com/last-night-14192664?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=c03cf7b441&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | , Tonight, millions of Americans will gather around their TVs for the Super Bowl. It’s one of the few moments left when the country pauses together. No matter where you’re from, you know what led us to this evening: preparation, discipline, teamwork, and execution under pressure. **That’s not just football. That’s how you win anything that matters.** In politics, like in sports, championships aren’t won on hype alone. They’re won because someone showed up early, did the work, stayed focused, and played through the final whistle. That’s exactly how we’re running this campaign for Texas Attorney General. We’ve spent months preparing. We’ve traveled the state. We’ve listened to voters. We’ve built momentum the hard way. And now we’re entering the stretch that decides the outcome. **This campaign is in the fourth quarter.** What we do right now determines whether we finish strong in March. Resources matter. Organization matters. Execution matters. And just like in the Super Bowl, you don’t ease up when the stakes are highest. [**If you’re settling in tonight, I’m asking you to take a moment and help us keep pushing forward. Your contribution right now helps us stay disciplined, stay visible, and stay competitive all the way through the primary.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=f34d4496d4&e=5d8d80652b) This is how you win. You prepare, you commit, and you finish the job. Enjoy the night, enjoy the game, and thank you for being part of this team. Onward!

**
**
---

body:
Jose really wants to hear from you. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124975788/600293530/1546157161?refcode=em_JJR_FR_SurveyFWD_020826&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDdiNzgzMTUtMDMwNS1mMTExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BXG6ArtQcv7XdCGXOzeDV0uOI1i4A-M-qHjkes5bvl0=&emci=8623d002-af03-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=07b78315-0305-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=32374386)
---
Quick note, Peter — As Jose travels across Florida talking directly with voters, one thing is clear: people want leaders who listen and act on their concerns. That’s why we’re reaching out. You haven’t weighed in yet on our February Priorities Survey, and your response is important. Jose reviews this feedback personally to help guide his work and focus on what matters most to Floridians. From corruption and rising costs to public safety and accountability, we want to know what issues you care about most. **[Can you take 2 minutes right now to make your voice heard?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124975792/600293541/400044891?refcode=em_JJR_FR_SurveyFWD_020826&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDdiNzgzMTUtMDMwNS1mMTExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BXG6ArtQcv7XdCGXOzeDV0uOI1i4A-M-qHjkes5bvl0=&emci=8623d002-af03-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=07b78315-0305-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=32374386)** | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124975796/600293546/400044891?refcode=em_JJR_FR_SurveyFWD_020826&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDdiNzgzMTUtMDMwNS1mMTExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BXG6ArtQcv7XdCGXOzeDV0uOI1i4A-M-qHjkes5bvl0=&emci=8623d002-af03-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=07b78315-0305-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=32374386) **
---
Thank you,
Team Rodriguez

**\----Original Message----**
**From:** Jose Javier Rodriguez
**Date:** Sun, Feb 1, 2026 at 9:00 AM
**Subject:** I’d love to hear from you, Peter!
> Peter, I can't tell you how grateful I am for this team.
> Your support in January was absolutely essential to our work building a movement that can take on James Uthmeier and restore integrity to the Attorney General's office — and I know that I can count on you to hang in this fight with me as long as it takes.
> I ask so much of you, Peter. I want you to know that I'm on YOUR team, too.
> The first responsibility of any elected official is to represent the interests of the people. That means listening to what you and your communities need — from cracking down on corruption in Tallahassee to fighting the skyrocketing insurance rates and utility bills crushing Florida families.
> Whatever you're concerned about, hope for, or want to share with me: I want to hear about it. It's critical to me to know what priorities our supporters want to see addressed when I'm Attorney General.
> **[So please, start off February by filling out our Feb. 2026 Priorities Survey (it should only take a minute or two of your time) — I can't wait to hear from you!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124975797/600293549/400044891?refcode=em_JJR_FR_SurveyFWD_020826&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDdiNzgzMTUtMDMwNS1mMTExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BXG6ArtQcv7XdCGXOzeDV0uOI1i4A-M-qHjkes5bvl0=&emci=8623d002-af03-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=07b78315-0305-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=32374386)**

clean_body: Jose really wants to hear from you. | Quick note, Peter — As Jose travels across Florida talking directly with voters, one thing is clear: people want leaders who listen and act on their concerns. That’s why we’re reaching out. You haven’t weighed in yet on our February Priorities Survey, and your response is important. Jose reviews this feedback personally to help guide his work and focus on what matters most to Floridians. From corruption and rising costs to public safety and accountability, we want to know what issues you care about most. | Thank you, Team Rodriguez \----Original Message---- From: Jose Javier Rodriguez Date: Sun, Feb 1, 2026 at 9:00 AM Subject: I’d love to hear from you, Peter! Peter, I can't tell you how grateful I am for this team. Your support in January was absolutely essential to our work building a movement that can take on James Uthmeier and restore integrity to the Attorney General's office — and I know that I can count on you to hang in this fight with me as long as it takes. I ask so much of you, Peter. I want you to know that I'm on YOUR team, too. The first responsibility of any elected official is to represent the interests of the people. That means listening to what you and your communities need — from cracking down on corruption in Tallahassee to fighting the skyrocketing insurance rates and utility bills crushing Florida families. Whatever you're concerned about, hope for, or want to share with me: I want to hear about it. It's critical to me to know what priorities our supporters want to see addressed when I'm Attorney General. --- All my best, Jose Javier Rodriguez = | = = PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL Jose Javier Rodriguez for Attorney General 701 S. Howard Avenue #106-813 Tampa, FL 33606

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: I’m running for governor of the state of Minnesota
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Minnesotans for Klobuchar
body:
To accomplish everything we’re setting out to do, I need your support.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124976019/600293987/1731349845?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_KlobucharSplit_260208_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmI2ODMxNS0wMzA1LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yO0TrtiesulFIrbEZ_RTGQO0RGy0fDHbTy7LVZZsK2s=) Derek —

I wanted you to be one of the first to hear the news: I’m running for governor of the state of Minnesota. **This is a home-grown campaign, born in a moment like no other.**

[_**I’m going to tell you why in a moment. But first: Will you help us get off to a strong start by splitting a donation between Mark Warner and my campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124976020/600293988/1731349845?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_KlobucharSplit_260208_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmI2ODMxNS0wMzA1LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yO0TrtiesulFIrbEZ_RTGQO0RGy0fDHbTy7LVZZsK2s=)

I’m not going to sugar coat it — Minnesota has been through a lot.

The killings of two innocent Minnesotans. Three thousand ICE agents on our streets and in our towns, sent by an administration that relishes division. Minnesotans stood up. Our state has been the center of America’s heartbreak. But we have also been the center of America's courage and America's hope. In moments of enormous difficulty, we find strength in our Minnesota values of hard work, freedom, and simple decency and good will.

**These moments call for grit and resilience.** I’ve learned resilience from the people of Minnesota. They have stood up, they have marched, and they have brought food to their neighbors. Through it all we do not give up.

And grit? I learned that from my family. I’m the daughter of a newspaperman and a proud union member teacher. My grandpa worked 1500 feet underground in the mines on the Iron Range, and he saved his money in a coffee can in the basement to send my dad to college. I wouldn’t be where I am today without them.

**These times call for leaders who can stand up and not be rubber stamps of this administration.** But who are also willing to find common ground and fix things in our state.

I led our state’s biggest prosecutors’ office for eight years and then you gave me the honor of serving as your United States Senator. I was ranked number one in the Senate for bipartisan bills and number three out of one hundred for getting bills passed into law.

**I will do my job without fear or favor. I’ve never shied away from taking on the powerful. That’s what I did as prosecutor. That’s what I did as senator. And that’s what I will do as your governor.**

I believe we must stand up for what’s right. And fix what’s wrong. I am running for every Minnesotan who wants to buy their first home, for every parent who wants a better world for their kids, for everyone who wants more affordable healthcare. I am running for every Minnesotan who wants to protect our democracy and get ICE and its abusive tactics out of the state we love.

And I'm running for every student, farmer, dreamer and builder.

_But to accomplish everything we’re setting out to do, I need your support._

**This campaign is for people who believe in something bigger than ourselves. For people who know that things have got to change.**

[_**So please: Will you support my campaign for governor with a donation today? Your contribution will be split with Mark Warner.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124976021/600293989/1731349845?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_KlobucharSplit_260208_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmI2ODMxNS0wMzA1LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yO0TrtiesulFIrbEZ_RTGQO0RGy0fDHbTy7LVZZsK2s=)

**I like my job in the Senate. But I love our state more than any job.** I love the people of Minnesota. And Minnesota, I want to be a transformative governor.

Now is our moment to renew our commitment to the common good. I’m asking you to look up to the North Star and to see that there is a better future before us.

To pursue good, we must believe that good will prevail. I know I do — and that’s why I’m asking you to join us.

Amy ******[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124976022/600293990/1731349845?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_KlobucharSplit_260208_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmI2ODMxNS0wMzA1LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yO0TrtiesulFIrbEZ_RTGQO0RGy0fDHbTy7LVZZsK2s=)****** Prepared and Paid for by Minnesotans for Klobuchar

* * *
---
|
---
| Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States
---

| Click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/2Buh_-FbSkCM8ZUa-iiD5Q2?unsubscribedata=xaoNC%2Baa1nCmWHVfSirO9sq8d%2BBHmIxQY58Ji%2FQIRouMAPUotmW8l0jhw5mXqv4nWmbe8OlT9gXBBYd5CON1oUn8jFjgjjt5nx007j3vWkdIeNeH9raMxA9GfjlIqQgL3GzZZUigJesjlSJHembEiviZu2w7FH9RjzF%2BYh%2BjxBoV3GwuOxCs1lz5pONvzSAV1jhiEN6VYrg1oB41gOryemfplC67eakLK2sBHYBk5lELjR%2BO%2BeSmlOsHNbbkZhWDeolp34x0%2F2TzlIY%2BOP0tMafceepklzYNEZVV22RUXWpJR4sJErEis86GbPLedqlxGmY%2FuDlbXaNRF3cJsF%2BvfRdbZcIe1BY9E%2BwTfEZr4F5LUuf8nt5AnwXOW12bZpZWa%2F7dUN3iWmYjQ%2FbJz%2Fdv2K%2B58wy1OSl6lHcsAICwEsE%3D).

I’m asking you to look up to the North Star and to see that there is a better future before us. To pursue good, we must believe that good will prevail. I know I do — and that’s why I’m asking you to join us. Amy ****=** Prepared and Paid for by Minnesotans for Klobuchar | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124977217/600297423/552174336?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_020826_B1_VINDMANSPLIT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Yzk0M2Y1NS0wNTA1LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jc8Csir_muYq3d7E_btc1ZOUPeZ8yabotPYRj3Ya1rg=) Peter, My name is Alex Vindman, and I wanted you to hear directly from me: I am running for the United States Senate in Florida. I’ll explain more about why I chose to run, but if you already know the stakes of this race — and are fired up to defeat Donald Trump’s top ally in the Senate — then please become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia: | | **[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124977223/600297428/552174336?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_020826_B1_VINDMANSPLIT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Yzk0M2Y1NS0wNTA1LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jc8Csir_muYq3d7E_btc1ZOUPeZ8yabotPYRj3Ya1rg=)**

I swore an oath to protect this country when I joined the U.S. Army more than two decades ago.
In 2019, I honored that oath by blowing the whistle on Donald Trump’s corrupt phone call with Ukraine, an act that led to Trump’s first impeachment and ultimately cost me my military career.
**People told me to keep my head down. But my family came here as refugees to escape tyranny. I sure as hell wasn’t going to bow down to a wannabe tyrant.**
This president unleashed a reign of terror and retribution, not just against me and my family, but against all of us.
Today, our country is in chaos. We are entering a dark chapter of American history, one that echoes early stages of authoritarian power consolidation seen elsewhere.
Thug militias attacking citizens. Tariffs pushing prices sky-high. Healthcare premiums through the roof. While all of this is happening, my opponent refuses to put the interests of the American people before her own self-interest.
Ashley Moody screwed Florida homeowners by caving to the big insurance companies, supported this administration that gutted disaster help for communities trying to rebuild, and had over a million dollars in her corporate stock traded last year while she had access to insider information only Congress gets.
They put Ashley Moody in the Senate to be a ‘yes’ vote for Trump and the billionaires. She’s not Florida’s senator. She’s theirs.
We need someone who isn’t afraid to put a check on an outlaw president, to defend our democracy, and to make sure that every American has a fair chance at prosperity.
**That is why I am running for Senate, and why I am humbly asking you:**
[Will you split a donation of any amount between my Senate campaign in Florida and the Democratic Party of Georgia before midnight? Your donations add up quickly when everyone is chipping in.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124977226/600297434/552174336?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_020826_B1_VINDMANSPLIT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Yzk0M2Y1NS0wNTA1LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jc8Csir_muYq3d7E_btc1ZOUPeZ8yabotPYRj3Ya1rg=)

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = = Peter, My name is Alex Vindman, and I wanted you to hear directly from me: I am running for the United States Senate in Florida. I’ll explain more about why I chose to run, but if you already know the stakes of this race — and are fired up to defeat Donald Trump’s top ally in the Senate — then please become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia: | | = I swore an oath to protect this country when I joined the U.S. Army more than two decades ago. In 2019, I honored that oath by blowing the whistle on Donald Trump’s corrupt phone call with Ukraine, an act that led to Trump’s first impeachment and ultimately cost me my military career. People told me to keep my head down. But my family came here as refugees to escape tyranny. I sure as hell wasn’t going to bow down to a wannabe tyrant. This president unleashed a reign of terror and retribution, not just against me and my family, but against all of us. Today, our country is in chaos. We are entering a dark chapter of American history, one that echoes early stages of authoritarian power consolidation seen elsewhere. Thug militias attacking citizens. Tariffs pushing prices sky-high. Healthcare premiums through the roof. While all of this is happening, my opponent refuses to put the interests of the American people before her own self-interest. Ashley Moody screwed Florida homeowners by caving to the big insurance companies, supported this administration that gutted disaster help for communities trying to rebuild, and had over a million dollars in her corporate stock traded last year while she had access to insider information only Congress gets. They put Ashley Moody in the Senate to be a ‘yes’ vote for Trump and the billionaires. She’s not Florida’s senator. She’s theirs. We need someone who isn’t afraid to put a check on an outlaw president, to defend our democracy, and to make sure that every American has a fair chance at prosperity. That is why I am running for Senate, and why I am humbly asking you: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately to Alex Vindman and the Democratic Party of Georgia: | = | = | = | = | = | = The billionaires and special interests will throw everything they’ve got to try and stop us. name: Keith Ellison
subject: Trump’s DOJ just subpoenaed my office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keith Ellison for Attorney General
body:
Team,

Trump is weaponizing the justice system against any leader who dares stand
up to him.

My office just received a criminal grand jury subpoena from the DOJ
related to our work on federal immigration enforcement — which arrived
shortly after we sued the Trump Administration to challenge their illegal
actions here in Minnesota.

Let’s be clear about why this is happening: Donald Trump is coming after
the people of Minnesota, and I’m standing in his way.

I will not be intimidated, and I will not stop working to protect
Minnesotans from Trump’s campaign of retaliation and revenge. But I need
support from people like you.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=partner_em260208ke_demandjusticepac.PvnFQr&refcode=em20260208-61150&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=61150%2E1407376%2EbfIa7X ]Will you split a donation of $10, $25, $50, or any amount between our
campaign and Demand Justice PAC to help us fight back?

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=partner_em260208ke_demandjusticepac.PvnFQr&amount=5&refcode=em20260208-61150&t=1020&akid=61150%2E1407376%2EbfIa7X ]Donate $5 ››

Thank you,

Keith Ellison
Minnesota Attorney General

Prepared and Paid for by Keith Ellison for Attorney General

name: Powered by People
subject: Enduring connections instead of a late ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240672%2E444211%2EzvXiW2)
We’re treating every day as a countdown.
**Before you know it, we’ll be out of time to turn voters out for the November election.** That’s why we’re out there doing the work right now.
It just won’t work to show up once in late October to ask someone for their vote. Our amazing team is on the ground, meeting voters and prospective voters in person, making a connection, and then staying in touch with these voters all the way through Election Day to ensure that they cast their ballots.
In 2024, this organizing program took a voter turnout rate of 37% for young Texans to 79% for the voters we worked with.
But building our organizing team across Texas is expensive. We’re maximizing every dollar, but our reach is only as far as our supporters allow. We truly are powered by people.
[**That’s why we’re asking you to give $3—or whatever you can—today. No matter the size, your gift will be invested in our effort to drive turnout and win upset elections across Texas.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260208.07vPFt&refcode=ema20260208-240672&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=240672%2E444211%2EzvXiW2)

Thank you,
Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

name: Ilhan Omar via Justice Democrats
subject: Stories from Minnesota
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, these are
accounts from Minnesota in the days since the murder of Renee Good. Please
read on.

ICE agents at a Target in Richfield, Minnesota grabbed a teenage employee
who was heckling them — as is your legal right — and threw him to the
ground. They shoved him in a van and drove away.

The boy was an American citizen who was yelling that he had his passport
in his pocket. They didn’t listen until he was detained. Since they had no
authority to arrest him, agents dumped him in a Walmart parking lot down
the road with no way to get home. He was found injured, bleeding, and
crying for help. A child.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260208-io.EDTS_K&refcode=em20260208-37444&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=37444%2E1203867%2E24LLo- ]Photo of ICE attacking an underage American citizen at a Target in
Minnesota.

Christian Molina, a Latino man and US citizen, was driving to work in
South Minneapolis when ICE agents crashed into his car to force him to
stop. Why? Because he looked “illegal.” Christian refused to cooperate
with the illegal stop. When neighbors came to the scene to observe and
support, ICE tear gassed the crowd and left.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260208-io.EDTS_K&refcode=em20260208-37444&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=37444%2E1203867%2E24LLo- ]Photo of Christian Molina's car damaged by ICE.Christian Molina’s car
after ICE rammed into him.

At a gas station in St. Paul, a man was practicing his legal right to film
and observe ICE activities when an ICE agent randomly grabbed him. More
agents came over and violently threw him to the ground, arrested him, and
dragged him away to an unmarked van. Arrested for exercising his First
Amendment rights.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260208-io.EDTS_K&refcode=em20260208-37444&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=37444%2E1203867%2E24LLo- ]Photo of a man being attacked and arrested by ICE.

At an electric car charging station in Minneapolis, ICE agents went car to
car looking for people of color, asking each to prove they were citizens
or risk being dragged away.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260208-io.EDTS_K&refcode=em20260208-37444&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=37444%2E1203867%2E24LLo- ]Photo of ICE agents asking a driver for proof of citizenship.

At a protest in Minneapolis, multiple masked ICE agents detained a
protester and US citizen by grabbing her by the throat and choking her.
She was thrown into an unmarked van and disappeared.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260208-io.EDTS_K&refcode=em20260208-37444&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=37444%2E1203867%2E24LLo- ]Photo of a young woman being choked by ICE.

In Richfield, ICE swarmed the car of a US citizen with guns drawn, forced
him out, and made him get on his knees, an unlawful detention under the
Fourth Amendment. After he confirmed his citizenship, they had no choice
but to let him go.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260208-io.EDTS_K&refcode=em20260208-37444&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1007&akid=37444%2E1203867%2E24LLo- ]Photo of ICE agents with guns drawn surrounding a man on his knees.

In Minneapolis, ICE approached a U.S. citizen and community volunteer,
shattered his car window, dragged him out, and threw him to the ground. As
they arrested him, they put a knee on his neck: an illegal maneuver that
caused the death of George Floyd in 2020.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260208-io.EDTS_K&refcode=em20260208-37444&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1008&akid=37444%2E1203867%2E24LLo- ]Photo of ICE agents kneeling on a man's neck.

If you can believe it, I could keep going. There are hundreds if not
thousands of incidents like these in just the last two weeks. Folks
outside of Minnesota may not understand the scale and severity of the
chaos that ICE has unleashed.

Every day, ICE is harassing, beating, arresting, and violating the civil
rights of US citizens and immigrants alike.

If Trump can sic this fascist violence on Minnesota, he can do it
anywhere, on any of his political opponents and those who choose to stand
up for their communities.

We’ve talked about Trump’s many violations of the Constitution, but what
is happening in Minnesota right now is a dire Constitutional crisis: an
all-out assault on the rule of law and civil rights by out-of-control
government thugs that face zero accountability. We’ve seen this story play
out before in Germany, Italy, and fascist states throughout history. It
can’t happen again.

I’m calling on progressives across the country to stand with Minnesota and
help us fight back against ICE’s crackdowns. We cannot let them get away
with terrorizing our neighbors and beating people in the streets.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260208-io.EDTS_K&refcode=em20260208-37444&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1009&akid=37444%2E1203867%2E24LLo- ]If you can, consider splitting a contribution between my campaign and
Justice Democrats to support our movement today. Donating may seem like a
small act and simple, but it makes a world of difference as we build the
resources we need to defeat MAGA and the far-right extremists in the White
House.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260208-io.EDTS_K&refcode=em20260208-37444&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1028&akid=37444%2E1203867%2E24LLo- ]Contribute $5

It’s important for me to share these stories with you, so that Americans
understand the violence and chaos being unleashed by their own president.

It’s unacceptable, and we must fight back for the sake of our democracy.

In solidarity,

Ilhan Omar

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20260208-37444-footer&t=1029&refcode2=37444_1203867_24LLo-&akid=37444%2E1203867%2E24LLo-

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1030&akid=37444%2E1203867%2E24LLo-

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

In Richfield, ICE swarmed the car of a US citizen with guns drawn, forced him out, and made him get on his knees, an unlawful detention under the Fourth Amendment. After he confirmed his citizenship, they had no choice but to let him go. [ - ]Photo of ICE agents with guns drawn surrounding a man on his knees. In Minneapolis, ICE approached a U.S. citizen and community volunteer, shattered his car window, dragged him out, and threw him to the ground. As they arrested him, they put a knee on his neck: an illegal maneuver that caused the death of George Floyd in 2020. [ - ]Photo of ICE agents kneeling on a man's neck. If you can believe it, I could keep going. There are hundreds if not thousands of incidents like these in just the last two weeks. Folks outside of Minnesota may not understand the scale and severity of the chaos that ICE has unleashed. Every day, ICE is harassing, beating, arresting, and violating the civil rights of US citizens and immigrants alike. If Trump can sic this fascist violence on Minnesota, he can do it anywhere, on any of his political opponents and those who choose to stand up for their communities. We’ve talked about Trump’s many violations of the Constitution, but what is happening in Minnesota right now is a dire Constitutional crisis: an all-out assault on the rule of law and civil rights by out-of-control government thugs that face zero accountability. We’ve seen this story play out before in Germany, Italy, and fascist states throughout history. It can’t happen again. I’m calling on progressives across the country to stand with Minnesota and help us fight back against ICE’s crackdowns. We cannot let them get away with terrorizing our neighbors and beating people in the streets. [ - ]If you can, consider splitting a contribution between my campaign and Justice Democrats to support our movement today. Donating may seem like a small act and simple, but it makes a world of difference as we build the resources we need to defeat MAGA and the far-right extremists in the White House. [ - ]Contribute $5 It’s important for me to share these stories with you, so that Americans understand the violence and chaos being unleashed by their own president. It’s unacceptable, and we must fight back for the sake of our democracy. In solidarity, Ilhan Omar Contribute to Justice Democrats: -

In my life, I've been a combat pilot and an astronaut. I'm a father, a husband, a grandfather, and a senator. And now, I'm honored to be one of your DSCC Vice Chairs, working to win back a Democratic Senate majority.

**Through it all, I've learned the importance of asking for help when it's needed — _especially_ when faced with a difficult situation.**

**[So I'll be blunt with you:_Your country_ needs your help right now to flip the Senate blue >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/22350?amount=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20260208-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260208-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&akid=22628%2E9716520%2EmWYD8r)**

| [DONATE $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/22350?amount=5&t=13&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20260208-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260208-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&akid=22628%2E9716520%2EmWYD8r)
---

Falling short of that mission is _not an option_ if we want to stop Donald Trump's chaos and abuses. **But Democrats are facing two serious challenges that could keep us out of the majority:**

1. National Republicans spent over $500 million to take back the Senate, and now they're saying they'll spend at _least_ that much on just TWO of their top target races.

2. Trump controls _all_ the power of the American presidency, and he's using it to attack and intimidate people into silence — making our job as Democrats even harder.

**We need an _immediate_ surge of resources to fight back and win.** But right now, we're falling short of our critical $50,000 fundraising goal. And at this crucial early stage in the fight, failure to launch would spell disaster.

**[So I'm humbly asking you: Will you chip in $5 today to help us flip the Senate? Your contribution before midnight would mean the world to me >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/22350?amount=5&t=14&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20260208-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260208-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&akid=22628%2E9716520%2EmWYD8r)**

_**[Will you answer Mark Kelly's call to fight back against National Republicans by flipping the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/22350?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20260208-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260208-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&akid=22628%2E9716520%2EmWYD8r)**_

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=9514%2E5257348%2EdXKzr2 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, we wanted to make sure you saw Adam’s note. He laid out
how Democrats can flip the Senate in November.

That's going to take significant resources, and we need your help.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12026_abs_em.43HrbP&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20260208_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=9514%2E5257348%2EdXKzr2 ]So please, read Adam's note and add a donation today:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12026_abs_em.43HrbP&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20260208_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=9514%2E5257348%2EdXKzr2 ]DONATE

Thanks,

Schiff HQ

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Adam Schiff
Date: January 31, 2026
Subject: We have a path to flip the Senate

Derek, a year ago, most people looking at the 2026 Senate map
would have said that Democrats had a brutal path to victory.

That has completely changed.

I was recently on the Bulwark laying out why there’s a real reason for
optimism, and why flipping the Senate is genuinely within reach.

We have the advantage of so many strong candidates who have decided to
challenge Republican incumbents in competitive seats. There are four
states unquestionably in play because of that: North Carolina, Ohio,
Maine, and Alaska. And in states we need to hold, our incumbents are
performing well.

Put it together, and the Senate is back on the board.

In a midterm where people are recoiling against the president — we saw in
the 2025 November elections just how much the pendulum had already swung
against him — it makes a swing like this very doable for the Senate in
2026.

But none of this happens on autopilot. To pull this off, we have to run
the table — and that takes serious resources.

We have the advantage of support from millions of small-dollar donors and
volunteers, but it’s going to take every ounce of our combined effort.

That’s why I’m here, asking for your support. [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12026_abs_em.43HrbP&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20260208_AM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=9514%2E5257348%2EdXKzr2 ]With your help, we can
reach the voters we need to make it happen. Can you chip in today?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1040?c0=q12026_abs_em.Tpzh5t&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20260208_AM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=9514%2E5257348%2EdXKzr2 ]EXPRESS DONATE $5

Thanks,

Adam

# [Bad Bunny Will Win the Super Bowl Halftime Show](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3159258&post_id=187295219&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg3Mjk1MjE5LCJpYXQiOjE3NzA1Njc0OTksImV4cCI6MTc3MzE1OTQ5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMxNTkyNTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.cmEXgFgEYPTeAWb934Q5i9c-BIBLC-JGe3icuwhnrIM)
### The backlash is predictable, loud, and irrelevant.
| | [The Angry Democrat](https://substack.com/@theangrydem)
---
| Feb 8
---
| [](https://substack.com/@theangrydem)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3159258&post_id=187295219&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg3Mjk1MjE5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3MDU2NzQ5OSwiZXhwIjoxNzczMTU5NDk5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzE1OTI1OCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.RKeByOu_hf8tU-pvVFZjxBU4FNQTsOTM8I5dVZ1p-mw&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3159258&post_id=187295219&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg3Mjk1MjE5LCJpYXQiOjE3NzA1Njc0OTksImV4cCI6MTc3MzE1OTQ5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMxNTkyNTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.cmEXgFgEYPTeAWb934Q5i9c-BIBLC-JGe3icuwhnrIM&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3159258&post_id=187295219&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg3Mjk1MjE5LCJpYXQiOjE3NzA1Njc0OTksImV4cCI6MTc3MzE1OTQ5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMxNTkyNTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.cmEXgFgEYPTeAWb934Q5i9c-BIBLC-JGe3icuwhnrIM)
