| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mattdiemer/p/bad-bunny-will-win-the-super-bowl?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I wanted to put this out there before the Super Bowl kicks off, because I already know what's coming. We've seen this movie before. The onslaught has already started.
Stay Angry and Subscribe
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..6arRGwRPs-4ILeOxImjE4F0ghE7Wn8c-Bp76y9WZyvs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=187295219)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/89a9284d-c756-414d-b884-797e4b66be48?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Bad Bunny
Bad Bunny is headlining the Super Bowl halftime show, and you can practically set your watch by the reaction. There is going to be a flood of criticism from the same predictable corners. Bigoted, small-minded outrage dressed up as concern for "American culture." Complaints about how this doesn't represent "real America." Complaints about how the music isn't recognizable enough, isn't in English, isn't a Leonard Skynyrd cover band, an AC/DC reunion tour, or some nostalgia act that makes certain people feel comfortable.
And it will be loud. **Very loud.**
What's funny is that the people who actually enjoy the halftime show usually don't spend much time complaining online. They're watching the game. Eating. Drinking. Hanging out with friends and family. The outrage almost always comes from a minority that is extremely good at being **BIG MAD.**
Which makes me get Groundhog's Day vibes every year. This "outrage" happens every damn year.
For example...
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..6arRGwRPs-4ILeOxImjE4F0ghE7Wn8c-Bp76y9WZyvs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=187295219)
#### Past Super Bowls
Every time the Super Bowl halftime show strays from a narrow, cookie-cutter idea of what America is supposed to look or sound like, the backlash follows immediately. And every time, it's framed as something new or shocking, even though it never is.
Take recent memory.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f8d00211-80ca-4bf7-bb3b-1ed1ec8da932?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
2025 Super Bowl halftime show Kendrick Lamar
In 2025, Super Bowl 59 featured Kendrick Lamar. This was right in the middle of the Kendrick Lamar and Drake beef, which was already a perfectly primed social media frenzy. Before Kendrick even stepped on stage, you already knew the criticisms were coming. People called it "ghetto." "Low-life trash." Language that surprised absolutely no one, because we've heard it before.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/66719356-e840-4aed-8dcc-85421cfc0352?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In 2023, Super Bowl 57 featured Rihanna. Pregnant. Returning to the stage after years away, after building a massive business empire, starting a family, and choosing to perform while visibly pregnant. The criticisms came fast. It was boring. She didn't move enough. She gained weight. She can't dance anymore. And of course, the familiar refrain that it was the "worst halftime show ever," supposedly geared toward "a very specific demographic." Everyone knew exactly what that meant.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3e43c44f-c613-4f71-aa35-9f4bf13c13b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
2023 Super Bowl halftime show featuring Rihanna
Which is especially ironic when you remember that hip hop and R&B are among the most listened-to genres globally. This was not niche music. **She had some have the biggest songs of 21st century so far.** But in actuality, it was just music performed by a black woman on the biggest stage in the country. People got triggered.
Then there was 2022. Dr. Dre. Snoop Dogg. Eminem. Mary J. Blige. Kendrick Lamar. An all-time lineup. Legends. Artists whose music defined entire generations. For a lot of people in their 30's & 40's, that show was pure nostalgia. From The Chronic to Doggy Style to Slim Shady to Mary J., it was a reminder of riding around in the backseat of your friends cars with their 12" Rockford Fosgate subwoofers giving you a back massage and getting you a little sick tbh.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/25f55b01-a9d6-4a22-b65b-9facdfdfc85a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
2022 Super Bowl halftime show featuring Eminem Dr. Dre, Mary J. Blige, Snoop Dogg, Kendrick Lamar
And yet, the backlash was immediate. Charlie Kirk called it "sexual anarchy." Others said it shouldn't have been televised. Some dismissed it as nostalgia bait. Others said we should have had Ted Nugent, Kid Rock, or Lee Greenwood instead. Again, the context was obvious. Nobody was confused about what was being said.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9b4e2c62-acce-4256-992b-b4ecc6a22672?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d9463e41-c25b-41df-8fe7-ed34757152a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3159258&post_id=187295219&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg3Mjk1MjE5LCJpYXQiOjE3NzA1Njc0OTksImV4cCI6MTc3MzE1OTQ5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMxNTkyNTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.cmEXgFgEYPTeAWb934Q5i9c-BIBLC-JGe3icuwhnrIM)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3159258&post_id=187295219&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg3Mjk1MjE5LCJpYXQiOjE3NzA1Njc0OTksImV4cCI6MTc3MzE1OTQ5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMxNTkyNTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.cmEXgFgEYPTeAWb934Q5i9c-BIBLC-JGe3icuwhnrIM)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3159258&post_id=187295219&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg3Mjk1MjE5LCJpYXQiOjE3NzA1Njc0OTksImV4cCI6MTc3MzE1OTQ5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMxNTkyNTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.cmEXgFgEYPTeAWb934Q5i9c-BIBLC-JGe3icuwhnrIM)
### Why Bad Bunny Is Going to Win Anyway
Which brings us to Bad Bunny.
My prediction is simple. The same cycle will repeat, but with a different ending. The criticism will be loud. Immigration rhetoric will creep in. Border control talking points. "Send them back" dog whistles. Complaints about Spanish lyrics. Complaints about not understanding the words.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/789b35c4-a57e-4c07-a745-7f2d7ef4907a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)| | |
#### [Winners and Losers of 2026](https://substack.com/redirect/789b35c4-a57e-4c07-a745-7f2d7ef4907a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [The Angry Democrat](https://substack.com/profile/102996536-the-angry-democrat)| | *
---|---|---
| Jan 12
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/789b35c4-a57e-4c07-a745-7f2d7ef4907a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
And then the show will happen.
Bad Bunny's music is going to hit.

Because that's the thing about music. You don't need to understand every word to know when something slaps. When it pops, it pops. Rhythm, energy, and emotion travel just fine without translation. A Banger is a Banger!
After the halftime show, Bad Bunny's stock is going to go up. He's going to gain new fans. People who never thought they'd defend his music or Latino culture publicly will suddenly find themselves doing exactly that. Not because they planned to, but because they enjoyed what they saw.
#### The Noise Versus Reality
What I think most Americans actually want is pretty simple. They want to watch the game. Snack. Drink a beer or two, or four. Enjoy a shared cultural moment. The Super Bowl is one of the last true mass-participation events in this country. Over 100 million people watching at the same time.
You are never going to please everyone in a group that large. Criticism is guaranteed. But the idea that the loudest voices represent the majority is a lie.
Most people are fine. Most people are curious. Most people are open to something new.
Which is why I think this halftime show is going to land better than the critics in the bubble say.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..6arRGwRPs-4ILeOxImjE4F0ghE7Wn8c-Bp76y9WZyvs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=187295219)
#### Cutting Through the Manufactured Outrage
Of course, there will be attempts to capitalize on the backlash. Turning Point USA has already decided to broadcast its own so-called Super Bowl halftime show. Marketing brilliance fueled by outrage. Featuring performers clinging to relevance by wrapping themselves in artificial, hypocritical, farcical, moral purity.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e944c837-499a-4ac1-bd0a-caeb025d1b82?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Turning point USA halftime show promotion
The irony is hard to miss, especially when you remember the lyrical history of some of the people being elevated as moral counterweights. It's even harder to miss given the Epstein files.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e6818251-3efe-43a3-a3e6-e1474c157014?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But that's the point. None of this is really about music. It's about identity, fear, and who gets to define what "American" means.
#### What I Hope People Take Away
So here's my ask.
Cut through the noise. Use this as a moment to embrace cultural difference instead of fearing it. If you haven't listened to Bad Bunny before, maybe give it a shot. You don't have to love it. You don't have to make it your personality. You just have to be open.
America has never been one sound, one language, or one culture. That diversity is not a bug. It's the feature. It's a strength.
You're going to see ugly comments online. You're going to see moral outrage and so-called purity tests. Just remember that those voices represent a small percentage of people who are very good at being **LOUD**.
Most Americans don't give a shit. Most Americans are welcoming. Most Americans are perfectly capable of enjoying something new without losing their sense of identity.
This Super Bowl is going to remind us of that.
And that is what I want you to take away.
## Stay Angry.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bea9658d-619b-4a1c-a9c3-d78a9a766735?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Bad Bunny Angry Donkey

clean_body: The backlash is predictable, loud, and irrelevant. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? We need to find other ANGRY DEMOCRATS. Please consider sharing and subscribing to fuel the ANGER for change. The backlash is predictable, loud, and irrelevant. | | | Feb 8 | | | | | | | | | | | | I wanted to put this out there before the Super Bowl kicks off, because I already know what's coming. We've seen this movie before. The onslaught has already started. Stay Angry and Subscribe | | ---|---|--- Bad Bunny Bad Bunny is headlining the Super Bowl halftime show, and you can practically set your watch by the reaction. There is going to be a flood of criticism from the same predictable corners. Bigoted, small-minded outrage dressed up as concern for "American culture." Complaints about how this doesn't represent "real America." Complaints about how the music isn't recognizable enough, isn't in English, isn't a Leonard Skynyrd cover band, an AC/DC reunion tour, or some nostalgia act that makes certain people feel comfortable. And it will be loud. Very loud. What's funny is that the people who actually enjoy the halftime show usually don't spend much time complaining online. They're watching the game. Eating. Drinking. Hanging out with friends and family. The outrage almost always comes from a minority that is extremely good at being BIG MAD. Which makes me get Groundhog's Day vibes every year. This "outrage" happens every damn year. For example... Past Super Bowls Every time the Super Bowl halftime show strays from a narrow, cookie-cutter idea of what America is supposed to look or sound like, the backlash follows immediately. And every time, it's framed as something new or shocking, even though it never is. Take recent memory. | | ---|---|--- 2025 Super Bowl halftime show Kendrick Lamar In 2025, Super Bowl 59 featured Kendrick Lamar. This was right in the middle of the Kendrick Lamar and Drake beef, which was already a perfectly primed social media frenzy. Before Kendrick even stepped on stage, you already knew the criticisms were coming. People called it "ghetto." "Low-life trash." Language that surprised absolutely no one, because we've heard it before. | | ---|---|--- In 2023, Super Bowl 57 featured Rihanna. Pregnant. Returning to the stage after years away, after building a massive business empire, starting a family, and choosing to perform while visibly pregnant. The criticisms came fast. It was boring. She didn't move enough. She gained weight. She can't dance anymore. And of course, the familiar refrain that it was the "worst halftime show ever," supposedly geared toward "a very specific demographic." Everyone knew exactly what that meant. | | ---|---|--- 2023 Super Bowl halftime show featuring Rihanna Which is especially ironic when you remember that hip hop and R&B are among the most listened-to genres globally. This was not niche music. She had some have the biggest songs of 21st century so far. But in actuality, it was just music performed by a black woman on the biggest stage in the country. People got triggered. Then there was 2022. Dr. Dre. Snoop Dogg. Eminem. Mary J. Blige. Kendrick Lamar. An all-time lineup. Legends. Artists whose music defined entire generations. For a lot of people in their 30's & 40's, that show was pure nostalgia. From The Chronic to Doggy Style to Slim Shady to Mary J., it was a reminder of riding around in the backseat of your friends cars with their 12" Rockford Fosgate subwoofers giving you a back massage and getting you a little sick tbh. | | ---|---|--- 2022 Super Bowl halftime show featuring Eminem Dr. Dre, Mary J. Blige, Snoop Dogg, Kendrick Lamar And yet, the backlash was immediate. Charlie Kirk called it "sexual anarchy." Others said it shouldn't have been televised. Some dismissed it as nostalgia bait. Others said we should have had Ted Nugent, Kid Rock, or Lee Greenwood instead. Again, the context was obvious. Nobody was confused about what was being said. | | ---|---|--- Why Bad Bunny Is Going to Win Anyway Which brings us to Bad Bunny. My prediction is simple. The same cycle will repeat, but with a different ending. The criticism will be loud. Immigration rhetoric will creep in. Border control talking points. "Send them back" dog whistles. Complaints about Spanish lyrics. Complaints about not understanding the words. | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | Jan 12 | And then the show will happen. Bad Bunny's music is going to hit. Because that's the thing about music. You don't need to understand every word to know when something slaps. When it pops, it pops. Rhythm, energy, and emotion travel just fine without translation. A Banger is a Banger! After the halftime show, Bad Bunny's stock is going to go up. He's going to gain new fans. People who never thought they'd defend his music or Latino culture publicly will suddenly find themselves doing exactly that. Not because they planned to, but because they enjoyed what they saw. The Noise Versus Reality What I think most Americans actually want is pretty simple. They want to watch the game. Snack. Drink a beer or two, or four. Enjoy a shared cultural moment. The Super Bowl is one of the last true mass-participation events in this country. Over 100 million people watching at the same time. You are never going to please everyone in a group that large. Criticism is guaranteed. But the idea that the loudest voices represent the majority is a lie. Most people are fine. Most people are curious. Most people are open to something new. Which is why I think this halftime show is going to land better than the critics in the bubble say. Cutting Through the Manufactured Outrage Of course, there will be attempts to capitalize on the backlash. Turning Point USA has already decided to broadcast its own so-called Super Bowl halftime show. Marketing brilliance fueled by outrage. Featuring performers clinging to relevance by wrapping themselves in artificial, hypocritical, farcical, moral purity. | | ---|---|--- Turning point USA halftime show promotion The irony is hard to miss, especially when you remember the lyrical history of some of the people being elevated as moral counterweights. It's even harder to miss given the Epstein files. | | ---|---|--- But that's the point. None of this is really about music. It's about identity, fear, and who gets to define what "American" means. What I Hope People Take Away So here's my ask. Cut through the noise. Use this as a moment to embrace cultural difference instead of fearing it. If you haven't listened to Bad Bunny before, maybe give it a shot. You don't have to love it. You don't have to make it your personality. You just have to be open. America has never been one sound, one language, or one culture. That diversity is not a bug. It's the feature. It's a strength. You're going to see ugly comments online. You're going to see moral outrage and so-called purity tests. Just remember that those voices represent a small percentage of people who are very good at being LOUD. Most Americans don't give a shit. Most Americans are welcoming. Most Americans are perfectly capable of enjoying something new without losing their sense of identity. This Super Bowl is going to remind us of that. And that is what I want you to take away. Stay Angry. | | ---|---|--- Bad Bunny Angry Donkey Join otherANGRY DEMOCRATS by support Matt's work. Subscribe and Share! | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Matt Diemer Berea, Ohio ? ?

Peter, Mike Collins here.

And I need your answer on something that could change Washington overnight.

name: Heidi Campbell
subject: Winter Storm Fern Update: Recovery information
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Lee Jones, treasurer
body:
| |
---
Here's an update on recovery efforts following **Winter Storm Fern** , along with information about the resources currently available and next steps for those who were impacted.
The State of Tennessee has received approval for a **Major Disaster Declaration** , which allows **FEMA Public Assistance** for eligible local governments and certain nonprofit organizations, including houses of worship, in several counties, including **Davidson County.** This assistance helps reimburse costs related to emergency response and damage to public infrastructure.
At this time, FEMA Individual Assistance (IA)--which would provide direct help to homeowners and renters--has not yet been approved and remains under federal review. The State is continuing to work with FEMA to pursue this assistance.
---
**What you can do now if your home was damaged**
---
If your home sustained damage from Winter Storm Fern (including burst pipes, water damage, or trees falling on your home), please **self-report your damage through[TEMA's Damage Assessment Survey.](https://89ef5d2784b2dbb4a67d22ed19089030.us-east-1.resend-clicks-a.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fsurvey123.arcgis.com%2Fshare%2F9d585f7786564e52a34be72254f425ce/1/0100019c3e0f29f8-2a5d87c4-d65b-4223-8fad-f7d319fa0c7d-000000/X13aR5y1SoLallN8MfcGrxZbO8sUgcn9e3N1s0K0Xw8=443)** This step is critical and helps determine whether FEMA Individual Assistance will be approved. Submitting a report does **not** guarantee assistance, but widespread reporting strengthens the case for federal help.
Please also encourage neighbors who were affected to complete the survey.
---
**Cleanup and immediate help**
---
• Crisis Cleanup has been activated and may be able to assist with free property cleanup, such as removing fallen trees. Availability is limited. To request help, call **844-965-1386.**
• Many residents are now responsible for repairs to **weatherheads or service masts** damaged in the storm. These repairs generally require a licensed electrician. In **Davidson County,** you can call 211 to be added to a needs list for potential assistance.
• Community organizations, nonprofits, and faith-based groups may offer cleanup help, supplies, or short-term assistance. Availability varies by county.
---
**Important reminders**
---
**• Price gouging is illegal** during a declared emergency. If you believe a business is price gouging, please **[file a complaint](https://89ef5d2784b2dbb4a67d22ed19089030.us-east-1.resend-clicks-a.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.tn.gov%2Fattorneygeneral%2Fworking-for-tennessee%2Fconsumer%2Fscams-schemes-swindles%2Fprice-gouging-faq.html/1/0100019c3e0f29f8-2a5d87c4-d65b-4223-8fad-f7d319fa0c7d-000000/Ybk9US9tMhDX7rO6-tFQtBIwamhWfDyJeyGg9fh68UI=443)** with the **Tennessee Office of the Attorney General.**
• If you experienced food loss due to extended power outages and receive **SNAP benefits** , the Tennessee Department of Human Services is accepting requests for replacement benefits.
• Please continue to use caution around debris, unstable trees, and downed power lines. Assume all power lines are energized.
---
**Documenting damage**
---
As you begin repairs and cleanup:
• Take photos and videos of damage
• Keep receipts for storm-related expenses
• File insurance claims as soon as possible if you have coverage
This documentation will be important if additional assistance becomes available.
---
**Staying informed**
---
Both the TBI Hotline and the Winter Storm Fern Information Line have ended. For ongoing updates and local resources, please rely on:
• The **[Office of Emergency Management](https://89ef5d2784b2dbb4a67d22ed19089030.us-east-1.resend-clicks-a.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nashville.gov%2Fdepartments%2Femergency-management/1/0100019c3e0f29f8-2a5d87c4-d65b-4223-8fad-f7d319fa0c7d-000000/wKiFp9jonsS8xKAjYaKZkQXes87mOdGb44Dg_Di3-wc=443)** for Davidson County
• The **[Tennessee Emergency Management Agency (TEMA)](https://89ef5d2784b2dbb4a67d22ed19089030.us-east-1.resend-clicks-a.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.tn.gov%2Ftema.html/1/0100019c3e0f29f8-2a5d87c4-d65b-4223-8fad-f7d319fa0c7d-000000/0AhmpXX9FcEu5uu33jpe8oNNHJVAJCYPm0v-cycVjZE=443)** Winter Weather webpage • Local government and utility updates
My office will continue to share updates as recovery efforts move forward and as decisions are made about additional assistance. Please do not hesitate to reach out if you have questions or need help connecting with resources.
We have lost far too many lives in this storm, and my heart is with every family and neighbor who is grieving or still struggling. I remain committed to doing everything possible to support our community as we recover and rebuild.
With gratitude and care,
**Senator Heidi Campbell**
---
Senator Heidi Campbell is a Tennessee State Senator, representing District 20. She is championing change for Tennessee and won't rest until we see gun safety reform, corporate accountability, and a safe and prosperous community where everyone can thrive.
You can reach the campaign at:
info@voteheidicampbell.com
629-279-1026
Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Lee Jones, treasurer.
Campbell for State Senate
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
---

* | [](https://substack.com/redirect/9132a25c-4f56-46ff-9e19-ebae2dca3321?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

**Sir Henry Wotton (1604):** "An ambassador is an honest man sent to lie abroad for the good of his country." (He wrote this as a joke, but it became famous).

The State Department under Marco Rubio is recalling 29 ambassadors--all career Foreign Service officers originally appointed during the Biden administration. The Trump administration (in its second term) is recalling nearly 30 career diplomats from their posts as chiefs of mission in various countries.

Africa was most affected by the removals, with ambassadors from 13 countries being removed: Burundi, Cameroon, Cape Verde, Gabon, Ivory Coast, Madagascar, Mauritius, Niger, Nigeria, Rwanda, Senegal, Somalia, and Uganda.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oZWFydGxhbmRqb3VybmFsLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.dRg9u5KK7af1c55qe2c2Et-4GgbaUpJ47DYpbUUSLSM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=187297363)
Ambassadorial changes are also coming to Fiji, Laos, the Marshall Islands, Papua New Guinea, the Philippines, Vietnam, Armenia, Macedonia, Montenegro, Slovakia, Algeria, Egypt, Nepal, Sri Lanka, Guatemala, and Suriname.

These recalls are part of an effort to realign U.S. diplomacy with the "America First" agenda, ensuring ambassadors are seen as fully supportive of President Trump's priorities. The State Department has described this as a standard process in any new administration, noting that ambassadors serve as personal representatives of the president.

However, the move is unusual because it targets career diplomats (not just political appointees), who are typically allowed to complete their standard 3-4 year tours regardless of who is in the White House. Critics, including the American Foreign Service Association (the diplomats' union) and Democratic lawmakers like Sen. Jeanne Shaheen, have called it abrupt, unexplained, and potentially damaging to morale, U.S. credibility abroad, and diplomatic effectiveness--especially since many of the affected posts are in lower-profile or non-crisis countries, and there are already around 80 vacant ambassadorships worldwide (with deputy chiefs often filling in).

Sen. Shaheen, the top Democrat on the US Senate Committee on Foreign Relations, said Trump was "giving away US leadership to China and Russia by removing qualified career Ambassadors who serve faithfully no matter who's in power". "This makes America less safe, less strong and less prosperous," she said.

Geographically, in Europe (e.g., Slovakia, Montenegro, Armenia, North Macedonia), Asia, the Middle East, and the Western Hemisphere are all effected. Importantly, the administration has stated that no recalls are happening in countries at war or involved in high-stakes negotiations with the U.S.

Ambassador salaries (for career ones) are generally in the range of $150,000-$220,000+ base pay (depending on seniority, location allowances, and other factors. A possible savings of about $21M (e.g., 109 × ~$190k ≈ $20.71M for one year can be expected although many will be relocated.

The U.S. maintains diplomatic relations with nearly 200 countries/territories and has ambassadors or equivalent chiefs of mission in most of them (though vacancies are common during transitions). Prioritizing major powers like the UK, France, Russia, and China makes sense strategically--those posts tend to involve higher-stakes issues (NATO, great-power competition, etc.)--and the recalls appear to spare or avoid disrupting the most vital ones.

Trump and Rubio's move seems like a deliberate push to reshape the diplomatic corps early in the term in a department of 70,000 employees and a budget of $58.8 billion, but it has sparked debate about whether it strengthens or weakens U.S. influence in "lesser" countries where steady, non-political representation might matter more for long-term interests like trade, countering Chinese influence, or regional stability.

Whether it's "a good start" depends on one's view of how politicized Biden's Foreign Service became under Antony Blinken--supporters see it as necessary accountability, while critics argue it risks turning professional diplomacy into something more partisan.

_Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer._

clean_body: Diplomacy just got a pink slip as America First redraws the embassy seating chart. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Diplomacy just got a pink slip as America First redraws the embassy seating chart. | | | Feb 8 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Sir Henry Wotton (1604):** "An ambassador is an honest man sent to lie abroad for the good of his country." (He wrote this as a joke, but it became famous). The State Department under Marco Rubio is recalling 29 ambassadors--all career Foreign Service officers originally appointed during the Biden administration. The Trump administration (in its second term) is recalling nearly 30 career diplomats from their posts as chiefs of mission in various countries. Africa was most affected by the removals, with ambassadors from 13 countries being removed: Burundi, Cameroon, Cape Verde, Gabon, Ivory Coast, Madagascar, Mauritius, Niger, Nigeria, Rwanda, Senegal, Somalia, and Uganda. Ambassadorial changes are also coming to Fiji, Laos, the Marshall Islands, Papua New Guinea, the Philippines, Vietnam, Armenia, Macedonia, Montenegro, Slovakia, Algeria, Egypt, Nepal, Sri Lanka, Guatemala, and Suriname. These recalls are part of an effort to realign U.S. diplomacy with the "America First" agenda, ensuring ambassadors are seen as fully supportive of President Trump's priorities. The State Department has described this as a standard process in any new administration, noting that ambassadors serve as personal representatives of the president. However, the move is unusual because it targets career diplomats (not just political appointees), who are typically allowed to complete their standard 3-4 year tours regardless of who is in the White House. Critics, including the American Foreign Service Association (the diplomats' union) and Democratic lawmakers like Sen. Jeanne Shaheen, have called it abrupt, unexplained, and potentially damaging to morale, U.S. credibility abroad, and diplomatic effectiveness--especially since many of the affected posts are in lower-profile or non-crisis countries, and there are already around 80 vacant ambassadorships worldwide (with deputy chiefs often filling in). Sen. Shaheen, the top Democrat on the US Senate Committee on Foreign Relations, said Trump was "giving away US leadership to China and Russia by removing qualified career Ambassadors who serve faithfully no matter who's in power". "This makes America less safe, less strong and less prosperous," she said. Geographically, in Europe (e.g., Slovakia, Montenegro, Armenia, North Macedonia), Asia, the Middle East, and the Western Hemisphere are all effected. Importantly, the administration has stated that no recalls are happening in countries at war or involved in high-stakes negotiations with the U.S. Ambassador salaries (for career ones) are generally in the range of $150,000-$220,000+ base pay (depending on seniority, location allowances, and other factors. A possible savings of about $21M (e.g., 109 × ~$190k ≈ $20.71M for one year can be expected although many will be relocated. The U.S. maintains diplomatic relations with nearly 200 countries/territories and has ambassadors or equivalent chiefs of mission in most of them (though vacancies are common during transitions). Prioritizing major powers like the UK, France, Russia, and China makes sense strategically--those posts tend to involve higher-stakes issues (NATO, great-power competition, etc.)--and the recalls appear to spare or avoid disrupting the most vital ones. Trump and Rubio's move seems like a deliberate push to reshape the diplomatic corps early in the term in a department of 70,000 employees and a budget of $58.8 billion, but it has sparked debate about whether it strengthens or weakens U.S. influence in "lesser" countries where steady, non-political representation might matter more for long-term interests like trade, countering Chinese influence, or regional stability. Whether it's "a good start" depends on one's view of how politicized Biden's Foreign Service became under Antony Blinken--supporters see it as necessary accountability, while critics argue it risks turning professional diplomacy into something more partisan. Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer. This Substack is reader-supported. clean_body: | = Friend, Just days after Donald Trump called to “nationalize” our elections, his FBI is now organizing an unprecedented conference with state election officials from all 50 states. Nevada Secretary of State Cisco Aguilar is raising the alarm: “They’re just sowing this confusion and chaos to try to intimidate us into compliance.” Let us be absolutely clear: This is not normal. Secretaries of State are state officials elected to serve voters, not the whims of Donald Trump or his federal agencies. And it’s clear what’s happening here: Trump’s administration is laying the groundwork to take power away from state election officials and give it to his loyalists in Washington, just in time for the 2026 midterm elections. We can’t afford to be silent about this. We need to elect and defend Democratic Secretaries of State who will refuse to be bullied into compliance and fight like hell to protect your vote. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thanks for being in this fight with us, Team DASS | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters. name: Katie Porter
subject: F*ck ICE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
As governor, I’ll fight to make sure the federal government leaves Californians alone—no politically motivated attacks on our neighbors.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40817%2E3422442%2E2b-_ss)
F*ck ICE, Peter.
Donald Trump’s latest attacks on immigrants are horrific. Untrained, masked, violent federal agents are invading our communities, violating the law, and _killing innocent Americans._
Alex Pretti spent his days caring for veterans as a nurse, and stood up to protect his neighbors. Renee Good was a mom dropping her kid off at school. Both of them are senselessly and needlessly dead because of this administration’s cruelty.
The deaths at the hands of DHS agents and the thousands of lives they’ve upturned were funded by all of our tax dollars. **We have to stand up and say no more.**
As governor, I’ll fight to make sure the federal government leaves Californians alone—no politically motivated attacks on our neighbors.
But until Congress gets its act together and puts a stop to this, _it’s on us to protect each other._
I saw what that looks like firsthand when I toured the ICE Detention facility in Otay Mesa during Trump's attacks on our immigrant community in his first term, and the memories and stories I heard there are on my mind daily.
I met with an incredible advocate from **Al Otro Lado** , who was leading the way then as she is today. They provided a wide range of resources to immigrants, refugees, and people who have been deported including legal representation and know-your-rights training.
**[If you’re able, please donate whatever you can to Al Otro Lado to support their work in this critical moment for our country and our state.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260208_1_ak.Jy9bwk&refcode=em20260208-40817&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40817%2E3422442%2E2b-_ss)**
We’ll get through this—together.
Thank you,
Katie Porter

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40817&t=4&akid=40817%2E3422442%2E2b-_ss)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=40817)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40817&t=5&akid=40817%2E3422442%2E2b-_ss)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026

name: David Hogg
subject: Peter, this is huge
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Every Leaders We Deserve candidate outraised their incumbent in Q4 2025 – without taking corporate PAC money.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260208-1&t=1&akid=3127%2E587540%2EYwTB8g)
Peter,
I have some news that should make every congressional incumbent _very, very nervous._
**Every single Leaders We Deserve-endorsed candidate outraised their incumbent challengers in the fourth quarter of 2025. WITHOUT taking a dime of corporate PAC money.**
Our candidates are showing the strength of younger leaders, people-powered politics, and fighting against the status quo.
The incumbents we’re challenging shouldn’t _just_ be nervous. _They should be terrified._
Here's what is happening:
**Justin J. Pearson (TN-09)** raised **$732,151**
Rep. Steve Cohen raised $84,226
**Nida Allam (NC-04)** raised **$334,740**
Rep. Valerie Foushee raised $131,866
**Donavan McKinney (MI-13)** raised **$217,044**
Rep. Shri Thanedar raised $25,312
**Patrick Roath (MA-08)** raised **$170,070**
Rep. Stephen Lynch raised $104,595
These numbers aren’t flukes. They’re what happens when you put up candidates that actually inspire people. While the amounts raised this means little to people outside DC it’s damn near everything to people inside DC. It is very rare for incumbent challengers to be doing this much better than their opponents who have decades of connections and donors.
While we know these numbers are certainly not everything our candidates are taking nothing for granted. They’re hard at work knowing money alone isn’t enough to win. That’s why they are focused on organizing college students in their districts, knocking doors, doing down halls and more.
We're challenging these incumbents because they've gotten too comfortable. Meanwhile, our candidates are showing up, organizing, and refusing to compromise their values.
**[Peter, if you want to help us keep building this momentum toward the primaries, contribute $5 to Leaders We Deserve today.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260208_1_incumbents.nV3-Tz&refcode=em20260208-3127&amount=5&t=2&akid=3127%2E587540%2EYwTB8g)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260208_1_incumbents.nV3-Tz&amount=5&refcode=em20260208-3127&t=21&akid=3127%2E587540%2EYwTB8g)**
We’re going to keep primarying candidates, keep holding complacent leaders accountable, and keep building a Democratic Party that actually deserves the power that voters give it.
Let’s keep this energy going.
— David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20260208-1&t=22&refcode2=3127_587540_YwTB8g&akid=3127%2E587540%2EYwTB8g)**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: This lawsuit
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I want to explain why in a bit more detail, and then I am going to ask for your financial support to help me as I prepare for the fights ahead.
#

Hey folks,
As you know, I recently filed a federal lawsuit against Pete Hegseth and the Trump Administration.
I want to explain why in a bit more detail, and then I am going to ask for your financial support to help me as I prepare for the fights ahead.
Here's the truth:
Donald Trump and Pete Hegseth sent a chilling message to every retired member of the military: If you speak out and say something that the President or the Secretary of Defense does not like, you could be censured, threatened with a reduction in retirement grade, or even prosecuted.
They're abusing their authority to silence the voices that they find inconvenient — even when speech is protected by the First Amendment.
That warning is not just alarming, it's unconstitutional.
But your help is about more than that. It's about sending a message to Trump and Hegseth that the American people won’t stand by while our Constitutional rights are attacked.
I’ve been truly humbled by the support people have sent my way over the past couple of months. It means the world to me that so many of you care about what Trump and Hegseth are trying to do.
That’s how we’ve made it this far, and it’s how we’ll get to the other side of this chapter in our nation’s history. Together.
So this is the part where I ask for your help:
[**If standing up for the Constitution is important to you, please rush a $3 contribution to my campaign. Our average online donation during this time has been around $25. Many give more, some give less. All that matters is the number of donations we receive during this time.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-feb26.6dv2ri&refcode=em260208-1-30&t=1&akid=6360%2E6688874%2EFw-eJO)

---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-feb26.Oy0sNO&refcode=em260208-1-30&t=21&akid=6360%2E6688874%2EFw-eJO)**
---

Don't give up the ship.
Mark

body:
DC politicians and their billionaire donors are already targeting Mary just days after she jumped into the race.
In a moment, we’re going to ask you to split a $10 contribution between Heartland Patriots and our campaign to help us win in Alaska and send Mary Peltola to the U.S. Senate to fight for us.
If you already understand the stakes and are ready to give, please contribute at this link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hp-peltola-email-20260208?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100374?refcode=em20260208-10030&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10030%2E614464%2Ef2-o7F)**
Here’s the situation, Peter:
DC politicians and their billionaire donors are already targeting Mary just days after she jumped into the race. They're working to muddy the waters and smear her record of delivering for Alaska because they will do anything to hold onto this Senate seat in November.
It’s outrageous. They know Mary has what it takes to win, and they’re scared that she will expose their corruption when she gets to the U.S. Senate — because that’s exactly what she plans to do.
And that’s why they’re going to use every dirty trick in the book to try to stop her.
Dark money groups are going to put millions of dollars behind their lies and baseless attacks to tear down Mary. She is going to get absolutely pummeled by attack ads.
We have to go on offense now to make sure Alaskans hear from Mary directly.

body:
Enough is enough

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124982173/600312047/1328794144?refcode=ea.5d24fb73-0c05-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ms=ea.5d24fb73-0c05-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVkMjRmYjczLTBjMDUtZjExMS04MzJmLTAwMGQzYTFmMGU0YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BZr-JRj7ljbMwhBnEmVAn46B_Wqqsyjx6i8HMCx0jp4=&emci=52a931ff-9f03-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=5d24fb73-0c05-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=4823105)
---
ICE has crossed a dangerous line. Federal immigration agents have killed two U.S. citizens in Minnesota. ICE continues to deny people basic constitutional rights, including breaking into homes without a judge-signed warrant and sweeping up people with no probable cause. And now this administration is arresting journalists for doing their jobs — criminalizing protest and press coverage in the process. **That should alarm every one of us.** Last week, dozens of members of Congress stood their ground and voted against funding ICE, even as leadership warned of a shutdown. They understood what was at stake: you don’t reward lawlessness with more money. But instead of resolving the crisis, Congress passed a short-term deal that delays the decision for just two weeks. That means ICE funding is coming up again, and the pressure to cave will be intense. **_That’s why we need to act now._** **[Congress must hear, loudly and clearly, that any bill that funds ICE is unacceptable. No more excuses. Add your name to demand Congress defund ICE before it’s too late >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124982174/600312048/324781621?source=email&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.5d24fb73-0c05-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c%26ms%3Dea.5d24fb73-0c05-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&refcode=ea.5d24fb73-0c05-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ms=ea.5d24fb73-0c05-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVkMjRmYjczLTBjMDUtZjExMS04MzJmLTAwMGQzYTFmMGU0YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BZr-JRj7ljbMwhBnEmVAn46B_Wqqsyjx6i8HMCx0jp4=&emci=52a931ff-9f03-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=5d24fb73-0c05-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=4823105)** | [**TAKE ACTION →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124982175/600312049/324781621?source=email&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.5d24fb73-0c05-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c%26ms%3Dea.5d24fb73-0c05-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&refcode=ea.5d24fb73-0c05-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ms=ea.5d24fb73-0c05-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVkMjRmYjczLTBjMDUtZjExMS04MzJmLTAwMGQzYTFmMGU0YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BZr-JRj7ljbMwhBnEmVAn46B_Wqqsyjx6i8HMCx0jp4=&emci=52a931ff-9f03-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=5d24fb73-0c05-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=4823105)

clean_body: Enough is enough | ICE has crossed a dangerous line. Federal immigration agents have killed two U.S. citizens in Minnesota. ICE continues to deny people basic constitutional rights, including breaking into homes without a judge-signed warrant and sweeping up people with no probable cause. And now this administration is arresting journalists for doing their jobs — criminalizing protest and press coverage in the process. That should alarm every one of us. Last week, dozens of members of Congress stood their ground and voted against funding ICE, even as leadership warned of a shutdown. They understood what was at stake: you don’t reward lawlessness with more money. But instead of resolving the crisis, Congress passed a short-term deal that delays the decision for just two weeks. That means ICE funding is coming up again, and the pressure to cave will be intense. That’s why we need to act now. | Onward, — JanePAC advocacy team | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

subject: We need to get more ads on the air
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:

Peter, before
kickoff, we wanted to share something with you.

Earlier in this campaign, we ran an ad during a football game:

[ A ]A GIF of our ad. It shows Abdul throwing a football and text that says
'Dr. Abdul El-Sayed: Public Official of the Year

The success of our ad was tangible! We reached voters we wouldn’t have
otherwise. People talked about it. Momentum grew.

But running TV ads is incredibly expensive, so we only kept the ad up for
a few days.

However, research shows that repetition is key to committing anything to
memory.

That means we need to get more ads on the air so we can continue to remind
Michiganders what Abdul is fighting for: Getting money out of politics,
putting more money in your pockets, and passing Medicare for All.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260208-1-ak.kPiinv&amount=10&refcode=em20260208-1662&t=1004&akid=1668%2E251025%2EG8_0A7 ]So before the big game starts, can you donate $10 or more
to help us run more ads, get Abdul in front of more voters, and win this
competitive race?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260208-1-ak.kPiinv&amount=10&refcode=em20260208-1662&t=1023&akid=1668%2E251025%2EG8_0A7 ]Donate $10 ››

Thanks so much, and enjoy the game!

Team Abdul

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: This is what gave Charlie strength
body:
[Mark as Spam](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xul=6zs1j7t5dhe4avz97uxx7mw1um1poy8go4q31zc9lxoz1u66fu31l1kx7oxspj9qdw7qt3l65dk7n8a8gwba9r2zef7ugjc6y43s5d7oj057xbi19h&__stmp=ta5fv8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) | [Unsubscribe](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xul=6zs1j7t5dhe4avz97uxx7mw1um1poy8go4q31zc9lxoz1u66fu31l1kx7oxspj9qdw7qt3l65dk7n8a8gwba9r2zef7ugjc6y43s5d7oj057xbi19h&__stmp=ta5fv8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
| | | [](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5fv8&__onlt=h)
---
| | Friend,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn’t a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal — the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God’s grace.**

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**“God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold.”**_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5fv8&__onlt=h)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie’s voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie’s hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5fv8&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5fv8&__onlt=h)
---
In the months since Charlie’s assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA’s message among young Americans...

...and it’s not just the conservative message as a whole — _**it’s the message of FAITH!**_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie’s call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it’s happening._

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we’re witnessing is not just growth —**it’s revival.**

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America’s faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up.**

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _“We’re not backing down.”_

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie’s most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie’s faith._**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

**[To claim your copy of Charlie’s final book, simply make a gift, in any amount, to support Turning Point USA today.](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5fv8&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5fv8&__onlt=h)
---
I’ll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible.

Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie’s mission and supporting his legacy.
---
**For Charlie,**

**Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5fv8&__onlt=h)
---
**[Support Turning Point USA](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5fv8&__onlt=h)**
---
**P.S.** When you read **_Stop, in the Name of God,_** you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead.

**[I hope you’ll claim your copy by making your most generous gift to Turning Point USA. Your support fuels our work to build the most faithful generation of Americans in history. Thank you, and God bless!](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5fv8&__onlt=h)**
---

**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5fv8&__onlt=h)

clean_body: | Please read the message below from our sponsor. | | | | | Friend, | | Charlie would have wanted you to have this. Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book. The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice. This isn’t a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans. Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal — the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God’s grace. Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children. By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: “God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold.” His book, Stop, in the Name of God is the fruit of that conviction. When you read it, you will hear Charlie’s voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family. Charlie’s hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive... A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us. I believe you will find this book inspiring. Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life. In the months since Charlie’s assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA’s message among young Americans... ...and it’s not just the conservative message as a whole — it’s the message of FAITH! In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie’s call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God. Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. And it’s happening. After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country. What we’re witnessing is not just growth —it’s revival. At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old. We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families. We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message. You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie. But America’s faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, “We’re not backing down.” This is what Charlie prayed for. I see this book as one of Charlie’s most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too. None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, so will the legacy of Charlie’s faith. Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God. I’ll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible. Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie’s mission and supporting his legacy. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. When you read Stop, in the Name of God, you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead. ** 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 / / MATERIAL TIE DISCLOSURE: You should presume the sender of this email has an affiliate or other financial relationship with the entities or persons noted in this message and may be compensated for purchases made on associated websites. name: James Talarico
subject: Straight shooter

body:
#
Peter —
The people that know me best will tell you that I am a straight shooter. I think people deserve honesty and directness. Too many politicians try to act like they know better than everyone and treat the rest of us like we’re dumb.
So I know you probably opened this email expecting to get asked for money. And you’re right. I know you also didn’t wake up expecting to give to our campaign today, but I am hoping you will give me a chance to make the case for why your support matters before our final FEC fundraising deadline on Wednesday.
This is the last time before the primary that we’re required to publicly share all of our fundraising numbers. And we’ve set an ambitious goal because what we raise before this deadline will directly impact our final budget decisions before early voting starts.
**[If you understand the stakes here and that’s all you need to hear, I hope you will consider adding a contribution to fuel our movement right now. It would mean a lot to me.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q1.AKJ3HX&refcode=em260208-1-ak&t=1&akid=436%2E1347274%2ERgAeix)**

****
Democrats haven’t won statewide in Texas in decades. Flipping this seat will require throwing out the old playbook and challenging the conventional wisdom.
That’s how I — with a movement of my friends and neighbors — flipped a Trump district in 2018. We called out the billionaire and corporate mega-donors who’ve rigged Texas and built a tent big enough for everybody who shared our values.
I want you to know that when we ask it’s because it’s important. It’s because I know that $3 and $10 at a time will make a difference — especially when we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs.

body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWcXl4fKY6Eo47AhptdCTuE0axuX3M_00C_RzdT317J5QDCkGisdJa-hi8HbWkNVO5igt5tm2PT7F5eAjyQFJOW6KyZlJWh15Nx3OsEsiJ9_Y9eKe1Ge-IcQtoxa7g1l9GBdIjwi84XkBHdCjdNRu3uGW9lSJrl99TGKPo4MWSgjc/4nz/1k7XI9XwST2_md8yjYy2pg/h0/h001.ZHTCyyn3-qhjDra5BnunnYN3hxEnH8rnWVyvUX2_Jqw)

Friend, It’s easy to lose sight of what we’re fighting for, as we must continually fight back against attacks on our rights and our humanity. **We are fighting for the right to breathe clean air, the right to engage in free speech, the right to unionize, and the right to affordable utilities and housing.** **We’re doing all of this while simultaneously fighting back against a lawless administration** that is killing our people in the streets, violating our rights in plain sight and behind closed doors, and holding our neighbors in detention camps against their right to due process. **Every week, I am using the tools available to me to fight back against Trump’s abuses of power.** We’re fighting hatred and white nationalism in Trump’s federal government. We’re fighting back against federal immigration agents who are violating our constitutional and human rights. We’re also fighting for the victims of violence, including sexual violence, whether it’s perpetrated by ICE agents or by powerful people being shielded from accountability, like Jeffrey Epstein's accomplices. **And, we’re fighting for our right to free speech, including defending student protestors who are being targeted and punished by colleges and universities for speaking out against genocide and for Palestinian rights and liberation.** [**Please donate today to power our campaign to protect our communities and demand an economy and a society that puts our neighbors first, not billionaires.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvAsgyUdu9GDmlqi9gYfJ6FZetd0KJhE7PHNrU63R6Ltpe7Jg6a7_Gf65f7y2REL0x1W7WEC0dEnpSlHBLfw8oCuKdXTcVhz8AkugtRIWG1jYiuEgErjiIhN2jzj6xrV1EJOmHqE7urr4Vo4Zyr063lHIj6CK_PKqZ20ODszXhXMOztA6k7QBGnzpRAOZHtMLlD_qezKNZoilqCTGehtvyNQjNOU_H3_QdJHIsl6bSVifQKpvAxPOd5T6qUh35Y9AXcT5m2W0Aps1A9e2iYobTGP9USDeae2EyHrxUNviQFIkA0bdOD2Fwn2KFerCEfwH3y_oz0Z7rUGctQRzCITjU7/4nz/1k7XI9XwST2_md8yjYy2pg/h1/h001.u_YcJ4heZ_-hY3ysK_V5wIqVs2sjt7Vy48ihSFpdP-c) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $15 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvAsgyUdu9GDmlqi9gYfJ6FZetd0KJhE7PHNrU63R6LtsL4xFd2puIGfEjfiLI1p2j4wbvVWJeYFJTO2MFHYulqFqmPEgbArJeGPqE08coIm-xwxVfN9kNulLcszwcyYmX1G0YYJCxTU9QRlwdXyTgqg1Ci2eimFoyTNw3zuQaetJRwGqlQx_FeVnhGO_T3FMecIvOg3dsQ7w6d_OKAgkBg3utEmlm8wlQIT8HWIWJiPU04ZXbSYHUhP4XZ_ed762ZCb1ejX5vVVH9_2yJ5OxFo41beaF0C50CZUzIR4-GuAW7xgLBFnzppDXyYh_TTt9oYs2PMQdf9ZMSg5wgdgqqlEk61OHj2484GCMUJPytaijx78rFLfbPfLjeuGphfUZY6OUIcnc4ZqSAgkI3d2Q0Q/4nz/1k7XI9XwST2_md8yjYy2pg/h2/h001.kmCZHgOlaP8bo-Cs8V-DM3TeWR2kTF3HF4cYMvNb5xM)

Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Feb 7, 2026
Subject: I will never stop fighting for you
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
In the midst of the chaos of Donald Trump’s federal government, we must never forget the power of our voices together.
As a former immigration and social justice and immigration attorney, and the daughter of immigrants, I will never stop demanding a just and humane immigration process in the U.S. **This includes holding ICE accountable for its murders and abuses of our neighbors and it includes fighting back against Trump’s racist travel ban.**
During my time in Congress, I’ve introduced policies to free immigrants from ICE detention and to protect immigrant families. I’ve been pushing for years to hold ICE accountable for human rights abuses that include forced sterilizations, widespread sexual assault, and intentional medical neglect.
**We’re also fighting back against an administration that is enriching billionaires and massive corporations at the expense of our access to healthcare, nutrition, and housing.** That’s why I just introduced the Defund the Billionaires, Fund Our Communities Resolution, demanding Congress moves with urgency to tax the rich as well as large corporations, and reinvest those tax dollars right back into our communities.
From demanding affordable utility bills to protecting workers’ rights and dignity on the job, we’re fighting for an economy that puts everyday people first, not billionaires and their greedy corporations.
[**Whether it’s our fight against ICE violence or our struggle for an economy and a society that protects our rights and our wages, I need you by my side. In the midst of the terror being perpetrated on our communities, there is still light. I recently met with leadership at the Children’s Center in Detroit and toured the Boys & Girls Club of Southeastern Michigan, which provide thriving programs for children and families.
It’s important to remember that even as the Trump administration is using our tax dollars to fund ICE’s illegal terror campaign and detention camps, our tax dollars can also bring so much good to our communities, through critical investments in children and our future.

In love and solidarity,

clean_body: | | | Friend, It’s easy to lose sight of what we’re fighting for, as we must continually fight back against attacks on our rights and our humanity. We are fighting for the right to breathe clean air, the right to engage in free speech, the right to unionize, and the right to affordable utilities and housing. We’re doing all of this while simultaneously fighting back against a lawless administration that is killing our people in the streets, violating our rights in plain sight and behind closed doors, and holding our neighbors in detention camps against their right to due process. Every week, I am using the tools available to me to fight back against Trump’s abuses of power. We’re fighting hatred and white nationalism in Trump’s federal government. We’re fighting back against federal immigration agents who are violating our constitutional and human rights. We’re also fighting for the victims of violence, including sexual violence, whether it’s perpetrated by ICE agents or by powerful people being shielded from accountability, like Jeffrey Epstein's accomplices. And, we’re fighting for our right to free speech, including defending student protestors who are being targeted and punished by colleges and universities for speaking out against genocide and for Palestinian rights and liberation. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Together, we will take on poverty, anti-Blackness, warmongers, genocide enablers, targeting of our immigrant neighbors, state funded violence, and more. With you in this struggle, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Feb 7, 2026 Subject: I will never stop fighting for you To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, In the midst of the chaos of Donald Trump’s federal government, we must never forget the power of our voices together. As a former immigration and social justice and immigration attorney, and the daughter of immigrants, I will never stop demanding a just and humane immigration process in the U.S. This includes holding ICE accountable for its murders and abuses of our neighbors and it includes fighting back against Trump’s racist travel ban. During my time in Congress, I’ve introduced policies to free immigrants from ICE detention and to protect immigrant families. I’ve been pushing for years to hold ICE accountable for human rights abuses that include forced sterilizations, widespread sexual assault, and intentional medical neglect. We’re also fighting back against an administration that is enriching billionaires and massive corporations at the expense of our access to healthcare, nutrition, and housing. That’s why I just introduced the Defund the Billionaires, Fund Our Communities Resolution, demanding Congress moves with urgency to tax the rich as well as large corporations, and reinvest those tax dollars right back into our communities. From demanding affordable utility bills to protecting workers’ rights and dignity on the job, we’re fighting for an economy that puts everyday people first, not billionaires and their greedy corporations. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | In the midst of the terror being perpetrated on our communities, there is still light. I recently met with leadership at the Children’s Center in Detroit and toured the Boys & Girls Club of Southeastern Michigan, which provide thriving programs for children and families. It’s important to remember that even as the Trump administration is using our tax dollars to fund ICE’s illegal terror campaign and detention camps, our tax dollars can also bring so much good to our communities, through critical investments in children and our future. Thank you for being by my side as, together, we demand a federal government that is accountable to our communities. name: Chris Taylor HQ
subject: Former GOP Gov. Scott Walker is meddling with our Wisconsin Supreme Court race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20260208-1101&t=1&akid=1101%2E294397%2EmCvoEk)
Folks,
Former GOP Gov. Scott Walker is meddling with our Wisconsin Supreme Court race.
He’s helping our extreme opponent fundraise, opening the door to his national donor network of right-wing special interests.
Scott Walker and his allies have spent years trying to reshape Wisconsin’s courts to serve their political agenda. **Now, they see this race as their next opportunity.**
The only way we can fight back is by generating grassroots support from folks like you.
Contributions from this team allow us to reach Wisconsinites before right-wing special interests do, and make sure they know the stakes of this race.
**But with our April election fast approaching, we can’t wait to take action. We have to build the resources _now_ to counter this wave of outside money.**
[**If you’re able, please chip in $10 to help us stand up to these far-right interests and elect Judge Chris Taylor.**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260208_1_ak.6iUeXd&amount=10&refcode=em20260208-1101&t=3&akid=1101%2E294397%2EmCvoEk)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260208_1_ak.6iUeXd&amount=10&refcode=em20260208-1101&t=22&akid=1101%2E294397%2EmCvoEk)**
Thank you,
Team Taylor

Dear Peter,

Watch his powerful message now: [_**Watch Rep.
