| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

clean_body: Starting as soon as a few months from now, the United States government will make a sweeping change to bank accounts nationwide. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Starting as soon as a few months from now, the United States government will make a sweeping change to bank accounts nationwide. | It will give them unprecedented powers to control your bank account. name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie wrote this for the soul
body:
Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
| | | [](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5j0i&__onlt=h)
---
| | Friend,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn’t a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal — the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God’s grace.**

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**“God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold.”**_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5j0i&__onlt=h)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie’s voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie’s hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5j0i&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5j0i&__onlt=h)
---
In the months since Charlie’s assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA’s message among young Americans...

...and it’s not just the conservative message as a whole — _**it’s the message of FAITH!**_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie’s call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it’s happening._

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we’re witnessing is not just growth —**it’s revival.**

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America’s faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up.**

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _“We’re not backing down.”_

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie’s most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie’s faith._**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

**[To claim your copy of Charlie’s final book, simply make a gift, in any amount, to support Turning Point USA today.](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5j0i&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5j0i&__onlt=h)
---
I’ll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible.

Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie’s mission and supporting his legacy.
---
**For Charlie,**

**Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5j0i&__onlt=h)
---
**[Support Turning Point USA](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5j0i&__onlt=h)**
---
**P.S.** When you read **_Stop, in the Name of God,_** you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead.

**[I hope you’ll claim your copy by making your most generous gift to Turning Point USA. Your support fuels our work to build the most faithful generation of Americans in history. Thank you, and God bless!](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5j0i&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5j0i&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
[Unsubscribe](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xul=2qq8ny3595o85h60939os39vi51s2q6ktwew0eth2akrbbh53vwtn2hu43tqzlsnr40x81tvh9pm60dzbo34ickv31gp7cp6r6ji8tzjp&__stmp=ta5j0i&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2vytyz4021ademv313c7ce5hdfsfaqhbmjcz4vjei8mc5k70xdc76xvcv40nmk5wbg8db16z4v0vclqv3kftzyvtlwh7m0ndo09k5xy178x24tcazf71bgunchaqct0v7qmrtl4ov1d&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5j0i&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=4zp2igrzkqm0efehdmdiact5o5vikwsjk07ffdao51iemf4puxsve6p7xuchh7iukqhoft4ah4rbbu402zlpoap8vhq3lzdbd2y7b2vdauipi3ymknww1mabt5k3wm5w&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5j0i&__onlt=h)

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Trump must apologize for his racist post. Don't give him a free pass just because we expect him to be horrible
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don't give Trump a free pass, just because we expect him to be racist. Make him apologize](https://default.salsalabs.org/T471d6384-d6f0-42f2-8303-9df2ac9be781/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc66ca39b-f6a0-4122-be99-9407375a1db6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump put up a wildly racist post online, depicting the Obamas as apes. He finally deleted it -- [after 12 hours](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4cc3581b-6708-4d84-917e-29691d5e1012/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) \-- but he refuses to apologize, saying he did nothing wrong. This really isn’t hard. When you screw up, you apologize. You don’t double down on being a horrible human being, you apologize, make amends, and try to be better. Now, the odds that he’ll actually do that are slim, since he’s been the Johnny Appleseed of racism since he got into politics (and before), sprinkling hate and racist rhetoric throughout the land. **But let’s not give him a free pass, just because we expect him to be a terrible human being. We cannot normalize this kind of behavior. [Demand Trump apologize, make him own this, and remind everyone that there are a whole lot of us out there who know this is wrong, and are not going to tolerate it](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2c549ebc-2d92-414d-8a58-30ee9627572a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) \-- especially from a president.** And If he won’t? Then let him look like a colossal jerk as he is forced to explain over and over again why Is such a horrible human being that he cant even take this simple step. And this is poison for Republican candidates in moderate, swing districts, so let them deal with that as Trump drags them down to defeat. **[Add your name: “President Trump, for once, surprise us, do the right thing, and apologize for posting that racist video.”](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcbeb549a-95de-4280-97f3-7277c1cb742d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T13bfe73a-dae5-4097-9c55-7097a928badf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

name: A-Minor
subject: Boebert’s alleged lover sang about underage girls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Boebert really knows how to pick em.
| | | | Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat taking on Lauren Boebert in Colorado's 4th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Trisha. However [if you'd like to unsubscribe,](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q5WWqUyLafoxkgSyWRJpAP7F4LDbjahrMMQ0S1MFaQ4shUlq1PFJr3W9CKXXPe5PCqa2-u6-qILlTCfuGvsRSusyCsCXq8XorF8-gtTyofPQtDcvmZXvpaNkbB06uRiUld_sUgHjwZuSF9SYXKmxbbqMyxWt9ngHlJsunlAB1i8p7cQpCx1QRss9VhLfoT89oWsuMWkbK10=&c=45A2vyaUQnPRm8hxIclRm1w9CCHa_RofiCvXIYhEUpyCWyey9Uiz7A==&ch=UQQaBS0qBfhagwW7jKtsdpkZQMgv8WDkI45b1fujrrncfZLaawcvhA==) you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email.
---
| [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q5WWqUyLafoxkgSyWRJpAP7F4LDbjahrMMQ0S1MFaQ4shUlq1PFJr5Kpre87wBnvb1AV4zc3Y0--sp7C-Cd6AJpdLo_Ax8zD19DMOWszR4MYQBLbwAmhUDDH1dkXYnMS_DX4O9EJ8obZZQk0OP-5Sjb3duJgVm4vcM8b0B4n_boLJ7WQaR2hdZSmPHjv-7fWz6mGb01ypVEm3issh6RQSneCtkBjvvKI&c=45A2vyaUQnPRm8hxIclRm1w9CCHa_RofiCvXIYhEUpyCWyey9Uiz7A==&ch=UQQaBS0qBfhagwW7jKtsdpkZQMgv8WDkI45b1fujrrncfZLaawcvhA==)
---
| Peter,
In December, it was revealed that Lauren Boebert potentially violated the law by using thousands of her campaign funds to attend the concert of her alleged lover, Kid Rock.
Kid Rock is back in the news after Turning Point USA announced him as the headline for their alternative halftime show during the upcoming Super Bowl. TPUSA is hosting their own halftime show to protest Puerto Rican superstar Bad Bunny's selection as the performer for this year's Super Bowl because he has been critical of ICE's inhumane violence.
Well, the renewed spotlight on Boebert's alleged lover has unearthed something deeply disturbing:
---
| [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q5WWqUyLafoxkgSyWRJpAP7F4LDbjahrMMQ0S1MFaQ4shUlq1PFJr5Kpre87wBnvb1AV4zc3Y0--sp7C-Cd6AJpdLo_Ax8zD19DMOWszR4MYQBLbwAmhUDDH1dkXYnMS_DX4O9EJ8obZZQk0OP-5Sjb3duJgVm4vcM8b0B4n_boLJ7WQaR2hdZSmPHjv-7fWz6mGb01ypVGQZ_KGEmOufJeZ2aJGar4p&c=45A2vyaUQnPRm8hxIclRm1w9CCHa_RofiCvXIYhEUpyCWyey9Uiz7A==&ch=UQQaBS0qBfhagwW7jKtsdpkZQMgv8WDkI45b1fujrrncfZLaawcvhA==)
---

Boebert really knows how to pick em.

The most concerning thing though, is a pattern that is emerging with Boebert.

Her now ex-husband was infamously arrested for exposing himself to underage girls at a bowling alley in Colorado. Boebert herself was present when he did it:

---
| [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q5WWqUyLafoxkgSyWRJpAP7F4LDbjahrMMQ0S1MFaQ4shUlq1PFJr5Kpre87wBnvb1AV4zc3Y0--sp7C-Cd6AJpdLo_Ax8zD19DMOWszR4MYQBLbwAmhUDDH1dkXYnMS_DX4O9EJ8obZZQk0OP-5Sjb3duJgVm4vcM8b0B4n_boLJ7WQaR2hdZSmPHjv-7fWz6mGb01ypVGoQGiWuKceqWRfqCx_q9-q&c=45A2vyaUQnPRm8hxIclRm1w9CCHa_RofiCvXIYhEUpyCWyey9Uiz7A==&ch=UQQaBS0qBfhagwW7jKtsdpkZQMgv8WDkI45b1fujrrncfZLaawcvhA==)
---

And of course, Boebert is one of the biggest Trump sycophants out there--and Trump has appeared over 35,000 times in the Epstein files.

The kindest thing we can say is that Boebert has "poor" judgement. She surrounds herself with the worst of the worst; convicted felons, pedophiles, disgraced conmen and fraudsters. Her entourage is a who's who of some of the worst people on planet Earth.

The voters of CO-4 are tired of the circus act that follows Boebert around. They just want a representative who puts their head down and does the work--someone who will fight to make their lives more affordable, ensure they have healthcare, and their rights aren't trampled on by the federal government.

That's why Democrat Trisha Calvarese's campaign is surging and Boebert is more vulnerable than she has ever been. Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes and last time Trisha ran against her, she had the best performance any Democrat has ever had in the district's history, outperforming Kamala Harris by 6 points.

Now Trisha is going to finish the job in 2026 and we just outraised Boebert by a million last quarter.[
](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q5WWqUyLafoxkgSyWRJpAP7F4LDbjahrMMQ0S1MFaQ4shUlq1PFJr49qPOc9a0IZjDmeHn4SkJ-_phi8lN9BQL3LhinC6J949h1uN6KOaWTP4J-OA9KBlJrABrpZjcGl&c=45A2vyaUQnPRm8hxIclRm1w9CCHa_RofiCvXIYhEUpyCWyey9Uiz7A==&ch=UQQaBS0qBfhagwW7jKtsdpkZQMgv8WDkI45b1fujrrncfZLaawcvhA==)
[If you're tired of MAGA extremists like Lauren Boebert who pal around with the worst people while doing nothing to improve your life in Congress, will you rush a donation of $25, $10, or whatever you can spare to help us retire Lauren Boebert once and for all?](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q5WWqUyLafoxkgSyWRJpAP7F4LDbjahrMMQ0S1MFaQ4shUlq1PFJr5Kpre87wBnv0S0cwvQm-sk1kA4aOhUBHm4wdP1VH3rNs2IkRqHmOTt3d7GmujFxIUDXTHZ0n-UhxaZoZUUsGnols8WbvLxUZBgEPWQp-nfWGDvUsAMOLsW4lcz1-CLTS12GQhOGSZEU5ox1YJXBLnltpjxYO9ZEsucOFae_eDIRhorle7emfbE=&c=45A2vyaUQnPRm8hxIclRm1w9CCHa_RofiCvXIYhEUpyCWyey9Uiz7A==&ch=UQQaBS0qBfhagwW7jKtsdpkZQMgv8WDkI45b1fujrrncfZLaawcvhA==)

clean_body: Boebert really knows how to pick em. | | | | Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat taking on Lauren Boebert in Colorado's 4th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Trisha. However == you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email. | == | Peter, In December, it was revealed that Lauren Boebert potentially violated the law by using thousands of her campaign funds to attend the concert of her alleged lover, Kid Rock. Kid Rock is back in the news after Turning Point USA announced him as the headline for their alternative halftime show during the upcoming Super Bowl. TPUSA is hosting their own halftime show to protest Puerto Rican superstar Bad Bunny's selection as the performer for this year's Super Bowl because he has been critical of ICE's inhumane violence. Well, the renewed spotlight on Boebert's alleged lover has unearthed something deeply disturbing: | == Boebert really knows how to pick em. The most concerning thing though, is a pattern that is emerging with Boebert. Her now ex-husband was infamously arrested for exposing himself to underage girls at a bowling alley in Colorado. Boebert herself was present when he did it: | == And of course, Boebert is one of the biggest Trump sycophants out there--and Trump has appeared over 35,000 times in the Epstein files. The kindest thing we can say is that Boebert has "poor" judgement. She surrounds herself with the worst of the worst; convicted felons, pedophiles, disgraced conmen and fraudsters. Her entourage is a who's who of some of the worst people on planet Earth. The voters of CO-4 are tired of the circus act that follows Boebert around. They just want a representative who puts their head down and does the work--someone who will fight to make their lives more affordable, ensure they have healthcare, and their rights aren't trampled on by the federal government. That's why Democrat Trisha Calvarese's campaign is surging and Boebert is more vulnerable than she has ever been. Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes and last time Trisha ran against her, she had the best performance any Democrat has ever had in the district's history, outperforming Kamala Harris by 6 points. Now Trisha is going to finish the job in 2026 and we just outraised Boebert by a million last quarter.== == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | In solidarity, Team Trisha | | Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat running against Lauren Boebert in Colorado's 4th Congressional District. Trisha is a labor leader, federal public servant, and native daughter of the district. Trisha fought for working Americans as the speechwriter of the National AFL-CIO and will carry that fight to D.C. as the next Congresswoman for CO-4. | == Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado | | | | 9609 S University Blvd, PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

body:
I refuse to let my children grow up in a country that no longer believes in itself.
[](http://links.magaallies.com/u/click?_t=ec6977da27e4463794af691eb6b01adc&_m=82aab9c1d2534bf1adb66b079c8a9ddd&_e=rbAGLouUaEWazbORqRic9VSI0ge_5oKhE51XbI__ySvn-y3KApdn3vFJZ_8nCk5OeMe3nFLqO23QrS2440t8g8KVU8CR0iQJiNsvz54vtE3hvUR7bYUXe1Yw088nXEKKQGDAbRFJWvJS0OAnN7jOZurUIK-jEdVHmuohdRBW8ljVnI55bDr-BcbUgoxuXtGqpTg3T7hD3VIjOdBQcL4oBbsqUHt5mYLpslFPN6AYaiDpPpQm_XEcN9pQD7MUmJOhOuwiGWOZKjxEnSBlo7G9gxpYdqEEjZGMGiAlrKjC6KnNHVK8xNeakbrCH4lbfm2yDAxhCMmbCMlWDGoYCm5ROWU4MlJ-oseK80NqlgiqTeLn9FQjo8nSssXHZWmedSKWULPjx7fT2fDvoAsDAIv7stzmftqLTUyXaqfMMej3DQkJXi_3-P-y4qQpVm8CB3L-ISQPvLmcgY6oPCmRkkURkRUVSt0Gv6aqXgbyYX_EmLHcs2Vg8aKpjtlXsp-qKL2vFdaUpQAlujDhuzEOXvi5dlkuJ1uC40IY_5_EWx3pRCKlXPzs8mGMkmCDVQueqMFXQCNgv74PHNuOlLzmLk3s1Rc4GAlAQK1ffAj-8gB7VlcrD2Vp67etqhO7cAOPCk_896UfIPeexZ-Y0gcUOkz6TUSW5ToxK3aaxObOtmnRj4fedpxr0dpwaMXYsLhecf1wvzgpXRdFTa_AyGmeR1vIyimZXoS7hH8jzwmPIS2dtjc%3D) Fellow Conservative, The other day, after we finished playing in the snow, I sat down with my two sons. They're still young. They don't understand the mechanics of a political campaign - but they do understand when something serious is happening. Before I announced my campaign, I wanted to prepare them. I told them they might see strangers yelling at their dad. That I might be away more than usual. That they might read ugly headlines about our family -- things that simply aren't true. I promised to always keep them safe, but this time around, I also told them the harder truth: [When your country is at a crossroads, you don’t hide. You lead.](http://links.magaallies.com/u/click?_t=ec6977da27e4463794af691eb6b01adc&_m=82aab9c1d2534bf1adb66b079c8a9ddd&_e=rbAGLouUaEWazbORqRic9VSI0ge_5oKhE51XbI__ySvn-y3KApdn3vFJZ_8nCk5OeMe3nFLqO23QrS2440t8g8KVU8CR0iQJiNsvz54vtE3hvUR7bYUXe1Yw088nXEKKQGDAbRFJWvJS0OAnN7jOZurUIK-jEdVHmuohdRBW8ljVnI55bDr-BcbUgoxuXtGqpTg3T7hD3VIjOdBQcL4oBbsqUHt5mYLpslFPN6AYaiDpPpQm_XEcN9pQD7MUmJOhEsV4iC_a2fLV1-eO1SxTMBK7SF0KWa_HYqMl9GtYz3_1WHRiJESJ6qsqOji0gseXWoyVu_oGmc6FlwAgGLFVUNzRIfr0j8FYKcHcojai8369NNlw6LGSaWGfb2CmmpjPdFsKC9r8WUZaaqDXZeyp3U8GVo7gnthlN2M_51MfUdxF5_c2VRQOjCEDv-RX0QE8BvFQAse2DuaVV7gV9gpSvG7d2xuv4dWceGgNHhGVXbz8G9A76dXyDuldtVjcHOj8JHMelAPEzffqw9ULGAEotvJ11sUtIgGngDXTu-0Q9wb7xNBbp1uXHbNyIEAulQlitdebcDqDjSec_yQaOIojondC4-iDZB69rwvgC9Tuw-AjtDElSTYxJUxHXUNDGauT3KtrDOqynVXpsQb7AGOrty6koS6IFzrI-Xv5oB8o7Q2FcG68-3U6ehUBVHhlbY9-Zws-ZmczNSw0lm5ZSrT55Jw6VfHk53-u8B7zrW2DtIg%3D) [That’s why I’m running for Governor of Ohio.](http://links.magaallies.com/u/click?_t=ec6977da27e4463794af691eb6b01adc&_m=82aab9c1d2534bf1adb66b079c8a9ddd&_e=rbAGLouUaEWazbORqRic9VSI0ge_5oKhE51XbI__ySvn-y3KApdn3vFJZ_8nCk5OeMe3nFLqO23QrS2440t8g8KVU8CR0iQJiNsvz54vtE3hvUR7bYUXe1Yw088nXEKKQGDAbRFJWvJS0OAnN7jOZurUIK-jEdVHmuohdRBW8ljVnI55bDr-BcbUgoxuXtGqpTg3T7hD3VIjOdBQcL4oBbsqUHt5mYLpslFPN6AYaiDpPpQm_XEcN9pQD7MUmJOh2tnBa8BQkAVGz9A7eeij8Fvqq4_VrjdLfun2NDVxETapOI9KsbJDhCFDuzG8B7pK7VsCEjgwkSsKk0Z-Io7W1M4HIe4cSWI0qFNT1GnLP5LwkcFDy8fn1e5MOQPxB_iNvrfzSkFEh5pLeGzgo-GWfy7W8xcw-uRGm63NmQe47Z6JffCaf6QMGBCySKFy5M2MBdySNfgVOpBVNNyeJWyz34G2qqFTLxAH8O-Wh5cMhoJQA3WjIfnnDN-mbUxbMjJzoVt9hW1iamXUjLCV1Z9Ze0dHSRYS-iuFaBtOIV_3FPMODjHQjkIo19kC0wnsRxv5i4F0xYRKhld4tG4aINWu54sGD04r5nk4UGS9gWtpU-4SR7HWW6b2_zimM5aDGflqiYiQQYTc86Hy-v5Dw_7xE_gkQvGO5SzU4XYtk3qLmnOWsCrYDqSDEGLghsh6IPY3368GK6vvunz9Rk9WwnhyNv4OjzmJAtaGJD9X0zH5Zhs%3D) Not because it's easy. Not because it's safe. But because I refuse to let my sons - or your children - grow up in a country that no longer believes in itself. Ohio should be the state that leads this Nation again -- in education, in industry, in values that matter. I'm fighting for that future. For my family. For yours. For every child who deserves a country worth inheriting. If you believe in that same future -- one worth passing down -- I'm asking you to stand with me in a small, but meaningful way: [Donate just $1 to my campaign today.](http://links.magaallies.com/u/click?_t=ec6977da27e4463794af691eb6b01adc&_m=82aab9c1d2534bf1adb66b079c8a9ddd&_e=rbAGLouUaEWazbORqRic9VSI0ge_5oKhE51XbI__ySvn-y3KApdn3vFJZ_8nCk5OeMe3nFLqO23QrS2440t8g8KVU8CR0iQJiNsvz54vtE3hvUR7bYUXe1Yw088nXEKKQGDAbRFJWvJS0OAnN7jOZurUIK-jEdVHmuohdRBW8ljVnI55bDr-BcbUgoxuXtGqpTg3T7hD3VIjOdBQcL4oBbsqUHt5mYLpslFPN6AYaiDpPpQm_XEcN9pQD7MUmJOhkuvB_LLceHIC1vh8Y5rzEvBK4XYXL1CIh9jbzZkoeGv4MAHXT_9dvmc6CXiCvlwvMfI8q5MnhPm2DPxNt-the8RnHXWwQe9U1e5_wWAfhyhSj4bUBDrDJQP4cYEnnaJKSFePrvrHyQ6nXJdB95WXAY6LEXj62rKWe9X3gLKhgH2-P36xU97MqDA0WWcqBJkSrpdYnZh43kgbTjl_UZjrjgyuwLIAUZwIg765gWhmCk8_130qFSNDkYYF5ud-UCNeGWxRXZREz4Ua0gnFC0uNdlKi0yl0KuN0_dz1M8Bshc9KS144CWDhcVraMYyhm19hmyqVn9CjcBwNIrjD42ojH3VibiEQ-eawUauA3nRDkWdABq8sMd7ZBhSxvdYP3MA_aEIFHZQ8zQyuVYZdqfMX8mPXXpeXWsewHm4ZWFeJdPIKA9f2c9X3uAOdRUQd625Mo9JJwsAURa25c2HNW3WnzqcN-AqCEbJJEKBLAbwJLXk%3D) [ CHIP IN $1

clean_body: I refuse to let my children grow up in a country that no longer believes in itself. Fellow Conservative, The other day, after we finished playing in the snow, I sat down with my two sons. They're still young. They don't understand the mechanics of a political campaign - but they do understand when something serious is happening. Before I announced my campaign, I wanted to prepare them. I told them they might see strangers yelling at their dad. That I might be away more than usual. That they might read ugly headlines about our family -- things that simply aren't true. I promised to always keep them safe, but this time around, I also told them the harder truth: Not because it's easy. Not because it's safe. But because I refuse to let my sons - or your children - grow up in a country that no longer believes in itself. Ohio should be the state that leads this Nation again -- in education, in industry, in values that matter. I'm fighting for that future. For my family. For yours. For every child who deserves a country worth inheriting. If you believe in that same future -- one worth passing down -- I'm asking you to stand with me in a small, but meaningful way: Not because $1 changes everything on its own -- but because thousands of Americans choosing to give a single dollar is how movements begin. It's a signal that you're in this fight with me, and that I'm grateful to have Patriots like you in my corner. Let's win this together, Vivek Ramaswamy * This will be one of the biggest and most expensive races of 2026, and I REALLY need your help to get ahead. | | | Paid for by Vivek Ramaswamy and Rob McColley for Ohio 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201 To unsubscribe from Vivek Ramaswamy for Ohio,

clean_body: I just stepped out of the Oval Office to send you this | | | | Forget the middle man. I wanted you to hear this DIRECTLY from me! Thanks to YOU , a year ago I was inaugurated as the 47th President of the United States. We’ve done SO much, and it’s truly been aHELL OF A RIDE. Our border is SHUT , gas prices have hit a FIVE-YEAR LOW , inflation is UNDER CONTROL , the economy is BOOMING , and the USA is finally RESPECTED again. The Democrats CAN’T STAND that the American people are winning again, and they’ll USE EVERY DIRTY TACTIC possible to destroy our progress. And make no mistake, Patriot: when they come after me, they’re really coming after YOU! I’m just standing in their way. We’ve been through HELL together, andNOTHING has torn our bond apart. Unlike the Democrats, I UNDERSTAND how much you love our country and how hard you work every day to live the American dream. And I NEVER forget who I’m fighting for: YOU! Together, we will finish what we started. Together, we will keep MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. — President Donald J. name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: The promise of Texans owning a home is slipping away
body:
None of this is happening by accident.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter,
Texans are working more and more and getting less and less. It’s clear in every aspect of life. Working hard used to mean you could build a life in Texas. You could pay the bills, save a little, and eventually buy a home. But after almost 12 years under Greg Abbott, that promise is slipping away.
Families are being squeezed by the Abbott Corruption Tax and costs are skyrocketing much faster than our paychecks.
**More than half of Texas renters — over _4.1 million people_ — now spend more than 30 percent of their income just to keep a roof over their heads.**
**[If you are ready for leadership that takes on corporations driving up costs and puts working Texans first, will you chip in $5 today to help me beat Greg Abbott?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260208_1_housing.-sHJZA&refcode=em20260208-548&amount=5&t=1&akid=548%2E299639%2EHe7pCP)**
This is not happening by accident.
The price of a house is going up at unreasonable rates, rent is rising, and too many homes are being treated like extra investments for millionaires instead of places for families to live and build a life.
**Meanwhile, Abbott keeps protecting the same corporate interests that profit from driving up the cost of housing — and Texans are getting priced out.**
As governor, I will fight to lower housing costs, expand the supply of homes Texans can afford, and take on corporations who manipulate the market at the expense of working families.
No Texan should have to choose between rent and groceries, or between staying in their community and leaving the state we all love.
**[Please chip in $5 or any amount to build the campaign we need to beat Abbott and make housing affordable again.](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260208_1_housing.-sHJZA&refcode=em20260208-548&amount=5&t=2&akid=548%2E299639%2EHe7pCP)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260208_1_housing.-sHJZA&amount=5&refcode=em20260208-548&t=21&akid=548%2E299639%2EHe7pCP)
Thank you,
Gina

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260208-1&t=22&refcode2=548_299639_He7pCP&akid=548%2E299639%2EHe7pCP)

name: Team Walz
subject: Minnesota will not be bullied
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
#
Peter,
The Trump administration is still targeting Minnesota.
Federal power is being used to intimidate. People are living in fear. And families are paying the price for decisions made by an administration that doesn’t care what’s actually happening in our communities.
This isn’t about public safety. And it’s not about justice.
Governor Walz has been clear from day one: Minnesota will not be bullied. He’s demanding accountability, calling for independent investigations, and pushing back against a federal government more interested in political retribution than public safety.
So now, his Department of Justice is trying to silence Governor Walz with politically motivated legal attacks.
If you believe no president is above the law, and no state should be punished for standing up for its people, we need you with us.
**[Chip in $5 or whatever works for you today to the Legal Defense Fund and help Tim keep fighting for Minnesota’s freedom, safety, and dignity.](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20260208.jxalJi&amount=5&refcode=em20260208-466&t=1&akid=466%2E34582%2EXLEkV5)**

St. Paul MN 55104
clean_body: Peter, The Trump administration is still targeting Minnesota. Federal power is being used to intimidate. People are living in fear. And families are paying the price for decisions made by an administration that doesn’t care what’s actually happening in our communities. This isn’t about public safety. And it’s not about justice. Governor Walz has been clear from day one: Minnesota will not be bullied. He’s demanding accountability, calling for independent investigations, and pushing back against a federal government more interested in political retribution than public safety. So now, his Department of Justice is trying to silence Governor Walz with politically motivated legal attacks. If you believe no president is above the law, and no state should be punished for standing up for its people, we need you with us. Thank you for having his back — and Minnesota’s. Team Walz Email us: mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: The book Charlie left behind
body:
[unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmd5fi2bt1ih25z7kcv1et61rlzop9tb2yqgh8yybwh5x6wj5gqj07ti51q94vwjm8og6ps41wcefe5znah7nppmgqxdi4unn6h6vvtr&__stmp=ta5l2s&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor
* * *

| | | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5l2s&__onlt=h)
---
| | Friend,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn’t a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal — the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God’s grace.**

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**“God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold.”**_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5l2s&__onlt=h)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie’s voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie’s hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5l2s&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5l2s&__onlt=h)
---
In the months since Charlie’s assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA’s message among young Americans...

...and it’s not just the conservative message as a whole — _**it’s the message of FAITH!**_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie’s call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it’s happening._

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we’re witnessing is not just growth —**it’s revival.**

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America’s faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up.**

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _“We’re not backing down.”_

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie’s most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie’s faith._**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

**[To claim your copy of Charlie’s final book, simply make a gift, in any amount, to support Turning Point USA today.](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5l2s&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5l2s&__onlt=h)
---
I’ll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible.

Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie’s mission and supporting his legacy.
---
**For Charlie,**

**Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5l2s&__onlt=h)
---
**[Support Turning Point USA](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5l2s&__onlt=h)**
---
**P.S.** When you read **_Stop, in the Name of God,_** you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead.

**[I hope you’ll claim your copy by making your most generous gift to Turning Point USA. Your support fuels our work to build the most faithful generation of Americans in history. Thank you, and God bless!](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5l2s&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5l2s&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
[Privacy Policy](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=o40io4oxrs3q14t9fcas2t87g1ky2thmzw63xmvirxehcyrcx2z3ok55xzggo76jc4n7wjsh6d2pjcqm8xl668l4nb7khdb7b78doi7zrm10pw86g1mq65ad90q0mpyrhwuqbog1uaapuk2mf956973mdlyccd431n&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5l2s&__onlt=h) / [Advertise with us](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=64luld8ccjmd12rmkeb0rykz5j23kruh46a3qxhz6ble743cx66kezm37zr4lke5oowo59vuk4hpaw6pokepr1ulvufkw6lvyivsdqm4tseko2relcrtwsuyrk68rs0dvcaaioefps1hecrs52y4zn98g3jp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5l2s&__onlt=h)

name: Rob Bonta
subject: We just defeated Trump in court again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26]
Friends — an update on our lawsuit to protect over $10 billion in child care and family assistance funding from illegal Trump cuts:
We've secured a court order that continues blocking Trump’s unlawful attempt to freeze child care funding in five Democratic-led states.
The Trump administration’s actions are not just illegal — they’re also cruel, targeting the most vulnerable among us.
The court has sided with us once again, and we will not relent in this case until we permanently block this unlawful funding freeze.
If you can contribute $15 today to help power this work, please donate at this link or through the button below — your support makes all of this possible. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?amount=50]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?amount=50]
Thank you. More to come.
—Rob
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Rob Bonta <info@robbonta.com>
Date: Sat, Jan 17, 2026
Friends , let me explain what’s going on with the Trump administration and more than $10 billion in federal child care funding right now:
→ First, Trump’s HHS illegally froze billions of dollars in federal funding for five blue states — with zero evidence to justify doing so.
→ Then, I sued him — like I’ve done every time Trump breaks the law or violates the Constitution.
→ Within 24 hours, a federal court granted a temporary restraining order to block the funding freeze.
That’s good, but it’s not enough. Low-income families rely on these funds to afford child care so parents can work or go to school — so now, I’m fighting to extend the court’s much-needed protection so families across California and the other targeted states don’t pay the price for Trump’s reckless and illegal maneuvers.
And look — it’s no coincidence that Trump is targeting only blue states here. Since day one of his administration, he’s been attacking Democratic-led states in an effort to force us to comply with his extreme agenda. But if he thinks it will work, he’s sorely mistaken.
California will never back down when it comes to defending our rights and freedoms. That’s exactly why I’m running for re-election to serve as your Attorney General.
Will you join my re-election campaign today to help power this work to protect California and hold Trump accountable to the law? No amount is too small — it all adds up. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?amount=50]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?express_lane=true&amount=25] DONATE $37 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?express_lane=true&amount=37]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?express_lane=true&amount=50] DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?express_lane=true&amount=250] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26]
Thank you for standing with me.
—Rob
Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?amount=50]
To contribute via check, please address to:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Thank you for supporting Rob Bonta. Grassroots supporters like you help us protect California’s working families, advance criminal justice reform, and keep our communities safe. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. If we're going to protect and serve the people of California, we need you with us every step of the way.
If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, click unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/tsXL_NR2qEmgRRek5GtgsA2?unsubscribedata=SrpQcgrxXG7xysWRNaLgozu9G7L4WOG3YQ%2FQmjKmpq7Zm3pa8izQDb0M5fUr3MmazpVGuXRY%2FL8uX591ypXKhnMM4jUTDxhPwbJJwtpZjwk3pKLeJzJQVFMo1McDLkooUt%2FPXRdTHTuELs4S99aCCe4hX1aFwCg4YJxvLopKLf%2B0PcI2U02SonO5uy9k4gnmD8%2FEujFFJOTWZjUoPngyRxHrVXDsdYAY42cmmtvlWL3L2ysjvljVoelPICWwbqT%2BoAK5W91Hb7cq6mhGol4EfEhwZSNiohdmQTNggXS0JhzqnCVQ0MrJPXKub%2BzrajoQpeYZtqgok7J0lBXVlCW5o91rfbzH0wABcpT2dova2NmMSGh%2Fwh16NlS9JgXqRk1MsXMe4DYFEYwgMz2oYce5jf0%2Fta0IKjmBKb7zMOxaQJbf%2F3fdANrurKlmHat8YpQm .
From all of us at Team Bonta, thank you for your support!

the first time I ran for office. No fancy consultants. No big donors. I just believed my hometown community needed young voices at the table. So I ran for City Council.

| Peter,

I was 24 the first time I ran for office.

No fancy consultants. No big donors. I just believed my hometown community needed young voices at the table. So I ran for City Council.

I knocked on doors, listened to my neighbors, and talked about the kind of representation Michiganders deserved.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124988382/600333274/680287355?refcode=BLU_EM_MOSS_2026-02-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc5OTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjUwODQ5MGYtMWUwNS1mMTExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GY7nsVj_bwz5UWfjvpqoHdCE1txvHwxs5nbF8IZWqhM=)
Guess what? **We won that race with more votes than any other City Councilmember.** And in that role, I was able to make real, lasting change in my community by challenging the status quo.

I’ve carried that same mindset with me throughout my career. Stay grounded, stay honest, and never forget who you’re fighting for.

Now, I’m running for Congress as we fight against new forces that try to divide us, roll back our freedoms, and put the interests of those in power ahead of working people.

My mentality is the same as it was back when I ran my first campaign. **We need bold, fresh voices – because the current leadership is no longer working.**

[_**Will you chip in today to help build a campaign rooted in the same grassroots grit that got us here?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124988383/600333275/680287355?refcode=BLU_EM_MOSS_2026-02-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc5OTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjUwODQ5MGYtMWUwNS1mMTExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GY7nsVj_bwz5UWfjvpqoHdCE1txvHwxs5nbF8IZWqhM=)

clean_body: the first time I ran for office. No fancy consultants. No big donors. I just believed my hometown community needed young voices at the table. So I ran for City Council. | = | Peter, I was 24 the first time I ran for office. No fancy consultants. No big donors. I just believed my hometown community needed young voices at the table. So I ran for City Council. I knocked on doors, listened to my neighbors, and talked about the kind of representation Michiganders deserved. = Guess what? We won that race with more votes than any other City Councilmember. And in that role, I was able to make real, lasting change in my community by challenging the status quo. I’ve carried that same mindset with me throughout my career. Stay grounded, stay honest, and never forget who you’re fighting for. Now, I’m running for Congress as we fight against new forces that try to divide us, roll back our freedoms, and put the interests of those in power ahead of working people. My mentality is the same as it was back when I ran my first campaign. We need bold, fresh voices – because the current leadership is no longer working. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for believing in this, Jeremy * | | = Paid for by Jeremy Moss for Congress Jeremy Moss for Congress 2211 S Telegraph Rd PO Box 7023 Bloomfield Hills, MI 48302 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

These union endorsements aren’t symbolic. They’re earned, and they reflect Seth’s record of service, accountability, and leadership that meet the urgency of this moment. If you believe working people deserve a Senator who has their back, not just during campaigns, but in office, help us keep this momentum going. | [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124988956/600334156/1375639745?refcode=260208_hq_back_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjU5NzI3NS0xZjA1LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KHcpN1qo9ZgRaWF-8eTOdEykIV3bKHXMXYY1Uop0IAE=)

body:
Cold, hard revenge
| | | | |
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9dd32f3519d6440dbb2b1f3aeaeeb6d5&_e=bB8HX5hh5I9b-FrZHtBVz7d32mL_6n-BB1cka9F9wI9qPIAekv3KUDeVw54dyAEahHS6TUoGyG6ubVcZejiWJf19r4h8R_xWS33U8a0ckwUlHfpnnNMrbuxo6r8MyUl-akhncaMmYkwkj_gSJd6lqMJvWeuIJkWhIyCRmg_4UTR8Ae_0ojVkaTcUlj74k6ei11GTJh0-Zgzm5oUoTIDYqBS51euWB3AlpmJouF94wGknEW_a9BZo0p78XYJXr4zBfDyiznBqOd-3PYMEwZCt23HpgB1nYhDuGn374B75tYiGepVTI9R3OtV6HGQAk7eVqsFpg7J07it5_-jPs_B8vw28rk2j6CKnOBBGctaxuj6t-GocA9fIKD3r56fg3pw936RaeMbajRQFsfU00ip4JyjoxdQ0r9hXGPexB39163u4dwnN9Jf1_p8wDLfQzRr2KdoZVuOlbHFz_OI_j6_4JA4UfOaejihlch1ic7pnUe8zHQjito5dvjVCMDjnPFPdVECCLLlXQS7ExarwuRBvvZzww-vBeeiCqhRvlMOu8T9D9bGv6s7fpC39G5vlEann-KnoGkBDS13iX5Yi50mDPQJICmytX6RD64NbyQbgCKjh46EWLCBoF6KCa0p1P3tz6kkQm2XCCZMFv7GTVZ5Qn9_lKirlp82niDlBdi3REWAW-o1aoanncIDKZU-x886Z)

Friend,
The war on President Trump started the instant he stepped off that golden escalator in 2015 and promised to put America First.
**The Democrat Machine, their media pawns, and entrenched Deep State bureaucrats declared total war with no rules and no mercy.**
They hit him with the **Russia hoax** that dragged on for years, costing hundreds of millions and tearing the country apart.
When that collapsed, they pivoted straight to the **impeachment fraud** – a manufactured crisis built on lies, designed to nullify your vote and remove a duly elected President.
And even after they lost, they didn’t stop. They kept coming – _**more investigations, lawfare traps, endless smears, corrupt indictments and convictions.**_
Through all this and worse, President Trump survived, persevered and prevailed – winning a stunning comeback for a second term to help save this country we love so dearly.
**_But the radicals never quit. They’re still burning with rage._**
**And now, Alexander Vindman – the man who helped to orchestrate the entire failed impeachment hoax and nearly killed MAGA – is back. And he's out for cold, hard revenge.**
**He just launched a campaign to hijack Florida's critical U.S. Senate seat in one of this year’s biggest special elections. And within 24 hours, liberal donors pumped in an eye-popping $1.7 million with much more on the way.**
**This is no longer a normal race._It is straight, personal revenge politics._**
[PITCH IN NOW](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9dd32f3519d6440dbb2b1f3aeaeeb6d5&_e=bB8HX5hh5I9b-FrZHtBVz7d32mL_6n-BB1cka9F9wI9qPIAekv3KUDeVw54dyAEahHS6TUoGyG6ubVcZejiWJf19r4h8R_xWS33U8a0ckwUlHfpnnNMrbuxo6r8MyUl-akhncaMmYkwkj_gSJd6lqMJvWeuIJkWhIyCRmg_4UTR8Ae_0ojVkaTcUlj74k6ei11GTJh0-Zgzm5oUoTIDYqBS51euWB3AlpmJouF94wGknEW_a9BZo0p78XYJXr4zB75uDS_8n5e-FL4D_2fDVC_kxHv463rAce33CQTDt80-Fxn54f-u0mWJYauyzDVAltyesxwu0mTouG0SeFrHuObYSxpE5D3Y3xm-3MlhCvUL7BPZc3WdKMdtxRbpuUbQwwQ3tdLWtuay5Cs-HVrv-b1rQ_c1yytljoX_QawvIUe6ZmU4hswHTlHcaFDDOdmw_-HQf-zsdagD_CJ6AluOdFNLCPnFPBRIOs1Wtupx4UKqhNjny73Z8P5j6WOqVgUGVrxPHjXDLm3kHoTU-1nMWKjemDr3lnp4oz1urkmxiPsjBfiwfWJtIwjy1xU9zBZ72T58Hy8qlC2t7myWEAIhUHT79nzsOpEQ2bVFupVCgxhyYKMQw0Ylzj0aBE9fFWCUpKl6fRfaTIG3YgKFTqVTSuuJg9iPyuycLRvvi4dX3KpS5_3piefY6hwwUlW46n13i)
I was honored to be appointed to fill Florida’s U.S. Senate seat once Marco Rubio joined the Cabinet. **And now, with President Trump’s complete and total endorsement, I’m running to win it outright.** It will be one of the biggest and most expensive special elections of the year, but I’m committed to defending President Trump and the America First Agenda that we all voted for.
Remember this – if we lose, our majorities vanish, our agenda stalls, and the country we fought for is lost. **We are not allowing that.**
[**We know you can't personally cancel out $1.7 million in radical, anti-Trump money. But you can cancel out one anti-Trump donor's donation of $25 or more, and you can do it now.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9dd32f3519d6440dbb2b1f3aeaeeb6d5&_e=bB8HX5hh5I9b-FrZHtBVz7d32mL_6n-BB1cka9F9wI9qPIAekv3KUDeVw54dyAEahHS6TUoGyG6ubVcZejiWJf19r4h8R_xWS33U8a0ckwUlHfpnnNMrbuxo6r8MyUl-akhncaMmYkwkj_gSJd6lqMJvWeuIJkWhIyCRmg_4UTR8Ae_0ojVkaTcUlj74k6ei11GTJh0-Zgzm5oUoTIDYqBS51euWB3AlpmJouF94wGknEW_a9BZo0p78XYJXr4zBMD3eXxvbg1ZCs4hKsHOS-s805wvlx8e_Wz80btVj_98ZWYeD7eSSU1n96UoD3_4dv7dYqoq7wWoQ0GDUSzhWd10DzxU1Tfxt5AHmFzaekHenZygP4MDGjb1HORrLrNmJZHJjvh14KEXuS7B9Xh45YWjuCPltdlZMaKBCoD7OUcCg0IESfxLpO9zma_S7qgG9bPPqyKJ3ZrP7FmEqy0lunky4wW7As2XBTLRCizatT5fP8vTucx9aaoKLnX0LnwAAW3irZlkgJuJ9cpoNq96eFeWDxlcpARRR8FPJK1Z9BEbQnTfYxgtia8ksf_hLf2cdJ7Xp-swSYsaO6nNuEFqGarLG-6dNJfnjoxB9oR0S14SxtCRsBaPFUQYnCBjww2ABnw_yfV2jonKdgN9LYzeEWFqeuABtpi4_si03qyfwjy5xTCpltrevAou8TGMX0cBb)
**_Are you in?_**
The line is drawn, and it's time to bury the endless vendetta against our President and our movement.
Thank you for your commitment.
Sincerely,Ashley Moody

On January 3rd, 2021, I stood in the House chamber and swore to support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic.
Three days later, the Capitol was attacked, and I had a choice to make: _be a politician, or be a patriot._
**I put our republic first: I served on the January 6th Committee, seeking truth, justice, and accountability for the American people.**
That decision may have cost me my House seat in 2022, after an onslaught of MAGA cash targeted our district. But I’d make the same choice all over again, because I swore an oath—the same oath I swore at 17 when I entered the Naval Academy—to protect the country I love.
**That’s why I’m running for Congress.**
I’m running to help families get ahead instead of just getting by, to ensure veterans get the support they need, and to defend our Constitution.
These aren’t just talking points, Derek. **We _can_ win this.** We’ve already done so twice before. And in November, Virginians proved they’re intent on a new direction.
I’m ready to bring tough leadership to communities across Coastal Virginia, but I can’t go it alone. I’m counting on patriots like you to join me on the right side of history.
**If you’re ready to take back our district and flip the House majority,[will you join my mission to flip VA-02 by splitting a $5 contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124989214/600335159/1819897821?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1221-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjE4NDM2Zi0yMDA1LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GnA301MpG8KfhfrP5MCev5Vmj5RH4ks7pfOGVo2m9Mk=)**

clean_body: | | | = Hi, Derek, Elaine Luria here. I’m a mom, a Navy vet, and a former Democratic Congresswoman, and now I’m running for Congress in Virginia’s 2nd District. = | | = On January 3rd, 2021, I stood in the House chamber and swore to support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic. Three days later, the Capitol was attacked, and I had a choice to make: be a politician, or be a patriot. I put our republic first: I served on the January 6th Committee, seeking truth, justice, and accountability for the American people. That decision may have cost me my House seat in 2022, after an onslaught of MAGA cash targeted our district. But I’d make the same choice all over again, because I swore an oath—the same oath I swore at 17 when I entered the Naval Academy—to protect the country I love. That’s why I’m running for Congress. I’m running to help families get ahead instead of just getting by, to ensure veterans get the support they need, and to defend our Constitution. These aren’t just talking points, Derek. We can win this. We’ve already done so twice before. And in November, Virginians proved they’re intent on a new direction. I’m ready to bring tough leadership to communities across Coastal Virginia, but I can’t go it alone. I’m counting on patriots like you to join me on the right side of history. If you’re ready to take back our district and flip the House majority,= | | = I want you to know how grateful I am for your support. Together, Elaine Luria | Chrissy Houlahan for Congress P.O. name: Research Team (Voter Action Project)
subject: Do you want to go back to paper ballots?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Ohio Capitol Journal: Trump executive order on voting machines puts many Ohio counties in limbo [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/OCJ_Trump_VotingMachinesPaperBallots.png]
President Donald Trump has continued his crusade to radically reform how we vote, targeting the machines we use around the country to cast our ballots and calling for a return to paper ballots that are hand-counted.
This comes even after decades of proof that paper ballots and hand-counting processes are more susceptible to fraud and error. It also builds on Trump's attacks on mail-in ballots, despite voting via mail himself in several recent elections.
We want to hear from our supporters about your feelings about this news. Will you take our quick one-question poll right away?
Team: Do you agree with Donald Trump that we should get rid of voting machines and go back to hand-counted paper ballots?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=020826_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=020826_1no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=020826_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=020826_1&amount=20]

subject: The Super Bowl is going woke.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
I'm SICK and TIRED of the Left POISONING our culture, our sports, and our country, and too many woke politicians are too weak to fight back.
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=d6bd8d6fdf534e3b8e7877a222faa8f4&_e=4IDnEVIw0oEODgAy_3SfoT5mGN6PArWgHJ7OXp9ilV0rAC57XKfqfGPrbwulg6l8Ce8Vin7D3fJx8pHd35RKeA9hAxmcxMqEAJTJN6antaLpYgnJRuIUUtmMTg7YVoel-XT67DZOYrn2T32ipF3LphNyAvONzM2Da8caJFdjS_0tBIUoXIgiPar4NIKaj0NjqNeT7BZaUH7uijTFLOquv9HqMje2d13RnWNVoMvyPzXHWHXPn5dIORB7mhbOdYsoeEllp5hBp051-HC_0HMebR2tbYTgbKowmdMpjVk4sbaBPAsjuSJCa-dVopYcmk8G1672XsCQgJcMVQVQsTRYEbTyAl9ovBM9zUxFwTm9BiI0sh7dXVqOGnjT13R_Qho7s_hyiy5x3CgfDxTrt46AZZ3irGCnRzyO87JXFwXpDfiK43SpHB7jCPirDQxJZsNQ1A8Y0DmppKVm5T8kRC-8NMiN9aswSZ-g_rKW_d9-I340oXhJCWmaiVTkX8cqnTkUIGqm6nUd87HdrqBUxw3DdAh9hojvCZrsJRNtL7fknd0%3D)
---

Peter,

I'm **SICK** and **TIRED** of the Left **POISONING** our culture, our sports, and our country, and too many woke politicians are too weak to fight back.

I said it loud and clear: **the Super Bowl is going woke.**

And just like clockwork, the media freaked out.

They don't want leaders who tell them the truth. They want puppets. They want silence.

_Well, they picked the wrong guy._

I didn't spend decades coaching winners just to roll over for Hollywood elites and radical activists.

_**What used to unite Americans is now being turned into a woke circus, and if we don 't fight back, they'll keep pushing further.**_

That's exactly why I'm running for Governor.

The Left knows I won't bend, so they're already gearing up to stop me.

**But I 've got something stronger: _Patriots who are ready to defend their America First values._**

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie's final book wasn't about politics...
body:
[Mark as Spam](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x6pv0ysxb8fw4oowqadnnz17q5ke65odmva9lsoh4nirpnoemf5rtzoyrqr59vmiki71vx67znterc0w17z17yrcud1bi&__stmp=ta5mci&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) | [Unsubscribe](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x6pv0ysxb8fw4oowqadnnz17q5ke65odmva9lsoh4nirpnoemf5rtzoyrqr59vmiki71vx67znterc0w17z17yrcud1bi&__stmp=ta5mci&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
* * *
Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *

| | | [](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5mci&__onlt=h)
---
| | Friend,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn’t a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal — the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God’s grace.**

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**“God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold.”**_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5mci&__onlt=h)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie’s voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie’s hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5mci&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5mci&__onlt=h)
---
In the months since Charlie’s assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA’s message among young Americans...

...and it’s not just the conservative message as a whole — _**it’s the message of FAITH!**_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie’s call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it’s happening._

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we’re witnessing is not just growth —**it’s revival.**

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America’s faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up.**

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _“We’re not backing down.”_

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie’s most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie’s faith._**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

**[To claim your copy of Charlie’s final book, simply make a gift, in any amount, to support Turning Point USA today.](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5mci&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5mci&__onlt=h)
---
I’ll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible.

Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie’s mission and supporting his legacy.
---
**For Charlie,**

**Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5mci&__onlt=h)
---
**[Support Turning Point USA](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5mci&__onlt=h)**
---
**P.S.** When you read **_Stop, in the Name of God,_** you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead.

**[I hope you’ll claim your copy by making your most generous gift to Turning Point USA. Your support fuels our work to build the most faithful generation of Americans in history. Thank you, and God bless!](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5mci&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5mci&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
[Privacy Policy](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=mp4ijceynomcpkn9apzrycqs51bd6qh01wgqqfzpsrgu1liqajgiwegcqgi6rlwffdj62egknkuwu5jy31h2x0koiqrc0ibf34opnpr6c4dfpoqu1qrxocqoeazy99bm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5mci&__onlt=h)| [Contact Us](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=ujwelwcfe7gjeiv5vxjlrcsslb0th86qme2nf4bskdutgwaopqxp5wnqvjyqzbytmmiya2x961n00poaqn1z8kaswp0icqizksqfiq63s20k6pa27by5f&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5mci&__onlt=h)| [Unsubscribe](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x6pv0ysxb8fw4oowqadnnz17q5ke65odmva9lsoh4nirpnoemf5rtzoyrqr59vmiki71vx67znterc0w17z17yrcud1bi&__stmp=ta5mci&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

I’m emailing you today about New Hampshire’s Senate race because this is serious: **Senate Republicans’ hand-picked candidate, John Sununu, jumped in to defeat Chris Pappas and flip this open Senate seat red.**

[**_Before I go any further, I have to ask: Will you split $10 or more between Chris Pappas and Maggie Hassan to keep New Hampshire blue?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124989874/600337914/1047731393?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.02.08_Pappas-Pritzker_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODAwNGE4NS0yMjA1LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TnjERbyZ0myM4ep89ijJXzWe-0KOfYxeO-wzb1aOgNE=)

The NRSC — which pours millions into electing Republicans to the Senate — said they’re “all-in” on John Sununu. And polling shows: This race is a _statistical dead heat_ between Chris Pappas and John Sununu.

This means New Hampshire will see historic levels of outside spending, and we have to be ready to fight back.

Chris is a proven fighter for working families — and he’s seen tough campaigns like this before. He knows it takes grassroots support to win a race like this. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today.
