clean_body: = It's Governor JB Pritzker. I’m emailing you today about New Hampshire’s Senate race because this is serious: Senate Republicans’ hand-picked candidate, John Sununu, jumped in to defeat Chris Pappas and flip this open Senate seat red. = Without Chris Pappas winning in New Hampshire, Democrats won’t have a chance at taking back a majority in the Senate. That’s why this race is being targeted by GOP super PACs and Republicans across the country. The NRSC — which pours millions into electing Republicans to the Senate — said they’re “all-in” on John Sununu. And polling shows: This race is a statistical dead heat between Chris Pappas and John Sununu. This means New Hampshire will see historic levels of outside spending, and we have to be ready to fight back. Chris is a proven fighter for working families — and he’s seen tough campaigns like this before. He knows it takes grassroots support to win a race like this. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Chris Pappas and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = I know Chris is the type of leader we need in the Senate —= With gratitude, JB Pritzker Governor of Illinois If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Mandela Barnes
subject: My mission for Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
I’ll fight for families in every corner of Wisconsin
| If you’re sick and tired of politicians making empty promises, you wouldn’t be alone. So am I. That’s why I’m running to make a _tangible_ difference in the lives of Wisconsinites. Here are three of my priorities:
1. Using every tool at my disposal to **expand BadgerCare** and increase access to healthcare in all 72 counties.
2. **Cutting taxes for the middle class by closing billionaire tax loopholes** so families are not just surviving, but thriving.
3. **Fully funding our public schools and special education** to deliver a world-class education for every child.

Wisconsin deserves leaders who will stand up to do the right thing, even when it’s hard. As your Governor, I’ll make it my mission every single day to fight for you and families in every corner of our state. **[If these are policies you can get behind, I hope you’ll join our movement today with a contribution of $30, $20, or even $10 to get us closer to our end-of-month fundraising goal. name: Matt Cartwright
subject: Checking in with Matt Cartwright
body:
Two interesting free online events coming up

| | | | | |
---
| | | | | |
# Checking in with Matt Cartwright

FREE WEB EVENTS**Free webinar update on the passenger rail effort** It was a top priority of mine as a congressman to restore Amtrak service to our area. Our area should not take a backseat to other regions that do have Amtrak service. At my request, Governor Josh Shapiro agreed to back this project, and that has made all the difference. It’s Thursday, February 19 at 4:00 p.m. for an update on the progress. [Click here for the link.](https://gmail.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d84f33d35fca81cdaa0f2c88f&id=761c7fbd25&e=632a01d7cd)
**Interesting live bookstore conversation this week** I also want to let you readers know about another free online event live from Otto Bookstore in Williamsport. It’s my friend, former U.S. Rep. Steve Israel, there to discuss his new novel _The Einstein Conspiracy_ with Lycoming County Commissioner Mark Mussina, himself also an author (and brother of Hall of Fame MLB pitcher Mike Mussina). It will be **this Thursday** , February 12 from 7 to 9 p.m. Curl up with a hot chocolate and tune in. Should be good![Click here to RSVP](https://gmail.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d84f33d35fca81cdaa0f2c88f&id=94f0c398be&e=632a01d7cd).

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=187291056&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg3MjkxMDU2LCJpYXQiOjE3NzA1NzkwNDYsImV4cCI6MTc3MzE3MTA0NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.FXq6U-cMyG807J6XvSjri2ooxFZJLnGeMc8wnbgJKtY&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/starmers-stumbles?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1a0a35d2-c7eb-4c09-98d6-0937af32aff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer is batting on a sticky wicket, as the Brits might say, and has had a bruising few weeks. First, he was [criticized](https://substack.com/redirect/222af2bf-e3b9-40de-9716-ed72635fb322?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for his welcoming an antisemitic activist who had been released from an Egyptian prison back to the United Kingdom. Then US President Donald Trump called his [plan](https://substack.com/redirect/75980f49-be28-44af-8f0e-5072276d8154?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to hand the Chagos Islands to Mauritus a "great stupidity" which led the prime minister to scramble to hold the deal together. Further, the _Economist_ notes that on the issues that matter most to UK voters, the situation is [stagnant at best](https://substack.com/redirect/4945181e-9e5e-43e6-a8f3-7594e67b7ed2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). This is certainly true of the economy, and despite [his valiant attempt to describe the gloomy economic data in a positive light](https://substack.com/redirect/67d89cc4-b185-4045-96f3-15fe553ea582?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), few seem to be buying his spin.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2ed3b3a5-58a8-4c42-9af4-f4ba71e7734d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Things continue to deteriorate. Just last week, his hand-picked ambassador to the U.S. Peter Mandelson [popped up](https://substack.com/redirect/51e83ec7-7c5b-4c03-b7d7-fca3d3020d3d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the Jeffery Epstein emails released by the U.S. Department of Justice, and there's a lot of speculation about what Starmer knew before nominating him. Starmer was [forced to issue an apology](https://substack.com/redirect/44e85539-8210-444f-972b-f4e2159e009a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and the UK government has [vowed to release](https://substack.com/redirect/73497610-7621-4edf-88bb-d88ef5cf09ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) all of the files related to the nomination. The British police even [raided](https://substack.com/redirect/47a40863-a717-46fa-a44c-6e7d06369c0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) two of Mandelson's properties, searching for evidence and further stoking the political uproar.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..AtGokrxQx8WZMIdE0EE8RtSpIpxkM3_33q71_4B-32c?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=187291056)
Not surprisingly, polls indicate confidence in Starmer has [collapsed](https://substack.com/redirect/3bbca94e-c21a-4e42-9c5d-31aeead76a57?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and he appears to be [fighting](https://substack.com/redirect/bcce7227-0d74-419b-9fdc-546c8c3b497c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for his political life. His fellow Labour MPs think his [days are numbered](https://substack.com/redirect/9e22ab26-5308-43d9-9f4c-91388d5b7bad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and it's obvious to everyone he is [battling](https://substack.com/redirect/6309e3b2-93dc-4bf5-809f-3f63e200318f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to keep his job.
Among Starmer's missteps--somewhere between welcoming an antisemite and promoting someone with possibly deep ties to Jeffrey Epstein--was his misguided and counter-productive [trip to China](https://substack.com/redirect/9b55d1c7-8a78-436d-80af-0841bdbb1300?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Like his [Canadian counterpart](https://substack.com/redirect/941bee1a-4365-4812-ad7a-52ad5778785a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) before him, Starmer made a pilgrimage to Beijing, hat in hand, in search of applause from left-wing European elites. Given the situation, it's worth asking how cozying up to China will help the British population. Or was Starmer trying to draw the UK media away from his domestic challenges towards today's overwhelming geopolitical uncertainty?
* * *
## [Don't Diversify...Deepen!](https://substack.com/redirect/87e867e2-806c-483b-b0e5-4a9055d40624?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Jan 11
[](https://substack.com/redirect/87e867e2-806c-483b-b0e5-4a9055d40624?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[The key to navigating today's uncertainty, I've argued, is to form a mosaic from the cross-current of the forces buffeting our world. Leaders need to focus on connecting dots across seemingly disparate domains. Siloed thinking around a single discipline (economics, for instance) is a sure-fire way to misinterpret today's chaos and experts who fail to br...](https://substack.com/redirect/87e867e2-806c-483b-b0e5-4a9055d40624?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/87e867e2-806c-483b-b0e5-4a9055d40624?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Starmer came back from Beijing with very little to show (_The Guardian_ 's top takeaway from the trip was "[Visa-free travel to China" for Brits](https://substack.com/redirect/9edba2cc-ced7-4678-80f5-51ebb81be296?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) and critics note he basically returned [empty-handed](https://substack.com/redirect/f8fdcedd-51a4-403b-a1ec-5b4571e9da6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). In return, the Chinese received the green light to build a ["super-embassy"](https://substack.com/redirect/5901552d-b647-4909-8729-cac8640e948c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the UK, making it the largest diplomatic premises in Europe--and probably the largest future spy station as well. **There was a time when Britain 's greatness was measured by its presence in other countries; now, in the [bizarro world](https://substack.com/redirect/9696a4dc-75d3-47fe-88d9-f238c62c5fc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of London's leadership, Britain finds prestige when other countries have a large presence in the UK.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..AtGokrxQx8WZMIdE0EE8RtSpIpxkM3_33q71_4B-32c?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=187291056)
Unlike the era in which history's great European masters of statecraft navigated Cold War uncertainties with a moral compass, today's leaders have a distorted sense of good and evil. They struggle to see black and white and only see shades of grey. They're trying desperately to be relevant and friendly with all parties.
There was a time when countries sought relevancy by being on the right side of History, aligning with the Free World, and championing liberty. Now they somehow imagine that not choosing a side or being "neutral" (whatever that means), as if there was a moral equivalency between the U.S. and China, can somehow stave off their ongoing decline.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b4cc3926-30da-4b36-a74d-f25598aa1d26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
But the world is rapidly bifurcating into two separate political and economic ecosystems, one American and one Chinese; one free and one totalitarian. Without sufficient critical mass, "middle" countries must succumb to the gravitational pull of one or the other. The United Kingdom is a moon, and all it can do is choose which planet to orbit. Given the importance of technological innovation and military might, a collection of sub-scale economies and militaries cast serious doubt on Carney's claims that middle countries can band together and function as a third center of gravity. As uncomfortable as it is to do so, countries must pick a side.
* * *
## [The Global Split Accelerates ](https://substack.com/redirect/61881c19-39a6-4256-a8c1-258efda41115?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| April 26, 2025
[](https://substack.com/redirect/61881c19-39a6-4256-a8c1-258efda41115?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[I have long been thought the world is in the process of bifurcating into two economic ecosystems, one led by America and the other by China. As is now obvious to the world, the split is accelerating as China's global ambition runs headlong into President Trump's 21](https://substack.com/redirect/61881c19-39a6-4256-a8c1-258efda41115?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/61881c19-39a6-4256-a8c1-258efda41115?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
It must be tough, I imagine, to reside at 10 Downing with the ghosts of Disraeli and Churchill, soaking in the imperial splendor of a bygone era. The relative impotency must be difficult to accept. But moving away from the United States will only speed the United Kingdom towards irrelevance. As [Paul Kingsnorth](https://open.substack.com/users/15572817-paul-kingsnorth?utm_source=mentions) noted in _[Against the Machine](https://substack.com/redirect/c3094849-c4cf-4baf-a4b9-2416314efa4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , there was a time when the British Empire effectively ran the world; today, Britain can barely run itself.
The people of the United Kingdom deserve a leader that puts Britain first, someone who understands that London must choose between Washington and Beijing, and ultimately one who has the moral clarity to lead in a time of rampant uncertainty.

**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/44848338-8f0d-4b02-9b28-38aa20e68173?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/e57f2313-1ce9-419b-8820-2152cfd45c47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/009d24ce-2772-4e69-af19-949b89e68c4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: 2 thoughts for you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter, Don Jr. here.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Four corporations control 70% of the grocery market
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Last week, I held a field hearing in Seattle on skyrocketing food prices. Here's what we found, and what we can do about it.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260208-5897-footer&t=1&akid=5897%2E420207%2EvFDGKn)
Peter,
It’s no secret that grocery prices have been skyrocketing. That’s why last week, as co-chair of the Monopoly Busters Caucus, I hosted a hearing in Seattle to get to the root of why our food is becoming so _expensive_.
**What we found is enraging: For decades, four large corporations have been swallowing up smaller competitors.**
From the farms where the food is sourced, to the factory where it is manufactured, and the grocery store where it is sold, those four corporations now control nearly 70% of the grocery market — and they can now raise prices and reduce food choice without consequences.
**It's time that we address this issue head-on.[If you're ready to fight back against corporate monopolies driving up prices, will you pitch in $3 today to power my work in Congress?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260208.7e8Bvh&refcode=em20260208-5897&amount=3&t=2&akid=5897%2E420207%2EvFDGKn)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260208.7e8Bvh&amount=3&refcode=em20260208-5897&t=3&akid=5897%2E420207%2EvFDGKn)**
At our hearing, we heard from independent cattle producers, Fred Meyer workers, small food business owners, and antitrust lawyers.
**Their message was clear: Monopolies have hollowed out rural communities, pushed family farms to the brink, and forced independent grocers out of business.**
_"If we care about entrepreneurship, local jobs, food affordability, and consumer choice, then we must care about who is actually able to participate in the market. I urge you to stand with small businesses like mine and help ensure that the American Dream is not something we talk about in the past tense, but something future founders can still realistically pursue."_
Cynthia Duran, Founder of Xinca Foods
While Trump and Republicans are sitting back as prices skyrocket, we are standing up and working toward solutions to lower costs for American families.
That's why 34 Democrats have joined the Monopoly Busters Caucus so far, standing ready to keep fighting for antitrust enforcement across the country.
**We have defined the problem. Now, we just need the will to act.[Can I count on you to donate $3 to help me keep up the fight against corporate greed?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260208.7e8Bvh&refcode=em20260208-5897&amount=3&t=4&akid=5897%2E420207%2EvFDGKn)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260208.7e8Bvh&amount=3&refcode=em20260208-5897&t=23&akid=5897%2E420207%2EvFDGKn)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20260208-5897-footer&t=24&refcode2=5897_420207_vFDGKn&akid=5897%2E420207%2EvFDGKn)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

What we found is enraging: For decades, four large corporations have been swallowing up smaller competitors. From the farms where the food is sourced, to the factory where it is manufactured, and the grocery store where it is sold, those four corporations now control nearly 70% of the grocery market — and they can now raise prices and reduce food choice without consequences. It's time that we address this issue head-on. At our hearing, we heard from independent cattle producers, Fred Meyer workers, small food business owners, and antitrust lawyers. Their message was clear: Monopolies have hollowed out rural communities, pushed family farms to the brink, and forced independent grocers out of business. "If we care about entrepreneurship, local jobs, food affordability, and consumer choice, then we must care about who is actually able to participate in the market. I urge you to stand with small businesses like mine and help ensure that the American Dream is not something we talk about in the past tense, but something future founders can still realistically pursue." body:

## _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e0903402-d46f-4b0b-bb96-05269d82610d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By Wendy M. Yurgo**
For years, the United States condemned religious persecution abroad and then moved on. Statements were issued. Reports were filed. Nothing changed.
That pattern just broke.
In December 2025, the U.S. State Department announced visa restrictions targeting individuals involved in egregious violations of religious freedom, beginning with those tied to anti-Christian violence in Nigeria. The message was simple and long overdue: participation in religious persecution now carries personal consequences.
This is not symbolic. It is leverage.
* * *
### **Help us replace the mainstream media by becoming a PolitiBrawl Member:**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..y2YuRQQfhHgkqLbl7-lupaXPH57fPGtGJdDHWqZlSvM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=186884401)
* * *
## **Why this matters**
Visa access to the United States is currency. For political elites, militia leaders, financiers, and their families, the ability to travel, bank, study, and move freely through Western systems is not a luxury it is status, legitimacy, and power. And it's now revoked.
For years, persecutors understood something the international community refused to admit: condemnations don't cost anything. Consequences do.
By moving from rhetoric to enforcement, the United States has finally made religious persecution expensive.
## **From concern to enforcement**
The visa restriction policy, announced and enforced by Secretary of State **Marco Rubio** , allows the United States to deny entry to foreign nationals who direct, enable, or participate in violations of religious freedom. It applies to both state and non-state actors, a critical distinction in regions where violence is often outsourced to militias or "unofficial" groups.
This policy did not emerge in a vacuum. In November 2025, the United States formally designated Nigeria a "Country of Particular Concern" for religious-freedom violations, a move that drew immediate backlash from Nigerian officials but underscored the severity of the crisis. In early February 2026, U.S. officials also reported additional security cooperation with Nigerian authorities following continued extremist violence.
These steps form a coherent posture: identify the problem, name it, and attach consequences.

We're taking this opportunity to reveal _**everything**_ in the first in the first 5 minutes of **[this video](https://substack.com/redirect/971c291f-75a1-487a-bef7-08da2dca8da1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
**[Watch it here now](https://substack.com/redirect/971c291f-75a1-487a-bef7-08da2dca8da1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while it's still available online.
[Watch Now](https://substack.com/redirect/971c291f-75a1-487a-bef7-08da2dca8da1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. The **[deep state secret](https://substack.com/redirect/971c291f-75a1-487a-bef7-08da2dca8da1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** revealed in this video is explosive and may bring down a lot of very powerful people. But it could also save your life. Learn the truth **[here now](https://substack.com/redirect/971c291f-75a1-487a-bef7-08da2dca8da1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while you still can.
* * *
_**(Piece continues)**_
## **Why enforcement matters**
This isn't about personality or praise. It's about execution.
Policy only matters when someone is willing to enforce it and enforcement is rarely comfortable. Visa bans invite diplomatic friction. They provoke accusations of interference. They make polite conversations awkward.
That's the point.
The State Department didn't just restate American values. It used one of the few tools that reliably alters behavior. No press release ever changed a persecutor's calculus. Denied access does.
## **The quiet failure of the past**
For too long, the international response to religious persecution followed a predictable script: outrage, reports, silence. Persecutors learned that even mass violence rarely triggered penalties that affected them personally.
The result was not deterrence, but normalization.
This policy breaks from that failure. It recognizes a hard truth: enforcement is the only language abusers consistently understand.
## **The cost of seriousness**
There will be pushback. There always is when consequences replace comfort. Governments accused of tolerating persecution will protest. Critics will argue that visa bans are insufficient or politically motivated.
But seriousness is never free.
You don't end religious persecution with statements. You end it by making it costly to continue.
For the first time in years, the United States has drawn a clear line. Not with words but with enforcement.

name: Team Emerge
subject: Holding ICE Accountable: How Emerge Alums Are Taking Action Nationwide
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVEMR/1/81321/images/emergeemailheader.jpeg]
Across the country, Emerge alums are stepping up to hold ICE accountable — and they’re doing it from positions of power.
In Congress, Emerge alums Rep. Maxine Dexter (OR) and Rep. Yassamin Ansari (AZ) are pushing for accountability at the highest levels following violent ICE operations in their communities. In cities and states nationwide. Emerge alums are speaking out against what they see as unchecked federal overreach and the harm it is causing families.
And they aren’t stopping at statements.
In Maine, Secretary of State Shenna Bellows took action to prevent state resources from being used in ways that could enable unlawful law enforcement activity. In New Jersey, State Senator Britnee Timberlake is advancing legislation to strengthen trust between law enforcement and immigrant communities — drawing a clear line between local public safety and federal immigration raids.
This is what Emerge leadership looks like: bold, prepared women who use their offices at every level to protect communities, defend civil rights, and demand accountability.
But none of this happens by accident. It happens because Emerge recruits, trains, and supports Democratic women who are ready to lead in moments exactly like this.
If you believe we need more leaders willing to stand up to abuse of power and fight for families, chip in today to help us train the next wave of Emerge women.
Your support builds the bench. Your support puts courage into office. Your support makes this leadership possible.
Chip in now to power more women like Maxine, Yassamin, Shenna, and Britnee →

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: The quietest thing Charlie ever did was the most powerful
body:
Peter, Charlie’s final book is available with a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA.
| | | [ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=7784d8afe3d64a5d894c2ee73a8a695b&_e=Wg675J-kXVBddk89H_xTctxBzcG5E2dkNtm3AmD6rtynjmkkbpekoDPU28pWL16hQ0jjXZPllHkMFyCoW32hB1vCFDUd04i6NAqicOj-KgpyBodwiQ6RkO6IV9NuqfjeJ2wKJtcXAY3fYgq1N2z8PhHF2_R9KQ14g32Zmi6MHYjdk6YwMF4GSMA0DWbpVxa_99a50mxksLuliXnDWvQoyQ9UVU_yaMDiHF6ZKo5w-XJ8gXj-9bocO8071YkLeCqY-_jexyqkpNGsuwD3BHaZ5xJHbZGmtDMpepbwLqgrybDt69r-vuR7GWPZqKdB77cAFq8qVH6_rJGGsMHT-qjWLK98eu0sTfTQbM0rEf_qUZUh0Oh5mQKKaUFb25cl3gfotnoK6F_OFbIfhrdyuqYwAQx5YV4OQnRvL9XqcBbCksxtlQoDD0G35qcDmz_iVyYlvqXSVgm743KyW7R2cAeomFP9Z6m_17b24gDY2HK7ViZCm5FNn0H63yvRNxJA38Y5dEJ85F5BtjHAU68We3r3K6Q0w7BwLiG7aaE1TgGtm_k9lFgXLGBxmxtm74nNuzWu5Pt4RC6BoCvIUrviHvV_c_LGDs-wFEDgXoOU3hVo6UKYciPjUIYlYhK0izc6t3ijjLGlDykgDDELfV-b6Sq85bndnK_VFd3jgVCV45fEe8V5IzXOPTfnuJ4L6Z8FEFBN)
---
| | Peter,
---
| | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...
---
[ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=7784d8afe3d64a5d894c2ee73a8a695b&_e=Wg675J-kXVBddk89H_xTctxBzcG5E2dkNtm3AmD6rtynjmkkbpekoDPU28pWL16hQ0jjXZPllHkMFyCoW32hB1vCFDUd04i6NAqicOj-KgpyBodwiQ6RkO6IV9NuqfjeJ2wKJtcXAY3fYgq1N2z8PhHF2_R9KQ14g32Zmi6MHYjdk6YwMF4GSMA0DWbpVxa_99a50mxksLuliXnDWvQoyQ9UVU_yaMDiHF6ZKo5w-XJd_eqzNJZMgKR5N9s27hyL7OkTIWm201Yd7p1rpsOC7L7iSNf0Sln0VhCOm2KgO7-x4ICwsC39lvfyRxgMNzUuBMAhPsm_M4RFU_WcpT2tYcV6pldJyWUPhOni0w3z2iSS8wni6iwVEWuH-W1nBWrlL6ubNRgY-3AATL2wNKHUn6MdOakN_082BbyoFtTHuOBMJhI5N6h9swHw_rh295X1TI_jzv5aX11VxPaXMVeCnTb6Ym2oHFmFbd05w-v6BH0uK1DlhgovDZZWw-3TFsCWX6Tgmz5FN13rMgJ5lpkIjvK0iL3xdQnStYSxsrtC5xgBaGlEavRgjKQxSli_ws2IkdCgsZZDS8EoZvINcrLh5LO2521EPxH6UQ7iZEcM7I9FvQ4hEcDFeYPDBNdtjMnAVRoAi_-V8JHf-x2P4ekVbpkwY4DRmQ54_cvlwzZ0jM_Qsxv-IWlTSH6dGl6hYK1i)
---
This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust.

A book not about politics... but about peace.

**It 's called: _Stop, in the Name of God._**

**[ And right now, when you make a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA, we’ll send you a copy — as our thank-you for carrying Charlie’s mission forward. ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=7784d8afe3d64a5d894c2ee73a8a695b&_e=Wg675J-kXVBddk89H_xTctxBzcG5E2dkNtm3AmD6rtynjmkkbpekoDPU28pWL16hQ0jjXZPllHkMFyCoW32hB1vCFDUd04i6NAqicOj-KgpyBodwiQ6RkO6IV9NuqfjeJ2wKJtcXAY3fYgq1N2z8PhHF2_R9KQ14g32Zmi6MHYjdk6YwMF4GSMA0DWbpVxa_99a50mxksLuliXnDWvQoyQ9UVU_yaMDiHF6ZKo5w-XIpj69YmzK_FgqBgwyCqI98g8q6cgfuLybAxk1f3ST5WO6x-AyR7xvkSQIdiVw4nokWQXDnH7Xh-W1Y4L8UmHWpbmpmGcnhfWnx3V5MqzjhM1Brn-cRuYhf11N3_PCYiF-rE9mipNzsQzkMHr4kpv3rSfWi5wGJyu4rEbOPKpvLD9vPb3qI23hp5BfXJaKs-P-ztRucS7C4j8YYJ0-iZu3e4KvUAoDYmkZASngcJMZmvqcE-3FjDtFx89JwD5HPQvL1Op00sI4bUEvF91KIz4O0TXN-gfPHZyailsQrY_AiynCIM3yCWFr9krwotVg-dUWJCM4i45EIwED-3ROGHIvMCjGICzvX0RxRIAsrhRFNMQKKnMKWrWxXLDLMABf9CxQPot_H_l_1pQQOQ5fAa3jwrVXSYhcrygsTypt0dtMnXLUU3_u3Sitn4tWI2iqCoAZt2GqlpVMGKGC6ETc9MIYq) **

---
Peter, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book.

It's not a culture war manifesto.

It's a call to stop.

To rest. To breathe. To return to God.

**Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. **

Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away.

Trust that God is in control.

Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship.

**In _Stop, in the Name of God,_ you'll discover: **

🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout

🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer

🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again.

That's the heartbeat of his final message.

**[ To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today. ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=7784d8afe3d64a5d894c2ee73a8a695b&_e=Wg675J-kXVBddk89H_xTctxBzcG5E2dkNtm3AmD6rtynjmkkbpekoDPU28pWL16hQ0jjXZPllHkMFyCoW32hB1vCFDUd04i6NAqicOj-KgpyBodwiQ6RkO6IV9NuqfjeJ2wKJtcXAY3fYgq1N2z8PhHF2_R9KQ14g32Zmi6MHYjdk6YwMF4GSMA0DWbpVxa_99a50mxksLuliXnDWvQoyQ9UVU_yaMDiHF6ZKo5w-XI252_4_mWYFVhAHNW95enfpvBSfBW0le5gySqcvtuy6iMa0KkUSxOLCQ6-__-3kPObu7-gw7G4OViA5IkbbVJ9DqzVqbX1dpStbSJXEs_8dUILBmmSq4tlYjCsiuSqYJ-613H80RaQan2NBchpAG666FE5aZyW2rgNfxQ1PEkWuAIY09Zy3t9WhX6MzZcSoTq_3TmHn5g9QiQPop6JXs94dsROMtKAn7Ayd33Lc_i7za02RovNNZ-ZadqvTILlqJGnQ6qAyh3jEz4cXSt4nmtPus3Ft5nA7oRW9BfROaHocg0qTQriyWqfV18na2QtcHrSuSQqAtaKcf-QfArxEkqnQ9Kq1idBWAkDvHDM7COXOMjCyejZzErXztqp8buM9ZuIyJrYuMAJqQgpmB5qSYEGhIi4ZpZ90dOioTTIjiCF2Mr0SBQsw958dmyfg1BKHKKm280NV6CcDCi97wl8mqaR) **

---
Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth.

He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth...

For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal.

Peter, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage.

These are the very things Charlie gave his life for.

May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God...

A stronger love for your family...

And a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
**For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA

clean_body: Peter, Charlie’s final book is available with a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA. | | | | | Peter, | | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud. He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus. He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness. And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible. I saw it up close -- Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything. He started observing the Sabbath. Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance. But as an act of obedience. As a way of saying, " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped. He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield. No email. No media. No work. He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children. It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much. But over time, it changed him. And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned... This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust. A book not about politics... but about peace. It 's called: Stop, in the Name of God. Peter, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book. It's not a culture war manifesto. It's a call to stop. To rest. To breathe. To return to God. Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away. Trust that God is in control. Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship. In Stop, in the Name of God, you'll discover: 🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout 🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again. That's the heartbeat of his final message. Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth. He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth... For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal. Peter, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage. These are the very things Charlie gave his life for. May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God... A stronger love for your family... And a renewed peace in your own soul. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S.Stop, in the Name of God is Charlie Kirk's final message -- written in obedience, shaped by Scripture, and grounded in trust in the Lord. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Robert Garcia
subject: The cover-up can’t continue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124991354/600342591/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGQyZTM2ZC0yOTA1LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a4Fjt5exbSZYXqlol3ujGnzPMVMT1BFObCqg6A403xA=)
Right now, I’m doing everything I can with one hand tied behind my back.
I’m the top Democrat on House Oversight. I’ve already subpoenaed the DOJ. I’ve already forced the release of Epstein documents that Trump wanted buried forever. And this investigation is only just getting started.
**But here’s the truth: As long as Republicans hold the majority, the cover-up will continue.**
I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: this is the most corrupt president and administration in American history. And corruption like this only survives in the dark.
That’s why it’s critical for Democrats to win back the majority this November. If we win, I become chair of the Oversight Committee — and that means real subpoena power and no more excuses for the Trump DOJ.
**[So please: I’m asking you to step up right now and help us take back the House so I can finish this work. Chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can. But don’t sit this one out. Let’s flip the House and hold Trump accountable.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124991356/600342595/-309737922?refcode=260208_RG_cover-up-fr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGQyZTM2ZC0yOTA1LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a4Fjt5exbSZYXqlol3ujGnzPMVMT1BFObCqg6A403xA=)**

Thank you,
Robert Garcia

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie's final book wasn't about politics...
body:
[Mark as Spam](https://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?xul=4cscvssgesax5z7odbg0fo8cp9ompwx4fnell1p458v2m32ujra9z5xfw8b43v9nyf9jm80bk3wxids48m4u6b9lkhavdgu6f2ethfqrq7kxnt6&__stmp=ta5p6g&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) | [Unsubscribe](https://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?xul=4cscvssgesax5z7odbg0fo8cp9ompwx4fnell1p458v2m32ujra9z5xfw8b43v9nyf9jm80bk3wxids48m4u6b9lkhavdgu6f2ethfqrq7kxnt6&__stmp=ta5p6g&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
* * *
Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
| | | [](https://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5p6g&__onlt=h)
---
| | Friend,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn’t a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal — the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God’s grace.**

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**“God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold.”**_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](https://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5p6g&__onlt=h)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie’s voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie’s hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](https://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5p6g&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5p6g&__onlt=h)
---
In the months since Charlie’s assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA’s message among young Americans...

...and it’s not just the conservative message as a whole — _**it’s the message of FAITH!**_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie’s call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it’s happening._

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we’re witnessing is not just growth —**it’s revival.**

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America’s faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up.**

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _“We’re not backing down.”_

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie’s most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie’s faith._**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

**[To claim your copy of Charlie’s final book, simply make a gift, in any amount, to support Turning Point USA today.](https://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5p6g&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5p6g&__onlt=h)
---
I’ll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible.

Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie’s mission and supporting his legacy.
---
**For Charlie,**

**Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5p6g&__onlt=h)
---
**[Support Turning Point USA](https://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5p6g&__onlt=h)**
---
**P.S.** When you read **_Stop, in the Name of God,_** you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead.

**[I hope you’ll claim your copy by making your most generous gift to Turning Point USA. Your support fuels our work to build the most faithful generation of Americans in history. Thank you, and God bless!](https://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5p6g&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5p6g&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
[Privacy Policy](https://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?xtl=7lpnk4o31s077qfwoas1m0tevqf6t6mzxyq9gd8rz6nzp47tkz0lm6iuxpeeytndzzgpdv121wu89s4a9ed7snk00mow17a6ao1y4rice266xf7docl5vpde0pem7ps4md46qel1vv6ztl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5p6g&__onlt=h)| [Contact Us](https://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?xtl=qwikjql1ljtcld8k6clh00k00j1tspilwtu1de1vl16fpx6zetq4hnpl8qor2bndgs6sq9iejf7baq40f7em97r20fcv5rlnjl9u88ekplm6rm1fco0efdh389iyib2wj93&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ta5p6g&__onlt=h)| [Unsubscribe](https://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?xul=4cscvssgesax5z7odbg0fo8cp9ompwx4fnell1p458v2m32ujra9z5xfw8b43v9nyf9jm80bk3wxids48m4u6b9lkhavdgu6f2ethfqrq7kxnt6&__stmp=ta5p6g&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, “We’re not backing down.” This is what Charlie prayed for. I see this book as one of Charlie’s most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too. None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, so will the legacy of Charlie’s faith. Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God. I’ll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible. Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie’s mission and supporting his legacy. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. When you read Stop, in the Name of God, you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 | | FINANCIAL CONNECTION STATEMENT: Assume the sender of this email has a material or affiliate relationship with the businesses or individuals referenced and may receive compensation for purchases made on subsequent websites. name: Team Heinrich
subject: Martin wants to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124991616/600343235/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20260208_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODlkODg1ZS0yYTA1LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDu304KxVWaa8wS2ftJpjmQ3jn9j8zMMRrQM88W_j0Y=&emci=159d885e-2a05-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=189d885e-2a05-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=252045)
---
Friend, Martin has been fighting hard to lower costs and help New Mexicans put food on the table, focusing on the economic issues and Trump administration policies that are hitting folks the hardest. Instead of lowering costs on day one — _as Trump promised he would do_ — he made it worse. Whether it’s housing, health care, or transportation, the one thing Trump delivered for New Mexico families in 2025 was higher prices. It’s hitting families hard — to the tune of $1,355 in inflation costs in 2025. That includes over $162 more in housing costs and over $217 more on transportation costs. Martin has been focused on affordability in all areas. He recently led a roundtable with his Senate colleagues to talk about how the Trump administration’s energy policies have raised utility costs on working families. He has demanded answers from U.S. Department of Education Secretary Linda McMahon on the administration’s proposal to eliminate student loan repayment options for millions of Americans. He’s led efforts against Trump’s tariffs, which are hurting American consumers and small business owners, and in the fight for affordable health care. **And today he wants to know what economic issues are top of mind for you. ** [**Please take a few minutes to let Martin know how the affordability crisis is impacting your family. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124991617/600343236/-65735093?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20260208_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODlkODg1ZS0yYTA1LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDu304KxVWaa8wS2ftJpjmQ3jn9j8zMMRrQM88W_j0Y=&emci=159d885e-2a05-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=189d885e-2a05-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=252045) | [COMPLETE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124991618/600343237/-65735093?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20260208_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODlkODg1ZS0yYTA1LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDu304KxVWaa8wS2ftJpjmQ3jn9j8zMMRrQM88W_j0Y=&emci=159d885e-2a05-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=189d885e-2a05-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=252045)

subject: Dems break precedent: Unleash “nuclear option”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Colorado Draws the Line
body:
For decades, we’ve been playing too nice with MAGA.
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D5OSTPvEfr64yyxA51cthH89tiAdn5ZOuIk9BqZX9oCwwx0A5CRasINCW_dYHyrur7GIx-mbi720dTOAkd3JAthYm52ppwUyZUcKHhi-v1n-e5A0KMbjqtLquPD20VOnI3o4VM-u-BUWVgONxkCAVGZm4CXDkvNigQ2HrQnic1lNYSsFSI97up-HESV3GFPcHhikXop2U846xOLugykatQ==&c=z04uL2DcnRwQmAzJLfDpOSjjgAbiLQzrYdndlDTfBiFwfa8OoMSszA==&ch=7gFnnnJXXwTLja926H9d4klbH2LNdyc9MIZj6fISFHpJ3CeapAH9yg==)
---
Peter,
For decades, Democrats have played by the rules while Republicans ruthlessly gerrymandered their way to power.
We took the high road. We preached about norms and precedent. We talked about "when they go low, we go high."
And where did that get us?
A rigged system where Republicans can lose the popular vote by millions and still control Congress. A democracy where the will of the people is crushed under the weight of partisan maps drawn in backrooms by MAGA operatives.
Well, that era just ended.
Democrats across the country are done being punching bags! California unleashed Proposition 50. New York, Virginia, and Maryland are redrawing their maps.
The "nuclear option" has been deployed and there's no going back.
But here's the brutal reality: Democrats cannot unilaterally surrender while Republicans are rigging the game in Texas, North Carolina, Missouri, Florida, and Indiana.
If we don't use every single card in the book while MAGA ramps up their attacks, we guarantee that Democrats will never retake the House. Not in 2026. Not in 2028. Not for a generation.
Trump would have unchecked power to invade countries, dismantle the Federal Reserve, prosecute his enemies, and turn America into an authoritarian nightmare--and there wouldn't be a damn thing we could do to stop him.
That's not an option.
Coloradans are committed to fighting back tooth and nail, because the time for rolling over in the Trump-era is DONE.
This is why Colorado Draws the Line is spearheading the ballot initiative that will erase 3 to 4 GOP seats off the Colorado map and stop Trump's election rigging scheme dead in its tracks. We're not apologizing for it. We're not ashamed of it. And we're sure as hell not backing down.
MAGA wants a fight? They've got one.
[Will you rush $50, $30, $15, or whatever you can spare to help Colorado join the Democratic counteroffensive and fight fire with fire? We either fight back NOW or we surrender our democracy forever.](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D5OSTPvEfr64yyxA51cthH89tiAdn5ZOuIk9BqZX9oCwwx0A5CRasINCW_dYHyruTk5PohJGiX4Wpud9L20Sn69-zXs-xDClIrMiZMY8gu5Y4-Xen-RLLu-474mLsAa0N7svEPOpuqrJgnca5s9jKi-jD-GAV6D24jFPya8_QUUcwBT_dKA6Re7grKsRHn7BrYvLyWYhpAIzGClbJulSEivi9AEMLLRUYvdP6dwKsWE=&c=z04uL2DcnRwQmAzJLfDpOSjjgAbiLQzrYdndlDTfBiFwfa8OoMSszA==&ch=7gFnnnJXXwTLja926H9d4klbH2LNdyc9MIZj6fISFHpJ3CeapAH9yg==)

clean_body: For decades, we’ve been playing too nice with MAGA. | | | | | == Peter, For decades, Democrats have played by the rules while Republicans ruthlessly gerrymandered their way to power. We took the high road. We preached about norms and precedent. We talked about "when they go low, we go high." And where did that get us? A rigged system where Republicans can lose the popular vote by millions and still control Congress. A democracy where the will of the people is crushed under the weight of partisan maps drawn in backrooms by MAGA operatives. Well, that era just ended. Democrats across the country are done being punching bags! California unleashed Proposition 50. New York, Virginia, and Maryland are redrawing their maps. The "nuclear option" has been deployed and there's no going back. But here's the brutal reality: Democrats cannot unilaterally surrender while Republicans are rigging the game in Texas, North Carolina, Missouri, Florida, and Indiana. If we don't use every single card in the book while MAGA ramps up their attacks, we guarantee that Democrats will never retake the House. Not in 2026. Not in 2028. Not for a generation. Trump would have unchecked power to invade countries, dismantle the Federal Reserve, prosecute his enemies, and turn America into an authoritarian nightmare--and there wouldn't be a damn thing we could do to stop him. That's not an option. Coloradans are committed to fighting back tooth and nail, because the time for rolling over in the Trump-era is DONE. This is why Colorado Draws the Line is spearheading the ballot initiative that will erase 3 to 4 GOP seats off the Colorado map and stop Trump's election rigging scheme dead in its tracks. We're not apologizing for it. We're not ashamed of it. And we're sure as hell not backing down. MAGA wants a fight? They've got one. == If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Look, nobody wanted it to come to this. But Trump and MAGA left us no choice. Let's finish what they started. -- Colorado Draws The Line | | | | == | | == | Donate by mail: Colorado Draws the Line == == | Paid for by Colorado Draws the Line. Registered agent: Rich Pelletier. | | | | | | Colorado Draws the Line | 1601 Arapahoe Street FL 10 | Denver, CO 80202 US |

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
Our average donation of $15.47 shows just how people-powered this movement for Virginia is.
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/131?refcode=em20260208-150&t=1&akid=150%2E12592%2EAeuB-Z)
Hey, in the name of transparency, we want to show you exactly how this campaign is being powered. Here’s a screenshot from our ActBlue account — our online fundraising platform — showing our average donation size: $15.47.
[](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260208_1.P2Z8bZ&amount=15.47&%3Brefcode=20260208-150&t=2&akid=150%2E12592%2EAeuB-Z "Actblue Link to Donate")
_$15.47 is our average donation. That’s it._
[**Are you with us? Can you make a contribution of $15.47 (our average donation) or more today? >>**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260208_1.P2Z8bZ&amount=15.47&refcode=20260208-150&t=3&akid=150%2E12592%2EAeuB-Z)
**[Donate $15.47 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260208_1.P2Z8bZ&amount=15.47&refcode=20260208-150&t=4&akid=150%2E12592%2EAeuB-Z)**
We mean it when we say this campaign is powered by everyday people. Our work to protect fair elections and representation starts with small-dollar donors, not corrupt corporate interests or partisan power brokers like Donald Trump.
That matters — because Republicans are spending big to confuse voters, flood the airwaves with misinformation, and block Virginians from having a real say in our democracy. _Republicans have dark money. We have you._
Virginians for Fair Elections is a people-powered effort, built by neighbors, organizers, and voters who believe our elections should work for everyone, not just those with the deepest pockets.
We are here to give voters clear information, fight disinformation, and win a campaign that puts democracy first.
[**If you can, help us reach our critical grassroots goal by donating $15.47 or whatever you can today. Even $5 helps us keep organizing, educating voters, and pushing this campaign forward when it matters most.**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260208_1.P2Z8bZ&amount=15.47&refcode=20260208-150&t=5&akid=150%2E12592%2EAeuB-Z)

Thank you for being part of this fight for fair and free elections,
Virginians for Fair Elections

body:
There is so much work we need to get done for Kansas and our country, and holding this competitive seat is the only way we can do it.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124991871/600344219/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTg4ODg2Yy0yZDA1LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TSVvdY-_uOp8krjmNyZz16eAKkPYMJMp3gtshYooU0I=) Want to know the big secret in American politics? Despite all the competitive rhetoric surrounding the midterms, the vast majority of Congressional seats are... completely safe. There are 435 seats in the House of Representatives. But in any given election year, just a small handful of those districts will actually be competitive. **And Kansas’ 3rd? It’s one of them.** **_[With that in mind, can you chip in right away to help Sharice Davids reach thousands of undecided voters in the months leading up to Election Day, before National Republicans have the chance to define us first?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124991872/600344220/454992728?amounts=5,15,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=15&refcode=email_020826_bigsecret&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTg4ODg2Yy0yZDA1LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TSVvdY-_uOp8krjmNyZz16eAKkPYMJMp3gtshYooU0I=)_** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124991873/600344221/454992728?amounts=5,15,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=15&refcode=email_020826_bigsecret&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTg4ODg2Yy0yZDA1LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TSVvdY-_uOp8krjmNyZz16eAKkPYMJMp3gtshYooU0I=)

Look, we know you probably hear from a lot of Democrats across the country — some of whom _also_ represent competitive seats like Sharice. So if you’re on the fence about whether to pitch in, we wanted to share a few more reasons why your support goes a long way here in KS-03:
1. **Sharice is a barrier-breaker.** She’s the first LGBTQ+ Native American woman ever elected to Congress — but if we want to keep her there, we need to make sure the National GOP’s smears and attacks don’t stick.

2. **We can count on Sharice to solve problems, not just talk about them.** A lot of politicians just want to go viral on social media. Sharice? She cares about results. That’s how she’s created thousands of good-paying jobs across KS-03.

3. **Sharice is the _only_ Democrat representing Kansas in Washington.** But if National Republicans take her down? Kansas Democrats would lose their only ally in Congress.

**_[If any of these reasons speak to you, we know Sharice would be so grateful to have your support before her next fundraising deadline. There is so much work we need to get done for Kansas and our country, and holding this competitive seat is the only way we can do it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124991874/600344222/454992728?amounts=5,15,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=15&refcode=email_020826_bigsecret&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTg4ODg2Yy0yZDA1LWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TSVvdY-_uOp8krjmNyZz16eAKkPYMJMp3gtshYooU0I=)_**

subject: A campaign of many firsts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?refcode=em_header [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?refcode=em_header]

Team,

This campaign is all about firsts.

I am a first -generation Cuban-American, and I’m running to be the first Latina to represent Arizona’s First Congressional District. MAGA doesn't like the sound of that. They don't like trailblazers who don’t back down from a fight.

That's why Trump has already expressed support for two potential opponents in this district and will continue to try to bully his way into this district and our election. He may have carried it in 2024, but we know he's terrified of losing a rubber stamp for his MAGA agenda.

That’s why we need you with us, friend. Can you chip in to my campaign to help us flip AZ-01 and take back the House? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?refcode=260208_mw_first]

Give $25 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=260208_mw_first] Give $50 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=260208_mw_first]
Give $100 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=260208_mw_first] Give $250 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=260208_mw_first]
Give $500 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?express_lane=true&amount=500&refcode=260208_mw_first] Give other >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?amp;refcode=260208_mw_first]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately

We’ve got a lot more firsts ahead of us, and if this is your first time donating, welcome to the team ❤️

— Marlene
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/106088/images/Marlene.png]

About Marlene Galan-Woods
Marlene Galán-Woods is a former broadcast journalist and mother of five who has lived in Arizona for the past 36 years. Her parents fled communist Cuba looking for a better life. Their risk paid off and allowed Marlene to pursue her career as a broadcast journalist which brought her to Arizona. She met the love of her life, Grant Woods, and they raised a family together before he passed away in 2021. Marlene is running for Congress to stand up to extremists and be a voice for all Arizonans. If elected, Marlene will be the first Latina to represent Arizona's 1st district in Congress.

name: Mess with Texas
subject: Wipe the smug smiles from Trump and Greg Abbott's faces
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Colorado Draws the Line
body:
We are using the slogan of Texas swagger and pride “Don’t Mess with Texas” as a rallying cry: We’re definitely gonna Mess with Texas.
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BRERItiwCykkBhtmWA4LLOVR-HrqaZRCU6XsHZzNa2aVaFYrmqIvwxp5Y_7d3kNenPvUL8RS2Q58AjKOLaN3h87v5dzI5dyHRBZVRsxW267sMXlBLaQgAAX7lwIUkkA7fj_6jaumKsC9bfbwHEThx1s2NUTPRdwG7xoedb4RkMgDIBYr0jmpCyn2MnuLSluMpNfAtYTEOEs647MCAx04tBlxleYWDOKp&c=7rNxev2hQtVxyzwNC-FbEaWZ07DwEb-D96_Sek5EwtFjqXX0W1IBfw==&ch=AvuBQc3kHaSgK0J8t3afxfhCfZWtbUjdczPnYabXPwDC0k7ejEU41A==)
---
Peter,
Late last year, Donald Trump ordered Texas Gov. Greg Abbott to rig Texas' congressional districts to help Republicans build a firewall that could withstand a potential Democratic blue wave in 2026.
The result was a gerrymander so ambitious that it flipped 5 Democratic seats to the GOP with the stroke of a pen. The conservative Supreme Court eventually approved their work, solidifying MAGA's gains and encouraging further red state redistricting.
Now other red states have followed suit: North Carolina (+1 GOP), Missouri (+1), Ohio (+2), Utah (+1), and Florida (+4 GOP).
The situation is dire, but we don't have to take this lying down. We are fighting back -- and using the slogan of Texas swagger and pride "Don't Mess with Texas" as a rallying cry: We're definitely gonna Mess with Texas.
Colorado Draws the Line is fighting to stop Trump from rigging the 2026 election by leading a statewide ballot initiative to redraw Colorado's congressional districts, wiping away four GOP-held seats in Colorado and turning them blue for years to come.
---
| [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BRERItiwCykkBhtmWA4LLOVR-HrqaZRCU6XsHZzNa2aVaFYrmqIvwxp5Y_7d3kNenPvUL8RS2Q58AjKOLaN3h87v5dzI5dyHRBZVRsxW267sMXlBLaQgAAX7lwIUkkA7fj_6jaumKsC9bfbwHEThx1s2NUTPRdwG7xoedb4RkMgDIBYr0jmpCyn2MnuLSluMpNfAtYTEOEviOGXqSo7lxnFmQR-gCTg7&c=7rNxev2hQtVxyzwNC-FbEaWZ07DwEb-D96_Sek5EwtFjqXX0W1IBfw==&ch=AvuBQc3kHaSgK0J8t3afxfhCfZWtbUjdczPnYabXPwDC0k7ejEU41A==)
---
| We need your help to wipe the stupid, smug smirks off the faces of Trump and Greg Abbott.
---
We need to be honest, though: we're taking a huge risk here that could easily backfire.
This isn't a billionaire-funded initiative. This is true grassroots advocacy: the American People channeling their anger, frustration, and disappointment into action.
Peter, we're asking millions of Americans who refuse to stand idly by and watch our freedoms and democracy be trampled by jackbooted MAGA thugs to join us and fight back.
[Please donate $50, $25, $5 or whatever you can spare right now to Mess with Texas and help ensure blue Colorado counters MAGA's red state redistricting gambit:](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BRERItiwCykkBhtmWA4LLOVR-HrqaZRCU6XsHZzNa2aVaFYrmqIvwxp5Y_7d3kNe9uC-NLpr3-uj2zo7bsFILg4F8khhOMS9auLPD0PrNO8iUZJUvUbt7jbnEUiMdOoSzqeitj88dKfbWFQ58qlgRnlnomnAYPcXxGQhLbvOdCkg_6L7dbrfAEFf07iM1rv9Tjdo-CTOQ-NzHbQmPjPspW42M8miBw30Fz0pMK1tTlM=&c=7rNxev2hQtVxyzwNC-FbEaWZ07DwEb-D96_Sek5EwtFjqXX0W1IBfw==&ch=AvuBQc3kHaSgK0J8t3afxfhCfZWtbUjdczPnYabXPwDC0k7ejEU41A==)

name: John Fetterman
subject: time for the ultrawealthy to pay their fair share
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?refcode=jtk467-su-fl-header&t=1&akid=10561%2E434096%2EYdWS-i)
| | |
---
Hi, Derek,
I don’t think this is controversial: **If you make billions, you shouldn’t pay less in taxes than your secretary.** 🤷
But right now, that’s not how Trump’s tax law works. While people like nurses and firefighters pay taxes straight out of every paycheck, there’s a maze of shady rules and accounting tricks that let the billionaires walk away scot-free while the rest of us pay up.
That’s why I reintroduced the **Billionaires Income Tax Act** , legislation that would close loopholes and ensure billionaires pay their fair share in taxes.
Working Pennsylvanians already face high and rising prices, while billionaires and megacorporations game the system to pay next to nothing in taxes. **This bill is about basic fairness.** ⚖️
**[If you agree it’s time for billionaires to pay their fair share in taxes so we can bring down the debt, keep our promise to seniors on Medicare and Social Security, and cut taxes for working Pennsylvanians, will you add your name now?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52672?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=10561%2E434096%2EYdWS-i)**
| | [Sign the Petition >>](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52672?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=10561%2E434096%2EYdWS-i)
---
Thanks for lending your support,
John ❤️
| |

| | [Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2026?refcode=jtk467-su-fl-footer&t=4&refcode2=10561_434096_YdWS-i&akid=10561%2E434096%2EYdWS-i)

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

That’s why I reintroduced the Billionaires Income Tax Act , legislation that would close loopholes and ensure billionaires pay their fair share in taxes. Working Pennsylvanians already face high and rising prices, while billionaires and megacorporations game the system to pay next to nothing in taxes. This bill is about basic fairness. ⚖️ | | Thanks for lending your support, John ❤️ | | | | | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

### The Latino Agenda Has Spoken. And why Bad Bunny at the Super Bowl is about so much more than halftime.

---

* * *
Something extraordinary just happened in Texas that the national media barely covered.
Last Saturday, in a special election for Texas State Senate District 9, Democrats flipped a seat in Tarrant County--home of Fort Worth, Billy Bob's, and more cowboy boots per capita than anywhere outside of a Brooks & Dunn concert.
Thanks for reading! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..83Lpm0JmsGDdU1eukvUGkGcr6IOPxj9pFn5HEoMTLyY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=187327556)
But here's the kicker: Latino precincts in Tarrant County swung 51 points toward Democrats.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/0edaa66b-bc9b-422a-9d26-e1eab63c6ceb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Let that sink in: **Fifty. One. Points.**
Check out the precinct interactive map made by VoterHub: [https://votehub.com/2026_txsd9_special](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/49c8527d-f0f8-4e30-9670-fa1fa32311a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
On the latest episode of the Latino Vote podcast, Chuck Rocha and Mike Madrid dive deep into what this historic swing means for the future of Latino politics. Madrid, a Republican strategist with nearly four decades of campaign experience, admits he's never seen anything like it.
* * *
### Housing, Health Care, and Hope
Mike drops what might be the most important three words in Latino politics right now: Housing, Healthcare, and Hope.
Not identity politics. Not partisan talking points. Not whatever consultant-tested garbage either party is workshopping in focus groups.
Housing. Healthcare. Hope.
That's the aspirational working-class agenda that's actually moving Latino voters. That's what won in Fort Worth. And that's what both parties are too blind, too partisan, or too captured by their donor class to deliver.
"Start listening to what the community is telling you," Madrid urges.
The Fort Worth results prove what happens when politicians actually speak to people's real needs instead of treating them like demographic pawns in a partisan chess game.
* * *
### Cultural Defiance: Bad Bunny's Moment
Our hosts also explore what Bad Bunny performing at the Super Bowl halftime show really means for Latino representation in America.
This isn't just entertainment, they argue. **This is the biggest cultural moment in America** --the one time everyone from 65-year-old white guys in Memphis to Latino kids in East LA watches the same thing at the same time. And the NFL chose a Puerto Rican artist who performs exclusively in Spanish.
Why? As Mike points out, the NFL knows demographics better than any political consultant in Washington. They know where America is going, even if MAGA Republicans are trying to build a wall to stop it.
"Just being Latino in America right now is an act of defiance," Madrid says. "Just being Bad Bunny, being Latino in America right now is an act of defiance."
Rocha encourages listeners to check out the [New York Times Daily episode about Bad Bunny's career](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/49c8527d-f0f8-4e30-9670-fa1fa32311a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), highlighting how the artist has refused to assimilate, refused to record in English, and refused to become what everyone wanted him to become. Bad Bunny canceled world tours to protect his people and made fans come to Puerto Rico to spend money in the local economy if they wanted to see him perform.
He's been proudly, defiantly American while never compromising his culture or language. And now he's on the biggest stage in American culture.
* * *
# Watching the halftime show with friends and family? Send us your photos!
We want to see how the Latino Vote community celebrated this historic cultural moment.

subject: What you’re seeing in Minnesota is what will happen if Democrats win

body:
What you’re seeing happen in Minnesota right now is a preview of what's to come if Democrats flip the Senate in November. | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e441452e1e8d4b93864622545b148a66&_e=mkDicfH2wIpSf4a3dFwazjLJ22TpXqdZE0ppOrNS3OVKO9SxuKAmpomW1rVkbhoFWX9Rwji4u1h1TREhNbvr_xLLBAFsYW52DwWuleZL-sRhcY_6FuCH5FJR-2uvKz9OUujlS8dl3Oe0GksuANh569GULIs45BiyIMd60XT_rgq42ySJaKf6aHozYDSwmFcuZn1R9MUUuxoP67k2_9yEYamvn2crlFGPkSlI4AGxhZbReo-H07iFDZ56mddAaCHDCRN-ibCYALC4ZK1RJyd4lQ88xYY97Hw_rOL1P3Xom_N1Sa31Te4MUmh0lAtRLIS9APpXrKmnunPCjtIMqCj1T9ULFvKxA2hBxHJ7FrJdlT1Yz-Wj1hHTOaXg7vLmh0JWaVXDy0ssWqGDQhMSUPjFWZG7sX4OhpZ-XyylzwFMNTtwNqM_cfrqEs1VAOAomBo7hAADY2aDIU7hLmnmNHijU3StTfxJCUrIcgpaGVQmiMZXrKMu25Ijqk2O0PLtWIt_E9ciPDMSNMkoh6H8FeEJQBmrBpCNByM3vgmnVQbccoCZLpB3pdtBKTVxPhGbniJXekKdPj6B3S_8p1Y2BA0fJFmtEhPoCdFIS0zokMoyH5lbORdmMYyrwSutYdeHmi5V5_WrZ-8azPgiYFj3GmeKSUjtQwBfJf5Lf472biMaeJewIkZCkDgiOqPaWd5j_oFTHzaqt-wjEyXBeQdxmnT4eIKs4HrfalSRV2BqsD3Uz82RKF1t3k3WwbH9YdS8HwClDkT0pSXtvH1DvGoCLGkDIszMWXddxjnYrxVSZ1aji1c%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

As a Republican political candidate running to represent Minnesota in the U.S. Senate, here is what I can tell you from being here during one of the most tumultuous times in recent memory.

1. Democrats believe that they have a reasonably straightforward path to any higher office that they want, simply because our state hasn’t voted for a Republican candidate on the presidential level since 1976

2. The mayor of Minneapolis and Governor Walz like to openly vilify Republicans, believing their supporters would never toss them to the curb simply because they are playing the role of attack dog. The mayor is probably even more of a left-wing ideologue than the governor.

3. They hate President Trump and everything he stands for - that’s why they are not cooperating with ICE in any way, shape, or form.

Now, the mayor, the governor, and my opponent in this Senate race, Lieutenant Governor Peggy Flanagan, are digging in even further, comparing FEDERAL ICE agents to neighbors flooding the city that don’t share the same values as the original inhabitants.

But what about the millions of illegal immigrants who flooded our country that don’t share ANY of our values?

**Democrats in Minnesota are showing the entire country what exactly will happen if they retake the Senate in November or the White House in 2028.

[**READ MYBIO
**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e441452e1e8d4b93864622545b148a66&_e=mkDicfH2wIpSf4a3dFwazjLJ22TpXqdZE0ppOrNS3OVKO9SxuKAmpomW1rVkbhoFWX9Rwji4u1h1TREhNbvr_xLLBAFsYW52DwWuleZL-sRhcY_6FuCH5FJR-2uvKz9OUujlS8dl3Oe0GksuANh569GULIs45BiyIMd60XT_rgq42ySJaKf6aHozYDSwmFcuZn1R9MUUuxoP67k2_9yEYamvn2crlFGPkSlI4AGxhZbReo-H07iFDZ56mddAaCHDCRN-ibCYALC4ZK1RJyd4lQ88xYY97Hw_rOL1P3Xom_PoO_HBM8LWg-G2v69mrFY_UwnCJZ9Sy3o1DupmQLRSwZmLfrGGsTCPnoJR1ilIFWxtsfxrGfdTnZv2OAS0jG8DjrXFvHcb2Lyz4gApc953bjtHcmwqvZZSIVOWa9LScQzfjxDAMKJLexomB5ZXwfOHtgmuWHm4gZEO0Bi5mLkpBMrPpYsA_besQFssyJnq3AP4VakBwnnXKQtx6jPItpGckPEwOBFdHuXFBa8QHWQl7omGsPcoULCvrxuaNWH5N4i8239mimLfZ3J9T7TQ9T8b5zooFew18llRYN2o_-IHGJCvL5_5L2SX28ZJBBHk-c5E4X96L638tmOjEFJpi0a0Oo1zj9e_2P6-po24CxKqOyZleCSSdHtBHtd01bimkczLD2o79hJZ0GmkkGpFZi3_W3pXpM0j614WmXR0qhOWsA-Z7TBe115ls2aWRJgWdrmQJBGtvnc0JyE_8o2aVb5L02xxLgpD-MVfrAY6b71CYBzqCQ6UfXYhET-TwnsRMAc%3D)
They tolerate flash mobs, violent protests, and they don’t say anything when crazed lunatics storm places of worship, all to prove a point.

But what do you expect from a lieutenant governor who makes a mockery out of herself by cosplaying as a muslim? **

Rather than hand over convicted and suspected criminals to federal authorities, the mayor of Minneapolis and Governor Tim Walz released them into Minnesota communities.

**Somalian immigrants are storming the state capital building.**

_As a former Navy SEAL, I have been trained to rout out corruption, quell violent uprisings, and, most importantly, lead a team with honor._

**[I’m asking you to support my campaign for the United States Senate today because Minnesota needs direction, and Democrats aren't providing any.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e441452e1e8d4b93864622545b148a66&_e=mkDicfH2wIpSf4a3dFwazjLJ22TpXqdZE0ppOrNS3OVKO9SxuKAmpomW1rVkbhoFWX9Rwji4u1h1TREhNbvr_xLLBAFsYW52DwWuleZL-sRhcY_6FuCH5FJR-2uvKz9OUujlS8dl3Oe0GksuANh569GULIs45BiyIMd60XT_rgq42ySJaKf6aHozYDSwmFcuZn1R9MUUuxoP67k2_9yEYamvn2crlFGPkSlI4AGxhZbReo-H07iFDZ56mddAaCHDCRN-ibCYALC4ZK1RJyd4lQ88xYY97Hw_rOL1P3Xom_PFEgODAys6Q-rnnUBUmEzE2Mu9YLN1JjfYowZ0yL3YaphpqPcBwFQImIEvaBzZAfd7MUq8KupyOUnHO-5cUM_VCPjmeK-JH6zzTmxONysvsmJyBlW6ZxidpjeAhwF069pwo1fZLRJubxjwixMwenEI5HA6w461khMYKRuGMwLcQQq0cri9SUQQlQ2bYLmDMXGFJq6mrL_07DVAOAjc9gSuqhNaoM_5UrTOyowClLlUHGzGLR520ZOde2nULDiphP0ZeQICbt9y6JSDL9KElEG05vvy8alewxrr34SvOv5c7dsx9Rco_TD7Td2dTMwUIsHkGbWCkOUAOFoBWamZNVPZ5Qh6eJ1EecJLqTd7oOuvWBWTSm9RBC8qwzFZMRAXR2AS_mXCD15tdI9t45LJnXKsdWRNegHZQaBNCczP49Pz8y52-guNtRJr9iN8IlQmmPUKJSsCUNOKRPrNjTl9Rwn0XEHdSANNjBLK2dfYvJ2C6_ci6E-q1Tz3DGMCsWMCQu0%3D) **

**This is a no-fail mission, and Navy SEALS win races. It’s a proven fact. **

SEALS are entrusted with our nation’s most important, covert missions that have national security implications which impact every single American - and I can tell you that as a candidate for political office, I’m ready for this no-fail mission and my opponents are not.
