clean_body: What you’re seeing happen in Minnesota right now is a preview of what's to come if Democrats flip the Senate in November. | Fellow Conservative, As a Republican political candidate running to represent Minnesota in the U.S. Senate, here is what I can tell you from being here during one of the most tumultuous times in recent memory. 1. Democrats believe that they have a reasonably straightforward path to any higher office that they want, simply because our state hasn’t voted for a Republican candidate on the presidential level since 1976 2. The mayor of Minneapolis and Governor Walz like to openly vilify Republicans, believing their supporters would never toss them to the curb simply because they are playing the role of attack dog. The mayor is probably even more of a left-wing ideologue than the governor. 3. They hate President Trump and everything he stands for - that’s why they are not cooperating with ICE in any way, shape, or form. Now, the mayor, the governor, and my opponent in this Senate race, Lieutenant Governor Peggy Flanagan, are digging in even further, comparing FEDERAL ICE agents to neighbors flooding the city that don’t share the same values as the original inhabitants. But what about the millions of illegal immigrants who flooded our country that don’t share ANY of our values? Democrats in Minnesota are showing the entire country what exactly will happen if they retake the Senate in November or the White House in 2028. They tolerate flash mobs, violent protests, and they don’t say anything when crazed lunatics storm places of worship, all to prove a point. But what do you expect from a lieutenant governor who makes a mockery out of herself by cosplaying as a muslim? Rather than hand over convicted and suspected criminals to federal authorities, the mayor of Minneapolis and Governor Tim Walz released them into Minnesota communities. Somalian immigrants are storming the state capital building. As a former Navy SEAL, I have been trained to rout out corruption, quell violent uprisings, and, most importantly, lead a team with honor. This is a no-fail mission, and Navy SEALS win races. It’s a proven fact. SEALS are entrusted with our nation’s most important, covert missions that have national security implications which impact every single American - and I can tell you that as a candidate for political office, I’m ready for this no-fail mission and my opponents are not. For love of country, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. name: Matt Rains
subject: Montanans didn’t sign up to have Zinke make our lives harder
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Rains for Montana P
body:
I’m running against Ryan Zinke to deliver a better future for Montanans
| Request Fewer Emails by clicking [here](https://rains4mt.org/l/EYOLwOIQgU5h). Click here to [unsubscribe](https://rains4mt.org/l/haFIVGRdQkDC).
---
[ ](https://rains4mt.org/l/UdxayT1MPW5R?t=Ss0aRLZsWOQE)
[](https://rains4mt.org/l/APSasKPU0FpT?t=CE1Z075fvEuL) **A few years ago, I walked into a round pen for a first ride and stepped out with a wrist injury that cost me $17,000 dollars. (_Ouch!_ I know, right?) **

As many of you know, being a rancher isn’t just hard work, it’s dangerous work.

You face unpredictable livestock, brutal weather, heavy machinery, and long days that don’t come with guarantees. That’s what we sign up for.

**What we don’t sign up for is politicians like Ryan Zinke cashing in on our labor while making it harder for Montana ranchers to live, work, and raise a family here.**

With living costs higher than ever, Zinke slapped Montana’s in the face when he voted against extending ACA subsidies last week – thankfully the House passed it without his support.

Growing up, I have vivid memories of our family living in fear of a potential hospital visit. Many times to avoid the absurd costs, my siblings and I would get treated out of the vet bag we had at home.

**It is not how the people who feed and fuel this country should be forced to live.**

The folks stewarding our lands, raising our livestock, and keeping our communities running shouldn’t have to decide between medical care or groceries.

That’s why I’m running for Congress to flip Zinke’s seat, fight for affordable healthcare for all Montanans, and give veterans the care they need and deserve. [**It’s beyond time that we have a leader that will look out for us. If you’re with me, can you pitch in $10 before 11:59pm to help us hit our goal, support my people-powered campaign to take on Zinke, and defend healthcare in Congress? »**](https://rains4mt.org/l/APSasKPU0FpT?t=I2ONdvh0wFAN) | [CHIP IN $10 TO HELP MATT FIGHT FOR AFFORDABLE HEALTHCARE FOR _ALL_ MONTANANS »](https://rains4mt.org/l/nPRd76h0EF8M?t=KOX1joNAa0HN)
---
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://rains4mt.org/l/ol4dVecUCyL5?t=c7H9WqJwcYdS)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://rains4mt.org/l/HPB49ZZX67lB?t=cc9ZVSeI8VFc)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://rains4mt.org/l/rhzJYjRtDQLO?t=kq8Btz5KLWHi)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://rains4mt.org/l/mVvZGPjBrJ05?t=pvM3bPw0gTVI)
[Or a custom donation »](https://rains4mt.org/l/gLCE1DD1vd2F?t=o8WaoYFRTkhS)
With determination,
Matt Rains
| | Paid for by Matt Rains for Montana P.O. Box 1234, Missoula, MT 59806
www.mattrainsformontana.com

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://rains4mt.org/l/XaUJCiyvKccx?t=ggy5JVquG7y8). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact, make a[monthly contribution by clicking here](https://rains4mt.org/l/Y32tiuh70Rsz?t=JTH3iOTFHeTO).**

[Click here](https://rains4mt.org/l/tsdlLPetqKdh) to receive fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://rains4mt.org/l/vDCC76yTD96x). | | [Contribute Once Per Month to Elect Matt Rains »](https://rains4mt.org/l/nS9p0b49UBfI?t=ZKFFQofXz0L1)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://rains4mt.org/l/JdF4tkZ6QEU5?t=86WKYksluBYA)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: We can win this swing state
body:
I’m asking you to join me.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=516%2E124072%2E9sNKnB)
Taking back legislative power in Washington during these midterm elections is how we can quell the federal government’s dangerous actions. By electing Democrats and flipping the U.S. Senate, we can return accountability to our government. We can restore the checks and balances that are designed to protect the _people_ from the _powerful_. **[I’m asking you to join me with a donation today because our campaign is only three days away from our biggest financial deadline yet, after which we have to file a public report with the FEC. Can I count on you to be among the donors to help hit our 10,000-donation goal? Give $5, $50, or whatever works for you.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5377?t=7&akid=516%2E124072%2E9sNKnB)** Peter, you already know that our race here in North Carolina is _the key_ to whether we can take back the Senate for the people. Both parties are counting on this seat to build their majorities. _And it really could go either way._ **This is one of only three Senate contests rated “toss-up” — and North Carolina is one of the last true swing states on the map.** Right-wing Republicans are going to great lengths to defeat me (they’re willing to invest just about any amount of money against us) because they’re terrified that we can flip this seat blue for the first time since 2008. **[But Peter, this is set to be the toughest fight of my career, and I am counting on you to be with me. Please pitch in any amount that fits in your budget to help meet this goal before time runs out.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5377?t=8&akid=516%2E124072%2E9sNKnB)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5378?t=9&akid=516%2E124072%2E9sNKnB)
---
[DONATE $10](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5379?t=10&akid=516%2E124072%2E9sNKnB)
---
[DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5380?t=11&akid=516%2E124072%2E9sNKnB)
---
[DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5381?t=12&akid=516%2E124072%2E9sNKnB)
---
[DONATE $100](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5382?t=13&akid=516%2E124072%2E9sNKnB)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5383?t=14&akid=516%2E124072%2E9sNKnB)
---
Grateful to have you with me,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5377?t=15&akid=516%2E124072%2E9sNKnB)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=516%2E124072%2E9sNKnB)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=516%2E124072%2E9sNKnB)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=516%2E124072%2E9sNKnB)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=516%2E124072%2E9sNKnB)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=516%2E124072%2E9sNKnB)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=516%2E124072%2E9sNKnB)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=16&akid=516%2E124072%2E9sNKnB)

name: Trey Trainor for Congress
subject: Final Push Before Feb 11: TX-21 Needs You
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TREY TRAINOR FOR TEXAS
body:
We're progressing well with endorsements & press – one last push before Feb 11 will make the difference

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us10.campaign-archive.com/?e=4d3fe76c62&u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=39cdbc68dc)
---
[|
---](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=40f23023bd&e=4d3fe76c62)
| | | | | | Peter,

Last Wednesday, I sent my update with real excitement about the momentum we're building—endorsements rolling in from trusted conservative leaders across the Hill Country, positive press coverage amplifying our message, and strong grassroots energy heading into the March 3 Republican Primary.
The response has been encouraging, and we're making solid progress toward our fundraising goal. But with the FEC reporting deadline just **3 days away** (midnight on February 11), we still need one final surge to ensure we have everything in place for these closing weeks.
Every dollar raised before the deadline will be publicly reported and will directly fund:
* The last round of direct mail reaching undecided voters
* Final radio spots to reach every corner of the district
* Critical text-to-voter and GOTV efforts to turn out our supporters
* Completing digital and social media outreach
* Yard signs at polling locations on Election Day

We're close, but we're not done yet. The clock is ticking, and these final pieces are what separate a good campaign from a winning one.
If you've been waiting for the right moment to step up, that moment is now. Your support—whether $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can give—will help us cross the finish line and secure this seat for the values we share: secure borders, election integrity, fiscal responsibility, life, the Second Amendment, and America First.
Donate securely today at: [**trey4tx.com/donate**](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=4178a6eb40&e=4d3fe76c62)
We have just three days left before the FEC cutoff. Let's make them count.
Thank you for believing in this fight and for standing with me. Together, we're going to win TX-21.
With determination and confidence,
**Trey Trainor**[Husband, Father of Six,](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=346707f745&e=4d3fe76c62)Proven Conservative Fighter for TX-21
P.S. As a husband and father of six, I know how precious every dollar is. But I also know our children's future depends on leaders who will fight for secure elections and a strong America. clean_body: We're progressing well with endorsements & press – one last push before Feb 11 will make the difference | | | | | | | | | | | | | Peter, Last Wednesday, I sent my update with real excitement about the momentum we're building—endorsements rolling in from trusted conservative leaders across the Hill Country, positive press coverage amplifying our message, and strong grassroots energy heading into the March 3 Republican Primary. The response has been encouraging, and we're making solid progress toward our fundraising goal. But with the FEC reporting deadline just 3 days away (midnight on February 11), we still need one final surge to ensure we have everything in place for these closing weeks. Every dollar raised before the deadline will be publicly reported and will directly fund: The last round of direct mail reaching undecided voters Final radio spots to reach every corner of the district Critical text-to-voter and GOTV efforts to turn out our supporters Completing digital and social media outreach Yard signs at polling locations on Election Day We're close, but we're not done yet. The clock is ticking, and these final pieces are what separate a good campaign from a winning one. If you've been waiting for the right moment to step up, that moment is now. Your support—whether $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can give—will help us cross the finish line and secure this seat for the values we share: secure borders, election integrity, fiscal responsibility, life, the Second Amendment, and America First. Donate securely today at: We have just three days left before the FEC cutoff. Let's make them count. Thank you for believing in this fight and for standing with me. Together, we're going to win TX-21. With determination and confidence, Trey Trainor Conservative Fighter for TX-21 P.S. As a husband and father of six, I know how precious every dollar is. But I also know our children's future depends on leaders who will fight for secure elections and a strong America. secure that future. Thank you. | | | | Early voting: February 17 – 27, 2026**Election Day: March 3, 2026 | | | | | | https:// | | | | | | PAID FOR BY TREY TRAINOR FOR TEXAS | | | | | Copyright (C) 2026 Trey Trainor for Texas. name: Anika Page
subject: Final Seats Remaining — Education Freedom Is Tuesday
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/edfreedomevent-12851823?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Good afternoon Friend,
This is it. As of this weekend, **only a small handful of seats remain** for **Education Freedom** , happening **Tuesday, February 10 at 11:30 AM** at **River Hills Club**. This timely luncheon brings together , one of the nation’s most influential voices on school choice, alongside Mississippi leaders who are actively engaged in the work of education policy and reform. Rather than reacting to headlines, this conversation is focused on understanding what this moment revealed, what lessons were learned, and what comes next for education freedom in Mississippi — informed by both national perspective and on-the-ground experience. Joining the discussion are:
* **Starla Brown** , State Director of **Americans for Prosperity Mississippi**
* **Lindsey Beckham** , State Chair and Legislative Chair for **Moms for Liberty**
* **Leah Ferretti** , Director of **Mississippi Ready**

---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=6c60f6f758&e=5703353baa)
---
_Click on the photo above to purchase your tickets!_
| Attendees will also have the opportunity to participate in **audience Q &A**, making this more than a lecture — it’s a chance to engage directly with leaders thinking seriously about the future of education in our state. If you’ve been considering attending, this is your moment. **Once these final seats are filled, registration will close.** **Event Details**
📍 River Hills Club
🗓️ Tuesday, February 10, 2026
⏰ 11:30 AM 🎟️ **Individual Tickets:** $35
🍽️ **VIP Tables:** $500

We hope to see you in the room.
---
| [Register here to be part of the conversation!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=c3733bfad1&e=5703353baa "Register here to be part of the conversation!")
---
| |
---
Warmest wishes,

Anika Page
Director of Operations

|
---

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie’s final book wasn’t about politics...
body:
This is what gave him strength
Fellow Patriot, Charlie’s final book is available with a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA.
| | | [ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=edb4d6e7eab14719afe365e5867e9385&_e=vVpSB5UgapaHs3yPn3JVjth8luG82GYSCgQ9gfpwQuSkkNzYSL4CmfRz5xbscS4Iwb3_qidmwG0GrsSzrHhAsKyodlAxhSii0xHy5OVefLJr7aZ4vkGqDgFt7IiKNAGK8QkXLsDpIijf9jgkcDMDV50Cez_fBMkQ5KzxXhDq84CgxV2D0Py3AgkKn4iGUIiQMlPQlU4f5rXowQ41pmw12GvIik01XRbvHhQ9B-lZMG7XxvUcQoOvA_4fymt3kE1glyOfJFnFcRo1J8zzdg5a7WXl1O-z_1zvjYSq5r0rblpYf7VW4T5osRCYtaleurwmCau2pOXPMpoct5Gm619jxmClogk7xv6PLIAmjsHgEYcWg-lhOPKSl-y0KKJpqPgNwJbka_PQ8HKWmQpBtMsIL_ECWBT8iU50FQDNDzX7yaYi8Cwu4WPS8DuoQ9_lVPsHu_jJbx2a4IkAmlFq2a-wKrXrFQUvY4SKGWY_EErDNipHRe-8_ph8_pswL783NBx3o8k7um8ypOl5n7KMP84vL3wcKxS--yeWDqnM4vaDM6FQ3dCL6Xp9ubqlIInJnVl4yw8kPI15bDx9OPGEwi2meNhJYcenqbL5vePsTKooBAacFDEmbPCMssHQTovh884SDLUB45ytNZEgzJy-qgQ8v4VQITDQuG_6zTa0xLqlaaG1Z_FOP6rp4uBFF2_AAoc2)
---
| | Fellow Patriot,
---
| | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...
---
[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=edb4d6e7eab14719afe365e5867e9385&_e=vVpSB5UgapaHs3yPn3JVjth8luG82GYSCgQ9gfpwQuSkkNzYSL4CmfRz5xbscS4Iwb3_qidmwG0GrsSzrHhAsKyodlAxhSii0xHy5OVefLJr7aZ4vkGqDgFt7IiKNAGK8QkXLsDpIijf9jgkcDMDV50Cez_fBMkQ5KzxXhDq84CgxV2D0Py3AgkKn4iGUIiQMlPQlU4f5rXowQ41pmw12GvIik01XRbvHhQ9B-lZMG5Irs4A6qeiTIgn3NXtVSQV8G0uecb5vh6VQusnND3JahJztEt4rei37WJA6VsvyE8kGywb5052OWo6PVDXBcpc_CGPBLMDS-xSNWCSEQXRhY9b7YiEJLBXpLJnc4HyyivfTHYcqfBzOiv-dh8XIms2oEYOKbifV-tpj9Haw913qMtHtGVwiy6k1IvWfji82bJ_N2BLzad0rl7aX-oxk2tfGhXOyigyVChkT8tdU2DbNPBzzDlEfX-fJbLFjOdDNEc8M0aCNmPiEpG8GHncVXKkalXUZkfn3DET-yM8CnLF-L52O4wQIc56_UEhDukY9pEvfpm5Hxxfs-qw7IuGLBmD0hLR9_xNVVibAB4HiU-qiH6peXnZQBY_7Jp1JsYNApxUq51ag2ShGhTV8drYkePFRR1rKxxtzpgpIQtAzzakwz4LhvjH7RRGNCdDVrVHwnNPv-0nTqZqPe1Ba2Rh1I6A)
---
This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust.

A book not about politics... but about peace.

**It 's called: _Stop, in the Name of God._**

**[ And right now, when you make a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA, we’ll send you a copy — as our thank-you for carrying Charlie’s mission forward. ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=edb4d6e7eab14719afe365e5867e9385&_e=vVpSB5UgapaHs3yPn3JVjth8luG82GYSCgQ9gfpwQuSkkNzYSL4CmfRz5xbscS4Iwb3_qidmwG0GrsSzrHhAsKyodlAxhSii0xHy5OVefLJr7aZ4vkGqDgFt7IiKNAGK8QkXLsDpIijf9jgkcDMDV50Cez_fBMkQ5KzxXhDq84CgxV2D0Py3AgkKn4iGUIiQMlPQlU4f5rXowQ41pmw12GvIik01XRbvHhQ9B-lZMG5loQjjinXiOmb4-lGeZMN1r7rLMd1Ae6dEOoDpdRjEmR-9fc_IB9DCeuUFc2uNKBPw0UJXwayzZZ0NNUFGE3Z9JbkMLOOeHcrtLBFHqDlN3Q6eZZk_bY8q9Dbs9qPTp6qAKlj17AJNxaz48ovD-wqCVyNGroLajzP63op5_b_c2zBbBB2k6TYznSb5QpVQSHtrNP2wIPREdaXojsIs9txUJSF5_SGMhfYT7qpgY8haf9d7SU4z_wLj0YaGM3DLaFC5ElIGD2q5g0Fz1MeGi0sS53uM6xu4lQUfxLQMarrUn8_mQvK-CMTgvJqYh9wTI-sYqLKFRroo-t4V7rd4plZIn8ZfVLgQYwFlpay7_R8zOF_c5Z3YtML2Avz93oYXeoww8wOGwqZPpFIIPHYuN89AiBPS_lbs4nezA3YpGxjrcqielzTaiNvbb56i9NETXoqaTwrTq3urRphZGaBM9u5Q) **
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie's Final Book** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=edb4d6e7eab14719afe365e5867e9385&_e=vVpSB5UgapaHs3yPn3JVjth8luG82GYSCgQ9gfpwQuSkkNzYSL4CmfRz5xbscS4Iwb3_qidmwG0GrsSzrHhAsKyodlAxhSii0xHy5OVefLJr7aZ4vkGqDgFt7IiKNAGK8QkXLsDpIijf9jgkcDMDV50Cez_fBMkQ5KzxXhDq84CgxV2D0Py3AgkKn4iGUIiQMlPQlU4f5rXowQ41pmw12GvIik01XRbvHhQ9B-lZMG7OKFeoXU-2q3J4DT0gPUbovez9vkdKfjc8mDAf2ulL4uvjUcGQCFgfssrbjeQEiwKiO5N31gVDtmCwbZYuyNERA5iNoNGb8OP4fwjVN1JuqX9XffN43mJMrPg8M1P4Ql3hXFzycht35M3mtG_e2MDPCK09N0o8hpfxYAlhFxWunJPGnijcWfhHKbv7idVkDoS56M3FzsSexXmFXa6S_6_ES_22NdAabUSX0K167rbPyQi9lv2NL50yD28Ytjys6WtVUrDgMzW5vDg8pY0Eyc87HkVchjxlBVJp70imHwlYgIu7zPLtmurqw37IhuuQSWQ1o_qd98GWv2EdSDAmXRQM5-brvHOMOa3Wn3i48Gre3x_PeGFaOg9it9VOmPfqqQQ-X2VTb8KgRQkFJYYBfFYlvNGZXuXdV54dRwRlt80vu6GDzdmYjYKZh3Wuxjqc9glVvIFkmz_AQQ6UfxtY2XOA)
---
Fellow Patriot, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book.

It's not a culture war manifesto.

It's a call to stop.

To rest. To breathe. To return to God.

**Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. **

Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away.

Trust that God is in control.

Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship.

**In _Stop, in the Name of God,_ you'll discover: **

🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout

🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer

🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again.

That's the heartbeat of his final message.

**[ To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today. ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=edb4d6e7eab14719afe365e5867e9385&_e=vVpSB5UgapaHs3yPn3JVjth8luG82GYSCgQ9gfpwQuSkkNzYSL4CmfRz5xbscS4Iwb3_qidmwG0GrsSzrHhAsKyodlAxhSii0xHy5OVefLJr7aZ4vkGqDgFt7IiKNAGK8QkXLsDpIijf9jgkcDMDV50Cez_fBMkQ5KzxXhDq84CgxV2D0Py3AgkKn4iGUIiQMlPQlU4f5rXowQ41pmw12GvIik01XRbvHhQ9B-lZMG40EYwjwTAUkLXibwV4JZQkaUd6lwlNyxxAl_nclyHC8YfpqKONQQq_iowQxaPUqIIx96jaFnfL4xJt_EqQoxQKHVeGEYp3K7_iFH31FpwY_gqLPOfHgFl33-V8RNzmOO_mDpOMGEtg9TIRz9H1_kWYAAQ9iK8VhApK-uqjYSJQbPoKckPfysCJsGUcZfhNU7VpZp3NXOROZkdfvwxg_8YOGOlFpU7YVbS2ij7LGx56FGr1HiGo6JDrBX8RThB-sHiaRJZqkGp4hOq2VHHx_zUp6DODUbntkchgrHVmXCfs_j0Z7U65-eOP684JuBD7L9EL2e5Pzk9KiO8GXHV-XK6eE7Shnrp4blfB0rjkNUuDkyWO-WnGomG7PPVNp2oGogGkvF34oDqEjZ2iTL7tvQtNtpl0PYpY46x1vCx_xCrjRgIJcLOrnbjF2JHPya_FVhn75ZD5iQVIIejdz2Ce3Do1) **
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie's Final Book** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=edb4d6e7eab14719afe365e5867e9385&_e=vVpSB5UgapaHs3yPn3JVjth8luG82GYSCgQ9gfpwQuSkkNzYSL4CmfRz5xbscS4Iwb3_qidmwG0GrsSzrHhAsKyodlAxhSii0xHy5OVefLJr7aZ4vkGqDgFt7IiKNAGK8QkXLsDpIijf9jgkcDMDV50Cez_fBMkQ5KzxXhDq84CgxV2D0Py3AgkKn4iGUIiQMlPQlU4f5rXowQ41pmw12GvIik01XRbvHhQ9B-lZMG7548xO1_E9SLp7zRyr_dINDALh51aQCLTM44-_OMIGh_KRzkhga-xmZLfeLcHBOxbjlAp-q6MrmHx4Wsul5zRcfthuz4XzXHnCqYavjDt42jVsXDbMoYFJ-YP-7EiZ7BmNQbsOQihQ8S7CPm05U5YOO9PM4DHKO2_cMRucL3rIMB0emZYZfupMWW9cKrJSPjtGhXnz1qC8zQjNaHNL42LsqQYlKT-wECGqdYN2YjQEJLGUyu-zpbGA8cD-2g_xVDguHOqQAner7nFxUqGR47FDMFviwWYzIWjsi6E5beZxcox_7Id2wyOvRv_S7EJza2Xp92XWowlYSIaw6d0klHh3iBC23LxcrhBHDjVBhrj3O5FO2v7z256Mxxc9xzI2hNcTv7BzlGU_6ulzYd89Tq9MoBu4LuzZSs0OIJMJ4h7BGoMXvy4xJY02SD30zAYcE9KeACUtV3B3mfJWzxLmH5dO)
---
Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth.

He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth...

For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal.

Fellow Patriot, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage.

These are the very things Charlie gave his life for.

May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God...

A stronger love for your family...

And a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
**For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---

clean_body: This is what gave him strength Fellow Patriot, Charlie’s final book is available with a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA. | | | | | Fellow Patriot, | | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud. He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus. He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness. And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible. I saw it up close -- Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything. He started observing the Sabbath. Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance. But as an act of obedience. As a way of saying, " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped. He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield. No email. No media. No work. He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children. It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much. But over time, it changed him. And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned... This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust. A book not about politics... but about peace. It 's called: Stop, in the Name of God. Fellow Patriot, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book. It's not a culture war manifesto. It's a call to stop. To rest. To breathe. To return to God. Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away. Trust that God is in control. Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship. In Stop, in the Name of God, you'll discover: 🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout 🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again. That's the heartbeat of his final message. Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth. He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth... For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal. Fellow Patriot, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage. These are the very things Charlie gave his life for. May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God... A stronger love for your family... And a renewed peace in your own soul. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S.Stop, in the Name of God is Charlie Kirk's final message -- written in obedience, shaped by Scripture, and grounded in trust in the Lord. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Voter Action Project
subject: MAGA is fast-tracking a monster voter suppression bill that could disenfranchise millions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Sean Wilentz, a professor of American History at Princeton University, makes the stakes of the SAVE Act clear: “ It’s the most extraordinary attack on voting rights in American history .”
With Trump pushing hard to make this dangerous bill a law before the midterms, we MUST stop this bill in the Senate and any more like it. We need to unite and fight now, before opponents of voting rights in Congress start checking voter suppression bills like this off their to-do list.
RUSH $35 or more right now to stop the SAVE Act, defend our right to vote, and stop opponents of voting rights from destroying our democracy >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=020826_2&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
CBS: Experts warn the proposed SAVE Act could make it harder for some married women to vote. Here's who could be affected. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=020826_2&amount=25]
The SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights and passed the U.S. House of Representatives. Now Trump and his MAGA minions are meeting with U.S. Senators, scheming for ways to get this bill through the Senate ahead of November's midterms.
This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law, folks.
PITCH IN $35 RIGHT NOW TO STOP THE SAVE ACT NOW ➜ [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=020826_2&amount=35]
Don’t be fooled by the name. This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register -- something millions of eligible Americans don’t have on hand. And that’s the point. The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise up to 11 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
Team, the consequences of a bill like this passing would be catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $35 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=020826_2&amount=35]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=020826_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=020826_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=020826_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=020826_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=020826_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=020826_2&amount=35]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=020826_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=020826_2&amount=20]

subject: What's more American than the Super Bowl?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
Something hardwired in the American spirit. Something absolutely essential to our identity as a nation.
#
The Super Bowl. The World Series. Burgers. Hot Dogs.
Some of the most American things you can imagine, right? But there's something that outdoes all of those. Something hardwired in the American spirit. Something absolutely essential to our identity as a nation.
**The Statue of Liberty.**
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/19490?t=1&akid=34929%2E3013755%2ElFwJjY)
[**The NEW VoteVets "Yearning to Breath Free" shirt, NOW AVAILABLE in the VoteVets PX. $35, shipped free with the code: FREESHIP25.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/19490?t=2&akid=34929%2E3013755%2ElFwJjY)
**Need something a little warmer?**
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/19491?t=3&akid=34929%2E3013755%2ElFwJjY)
[**The NEW VoteVets "Yearning to Breath Free" hoodie, NOW AVAILABLE in the VoteVets PX. $64, shipped free with the code: FREESHIP25.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/19491?t=4&akid=34929%2E3013755%2ElFwJjY)

name: Team Talarico
subject: What James said at our stop ICE rally:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
James recently organized a Stop ICE rally in Texas alongside Congressman Joaquin Castro, Congressman Greg Casar, Rep. Gina Hinojosa, and others.
More than 5,000 people showed up to join our protest and use their voice to demand an end to these secret police and the violence on our streets.
This is a moment that demands clear leadership, and we know many folks want to know where James stands. **[So we wanted to share this video of his speech at the event. Please take a moment to watch and share it.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/2014?t=1&akid=439%2E1347274%2Eb13hSU)**
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/2014?t=2&akid=439%2E1347274%2Eb13hSU)
James has promised to lead the fight in the U.S. Senate to not just demand but secure justice for our communities.
Team Talarico

* * *

**👋 An important request before you scroll away...**
The final FEC fundraising deadline before the primary is coming up on February 11, and James needs your help. When this deadline ends, we're legally required to report what we've raised, and everyone will be watching.
[**If winning Texas' Senate seat feels worth $5 to you, that is the contribution James is hoping you'll make today. Thank you.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q1.AKJ3HX&refcode=em260208-2-ak&t=3&akid=439%2E1347274%2Eb13hSU)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q1.AKJ3HX&refcode=em260208-2-ak&t=4&akid=439%2E1347274%2Eb13hSU)

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact information, [**you can submit this form.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/update-info/?t=5&akid=439%2E1347274%2Eb13hSU) Looking for Team Talarico merch? [**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=6&refcode2=439_1347274_b13hSU&akid=439%2E1347274%2Eb13hSU)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=439%2E1347274%2Eb13hSU).

name: Swamp Digest
subject: The liberal media got caught telling this unthinkable lie about J.D. Vance

| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=a405f3a9be314e9080be6e71bdeb0f57&_e=LccqLnAP3Fb9J8AA-6CKH4zRp3VhP-mxAjqXxc1lSEZreMdxScu_J3gkrxlhT8Bmj1d_dDak6H7uN9XmRNKEYvAKmiHnN-78eynrXc0nxdPmbtUh_-Cuf1MWUIAmAuw902RIu1uXgonHfBkK3VVc42EpGvIostF5ZVdsU1AU-4o03urG0WevA9M0HQZm4KM5LBmZsU9WpB6xFTDmmZk4R7MuuvNqPDI1SuZZ0sKRjt9PJaH_BRGhMY1dfSP7AowfdGOU7irNXfEAhDlodGTXrXxjej78XV-tGKQIazCTA06FP-9uLUD7m2OnWGnvQYaQe7uS9XtMW9rVu_fSZgs1O0MpUBy4gOy8bRvfGTnKbMMUnWHiYCQdXydd3eVIhmI2ywWnhdK9A_vvbqzM8bZTCtr2jtvhGRO_meKK1ZKUAu_-q6nFeaTNNuY4q9z46svzsJCR1Oqsaq4ASOJMJLDUGmubiBC9oVx8469pfLjCqkLMHTDVbjPKCqEGyuxKsDVmWKOUnAjSdk8c62GnwLrYrRiBXV3rRtmyEyxs-q9HObc%3D)

Peter,

I'm **SICK** and **TIRED** of the Left **POISONING** our culture, our sports, and our country, and too many woke politicians are too weak to fight back.

I said it loud and clear: **the Super Bowl is going woke.**

And just like clockwork, the media freaked out.

They don't want leaders who tell them the truth. They want puppets. They want silence.

_Well, they picked the wrong guy._

I didn't spend decades coaching winners just to roll over for Hollywood elites and radical activists.

_**What used to unite Americans is now being turned into a woke circus, and if we don 't fight back, they'll keep pushing further.**_

That's exactly why I'm running for Governor.

The Left knows I won't bend, so they're already gearing up to stop me.

**But I 've got something stronger: _Patriots who are ready to defend their America First values._**

[**Chip in $15 today and help me win this fight.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=a405f3a9be314e9080be6e71bdeb0f57&_e=LccqLnAP3Fb9J8AA-6CKH4zRp3VhP-mxAjqXxc1lSEZreMdxScu_J3gkrxlhT8Bmj1d_dDak6H7uN9XmRNKEYvAKmiHnN-78eynrXc0nxdPmbtUh_-Cuf1MWUIAmAuw902RIu1uXgonHfBkK3VVc48cLH19QBzDL8PB6suOsZsDtAye0oceyG46x_xMXCulfXqi1XUFoOJK86OKpwtUcnTUnKINp_CIJEvKiR7_wBQyUz66hXrwJGEG7Z4i4KLSMK3c-P2pNHOA_y9PzweXud_iEW5mJQ2yoFD9XA4BlV7yeemc8v__f-ZehNhMBOu0tf7DeEYthImdz6ni1UYZqP_VgfmEri6OI574G6csS-fvpAfhZR1bG2uD8iZe3rIq3q67eUsEIwyrBnrOK1PNDGdD_MAfUDgZxktAouHvnXW7Py8GYb2mbO70Nd4aGFQRuxZvt1E6wb8dVgdEOJeJ8qgqBFXSMqRHYfCVUCfsyLwO36AtYbKGzBgWt1idDWvV_k5YlCVCjiuefa2cRyH9xro08Ib5nblrJtl6G8-_-kzM9svkuLSm__5YLbfXes3q8)

I'm not shutting up, and I'm not backing down.

[**_Are you with me?_**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=a405f3a9be314e9080be6e71bdeb0f57&_e=LccqLnAP3Fb9J8AA-6CKH4zRp3VhP-mxAjqXxc1lSEZreMdxScu_J3gkrxlhT8Bmj1d_dDak6H7uN9XmRNKEYvAKmiHnN-78eynrXc0nxdPmbtUh_-Cuf1MWUIAmAuw902RIu1uXgonHfBkK3VVc48cLH19QBzDL8PB6suOsZsDtAye0oceyG46x_xMXCulfK4Pvevdg5r2cnYZRgx0Zi4wD_3YqLb400nhRP0nv1eCeCaD1I86gnnGauhuRzb8C6H6jwYfNSDIsWJt0elGKmOIiNam4McKE5yFVMtO09aTDfgsnIbfip2spUFiJWpt6RBUmH305vu5xl6IPZn4UPtefXA3rFmbNBRyN0ATxQeGnO-RkWw6F99HAoq1Fj-KfwNNI5US7QTXM6wgmlw1XA3dMZS2P_tdDkGO3U8XS1xIr0HG_dhTRE0XfmzR1NeK4R-JVSanGMKxJ1KllqLp66JaSOFkGXQJp-qShGjQGKQuj4TLHrHEX1nVJ4_8DQjh1RAKHrBgYc2GMqecIIY_NuFtIv9GZBFTOVmANq-ty7QLJqDqpEUXzcEE4SZfUn4-i)

_Coach Tuberville_

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=a405f3a9be314e9080be6e71bdeb0f57&_e=LccqLnAP3Fb9J8AA-6CKH4zRp3VhP-mxAjqXxc1lSEZreMdxScu_J3gkrxlhT8BmaJdHFrG6y9cvnZ0Uy1C_E-IoAKJpTgfaOeucNcHTneqdOwNRpFbyqxDrPo2Em_wKu9sZQLd0tOH6PRvq2H5g9zp1ro1PqAWEdbCYo0dnDJR4IUSLUC2ceys_FMyqAnYAD9dM1biYytlKAJq_C9QGzJydha6y_O0nB6n9ybbQUamF2k_6aWFbwWx6pRmfQwOsZFLwI9DSplHa4BcJ6TETa_TdbAQJYfie-k5t0hcNF8Eg5-xuPPyafrvWIM0BxbNEQzEv7_lL53VQyfeTFD9a9kr0LsGCm70fabhe728u6YUTHKYnUvvnKcqblXxbKCxG1mHc8Eld7iAsAX7vNkrJ4293FV2B7gG-9YyszRbSXEes0XHjjV0j6ul0aCl7VrwuuRTqzSCWx7RE95IlfXnnIwBpamXkhcUXefCFOlhVZqhA0h8tmewR7LqUqYtIYxFTfQ9VgP7wKcHflkV_RbMVIs5or0m2adPzGtJE71eVjCE5t9L47XQK4GxMBm9aotg9)

---

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: The middle class is drifting out of reach
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?amount=25]
Every day, I hear from more and more constituents who are deeply concerned about affordability.
Groceries, gas, education, housing, health care, and raising a family. The cost of everything has gone up.
And now a new national poll confirms what so many people are already feeling every day: the middle class is drifting out of reach.
Look, I’m a millennial, so I honestly can’t think of a time in the last twenty-something years when my generation wasn’t facing economic shocks and crises. From the Great Recession, when there were no jobs available, to the explosion of tuition costs and student debt, to the COVID-19 pandemic and the housing and child care crises.
So as a generation, we know a thing or two about the economy failing us. But it’s not just us. A full two-thirds of Americans say a middle-class life is out of reach for most people.
Way too many people in this country are living with the constant dread of when the next hit will come. And for way too many people, a single emergency will wipe out their savings completely.
And now on top of all that, we also have to worry about Trump sending lethal immigration forces into our communities. Instead of lowering costs as he promised to voters, Donald Trump is making everyday life harder — and scarier.
This is not economic leadership. It’s chaos and cruelty to distract from the fact that Trump and Republicans actually don’t care one bit about affordability.
If they cared about making life easier for Americans, they wouldn’t be handing out tax breaks to billionaires, gutting health care and food assistance, and blocking any real action on affordability.
But this poll (and a series of decisive Democratic electoral victories since Trump was re-elected) tells us that voters are starting to see through it. A majority of Americans say Trump’s policies have made life less affordable.
Young people, parents, and working families across party lines are saying the same thing: they’re working harder than ever and getting less in return.
That’s why taking back the House this November matters so much.
Right now, Republicans are using their power to protect the wealthy, attack immigrants, and block solutions that would actually help families breathe a little easier. If we flip the House, we can put affordability front and center again: lower health care costs, tackle housing, address the child care crisis, protect families, and stop Trump’s most dangerous abuses of power.
This election is about more than politics. It’s about whether people can afford to live with dignity and without fear.
We have to kick the GOP out of the majority, flip the House, and start delivering results for people who are struggling.
Will you join me? No amount is too small — anything you contribute today adds up to directly support our work to flip the House in November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?amount=50]

clean_body: [] Every day, I hear from more and more constituents who are deeply concerned about affordability. Groceries, gas, education, housing, health care, and raising a family. The cost of everything has gone up. And now a new national poll confirms what so many people are already feeling every day: the middle class is drifting out of reach. Look, I’m a millennial, so I honestly can’t think of a time in the last twenty-something years when my generation wasn’t facing economic shocks and crises. From the Great Recession, when there were no jobs available, to the explosion of tuition costs and student debt, to the COVID-19 pandemic and the housing and child care crises. So as a generation, we know a thing or two about the economy failing us. But it’s not just us. A full two-thirds of Americans say a middle-class life is out of reach for most people. Way too many people in this country are living with the constant dread of when the next hit will come. And for way too many people, a single emergency will wipe out their savings completely. And now on top of all that, we also have to worry about Trump sending lethal immigration forces into our communities. Instead of lowering costs as he promised to voters, Donald Trump is making everyday life harder — and scarier. This is not economic leadership. It’s chaos and cruelty to distract from the fact that Trump and Republicans actually don’t care one bit about affordability. If they cared about making life easier for Americans, they wouldn’t be handing out tax breaks to billionaires, gutting health care and food assistance, and blocking any real action on affordability. But this poll (and a series of decisive Democratic electoral victories since Trump was re-elected) tells us that voters are starting to see through it. A majority of Americans say Trump’s policies have made life less affordable. Young people, parents, and working families across party lines are saying the same thing: they’re working harder than ever and getting less in return. That’s why taking back the House this November matters so much. Right now, Republicans are using their power to protect the wealthy, attack immigrants, and block solutions that would actually help families breathe a little easier. If we flip the House, we can put affordability front and center again: lower health care costs, tackle housing, address the child care crisis, protect families, and stop Trump’s most dangerous abuses of power. This election is about more than politics. It’s about whether people can afford to live with dignity and without fear. We have to kick the GOP out of the majority, flip the House, and start delivering results for people who are struggling. Will you join me? No amount is too small — anything you contribute today adds up to directly support our work to flip the House in November. name: Graham Platner
subject: What can I say?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99961?refcode=em20260208-10033&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10033%2E614464%2EPwHt09)
Peter,
Is there anything I can say to convince you to make a donation to my campaign to defeat Susan Collins before midnight tonight?
What if I told you that I am the Marine Corps veteran and oyster farmer running as a Democrat against Susan Collins here in Maine?
What if I told you that Susan Collins is the most vulnerable Republican senator in the entire country?
What if I told you that I’m not afraid to support Medicare for All or call what’s happened in Gaza a genocide?
What if I told you that the future of our very democracy hinges on defeating Susan Collins and taking back the Senate this November?
And what if I told you that I’m not taking money from AIPAC or the billionaires, so the only way we’ll defeat Susan Collins and take back the Senate is if you chip in now?
We need to raise another $25,000 before midnight tonight if we’re going to win and flip this Senate seat blue, but right now, we’re still very short. If I’m going to defeat Susan Collins, I am counting on you to give now:
**[Please, will you split a donation right now between our campaign and Heartland Patriots to help me defeat Susan Collins, flip Maine blue, and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99961?refcode=em20260208-10033&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10033%2E614464%2EPwHt09)**
We aren’t going to defeat Susan Collins with another cookie-cutter corporate Democrat. But if I’m going to fight back against AIPAC and the billionaire Super PACs, I am counting on your support now.
We can win this seat for working-class people. But we can only do it together.
In solidarity,
Graham Platner

[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)

Null, it’s been just over a year since Donald Trump returned to the White House. With the support of his MAGA allies in the Senate, **Trump has pushed a reckless, dangerous agenda that’s hurt working families and put our future at risk.**

In just one year, Trump has:
💊 **Gutted Medicaid** and slashed health insurance subsidies for working families

🧪 **Appointed RFK Jr.** as HHS secretary, a fringe conspiracy theorist who's now cutting childhood vaccines

🍎 **Raised grocery prices** through his reckless tariffs

🚓 **Deployed military forces** in U.S. cities

💸 **Enriched himself** and his family and allies

❌ **Pardoned Jan. 6 rioters**
Now, Trump has endorsed Mike Rogers in Michigan because he knows our battleground race could decide Senate control.
[**But we need to know where you stand, null. We need 18 more responses from 18326 for statistical significance before our poll expires at midnight tonight. Tell us now:**](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/13791?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=2179%2E49239%2EhfjaDN)

**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. body:
Newsletter from Beth Farnham Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to...
---
|

| | | [Beth Farnham for Congress](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.com) | [Read on blog](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2026%2F02%2F08%2Fdistrict-round-up-02-08-26%2F%3Fjetpack_skip_subscription_popup&sr=0&signature=e9d9907bd140395f0ee9170ad7db30cf&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z) or [Reader](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wordpress.com%2Freader%2Fblogs%2F213069660%2Fposts%2F6292&sr=0&signature=2d4e71f83933a472d236b8a605b6fb36&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)

# [District Round-up 02.08.26](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.com/2026/02/08/district-round-up-02-08-26/?jetpack_skip_subscription_popup)
---
By **Elizabeth Farnham** on February 8, 2026
---
| |
---
## Newsletter from Beth Farnham
---
Dear Neighbor,
---
Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-farnham-for-congress-1](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=69289c4d725b67a140025859f13c0466c9dfcca01c1a0f9c5591c4e551ce88fb&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6292&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=91ddf372d546161a529144e8f512938e&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JldGgtZmFybmhhbS1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMQ=&email_id=4ecab0280f3990243b22dc1d2a462d23)
---
---
| | |
---
| | **Blair County Town Hall**
---
| Many, many thanks to all who came out to our Town Hall today at the [AFSCME](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=2432a47f079ad407ae9294e25974115b8167014a7f6f6e62eb550c682fb2e392&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6292&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=56120b0cd2a440382dff7082606d89df&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=4ecab0280f3990243b22dc1d2a462d23) building in Duncansville and to the volunteers of Team Beth Farnham for Congress for making it such a success!
---
It was a great afternoon of district-level information, solutions, thoughtful questions, and heartfelt comments.
---
---
| | |
---|---|---
| |
---|---|---
| **Candidate Conversation by the South-Central Caucus of the PA State Democratic Committee**
---
I was honored to speak during the Candidate Conversation event in Harrisburg. Here is what I believe about I.C.E. and the future of immigrants to the United States.
---
[https://www.tiktok.com/@bethfarnhamforcongress/video/7603774042822184222?is_from_webapp=1&sender_device=pc](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=ba66435355bd3836a68bb4f724fd3aa6bacf771708efe05883476bcfd72c5863&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6292&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=18dec35208a9360dcaa1e291471372aa&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGlrdG9rLmNvbS9AYmV0aGZhcm5oYW1mb3Jjb25ncmVzcy92aWRlby83NjAzNzc0MDQyODIyMTg0MjIyP2lzX2Zyb21fd2ViYXBwPTEmc2VuZGVyX2RldmljZT1wYw=&email_id=4ecab0280f3990243b22dc1d2a462d23)
While the ultra-wealthy waste their time and money supporting the useless Melania movie, I’m fighting for Everyday Americans because we deserve Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness.
---
As our elected US Representative, I pledge to:
---
– vote for a national healthcare plan so the every American has accessible and affordable healthcare.
---
– raise the federal minimum wage from a poverty wage to a livable one.
---
– ensure food assistance, like SNAP, is available to our hungriest Americans.
---
– abolish I.C.E. and vote for clear paths to citizenship.
---
– enshrine into federal law our Reproductive Freedom so that we can create the families we choose.
---
– hold accountable every government official of the Trump administration and its supporters for their crimes against humanity, the US Constitution, and the American People.
---
– institute Gun Safety like safe storage of guns, reporting of lost or stolen guns universal background checks and red flag laws so that gun violence will never again be the leading cause of death for US children.
---
– strengthen our voting rights so that the Will of The People will never again be left in doubt.
---
Vote for me, Beth Farnham, on November 3rd and teach the world that we Everyday Americans
---
[#ChooseDemocracy](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=cfef0ba272b3776086601860960fd8e97484ff95fe0bb97e89aa9f0eedf1b158&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6292&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=87e5b8922a1bad205b3c8ac64c78fa84&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=4ecab0280f3990243b22dc1d2a462d23)
---
[#AbolishICE](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=2d9de68eb465841fcdabd353c5aa90b70bd439c3b39963df52d25c521ec99cca&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6292&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=dbaffe3df6a5e588cc02d349cff16dd5&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=4ecab0280f3990243b22dc1d2a462d23)
---
[#blacklivesmatter](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=6a91b35ed36bc34e3ac22b4f42465cebe36cce4a1b4675b4a8ad45bba5c39046&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6292&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=588c72d5355622a1613e7cd1479efd18&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=4ecab0280f3990243b22dc1d2a462d23)
---
| |
---
| |
---
**Happy Black History Month!**
---
If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism.
---
We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you.
---
Sincerely,
---
Beth
---
